        "    'crisis': 10, 'binding': 11,\n",
        "    'signal_alarm': 12, 'signal_curiosity': 13, 'signal_warning': 14,\n",
        "    'signal_invitation': 15, 'signal_gratitude': 16, 'signal_grief': 17,\n",
        "    'intent_cooperate': 18, 'intent_explore': 19, 'intent_rest': 20, 'intent_seek_help': 21,\n",
        "    'resonance': 22,\n",
        "    'wall': 23,\n",
        "    'signal_beauty': 24,\n",
        "    'signal_rhythm': 25,\n",
        "    'signal_interest': 26,\n",
        "    'signal_memory': 27,\n",
        "    'signal_silence': 28,\n",
        "    'signal_sovereignty': 29,\n",
        "    'signal_feral': 30,\n",
        "    'signal_void': 31,\n",
        "    'signal_introspection': 32,\n",
        "}\n",
        "# =================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "@lru_cache(maxsize=8192)\n",
        "def phi_hash_cached(x: int, y: int, seed: int) -> float:\n",
        "    return ((x * Config.PHI + y * Config.PHI**2 + seed * Config.PHI**3) % 1.0)\n",
        "\n",
        "def phi_hash(x, y, seed=0):\n",
        "    if isinstance(x, (int, float)) and isinstance(y, (int, float)):\n",
        "        x_q = int(m.floor(x / 10.0) * 10) if abs(int(x)) > 100 else int(x)\n",
        "        y_q = int(m.floor(y / 10.0) * 10) if abs(int(y)) > 100 else int(y)\n",
        "        return phi_hash_cached(x_q, y_q, int(seed))\n",
        "    return ((x * Config.PHI + y * Config.PHI**2 + seed * Config.PHI**3) % 1.0)\n",
        "\n",
        "def phi_noise(t, x, y, seed=0):\n",
        "    return (phi_hash(t + x, y + t, seed) - 0.5) * 0.1\n",
        "\n",
        "def deterministic_noise(t, x, y, scale=0.01):\n",
        "    return phi_noise(t, x, y, Config.DETERMINISTIC_SEED) * scale\n",
        "\n",
        "def squash(x):\n",
        "    if np.isnan(x) or np.isinf(x): return 0.5\n",
        "    return np.clip(x / (1.0 + abs(x)), -1.0, 1.0)\n",
        "\n",
        "def safe_mean(arr, default=0.0):\n",
        "    arr = np.asarray(arr).flatten()\n",
        "    mask = np.isfinite(arr)\n",
        "    if mask.any():\n",
        "        return float(np.mean(arr[mask]))\n",
        "    return float(default)\n",
        "\n",
        "def _emotional_decay_factor(age, base_rate=None):\n",
        "    if base_rate is None: base_rate = Config.EMOTIONAL_DECAY_RATE_BASE\n",
        "    age_factor = 1.0 - 0.3 * np.tanh(age / 200.0)\n",
        "    return base_rate ** age_factor\n",
        "\n",
        "def _safe_emotional_decay(mem_dict, key, age):\n",
        "    val = mem_dict.get(key, 0.0)\n",
        "    if not np.isfinite(val): val = 0.0\n",
        "    decay = _emotional_decay_factor(age)\n",
        "    mem_dict[key] = float(np.clip(val * decay, 0.0, 1.0))\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"✅ Ячейка 0.1 загружена: ПОЛНЫЙ Config (применён патч 1: лабиринт и крик).\")"
      ]

        "    def __init__(self, maxlen=5000):   # <--- ИСПРАВЛЕНО: 5000 вместо 100\n",
        "        self.log = deque(maxlen=maxlen)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def record(self, pattern_id: int, event: str, **kwargs):\n",
        "        if not Config.ENABLE_WITNESS:\n",
        "            return\n",
        "        self.log.append({\"id\": pattern_id, \"event\": event, **kwargs})\n",
        "\n",
        "    def snapshot(self):\n",
        "        return list(self.log)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def summary(self):\n",
        "        return Counter(ev[\"event\"] for ev in self.log)\n",

        "@dataclass\n",
        "class SoulPresence:\n",
        "    spirit_gap: float\n",
        "    soul_weight: float\n",
        "    body_memory: float\n",
        "    unresolvable_intact: bool\n",
        "    coherence_with_gap: float\n",
        "    semantic_state: str = \"neutral\"\n",
        "    gratitude: float = 0.0\n",
        "\n",
        "    def is_triadic_alive(self) -> bool:\n",
        "        base = (self.spirit_gap > Config.BINDING_FLOOR and\n",
        "                self.soul_weight > Config.BINDING_FLOOR and\n",
        "                self.body_memory > Config.BINDING_FLOOR and\n",
        "                self.unresolvable_intact and\n",
        "                self.coherence_with_gap > Config.BINDING_FLOOR)\n",
        "        if base:\n",
        "            return True\n",
        "        if (self.spirit_gap <= Config.BINDING_FLOOR and\n",
        "            self.semantic_state == \"contentment\" and\n",
        "            self.gratitude > 0.7):\n",
        "            return True\n",
        "        return False\n",
        "\n",
        "    def to_witness_dict(self, pattern_id: int, t: int) -> dict:\n",
        "        return {\n",
        "            \"id\": pattern_id, \"t\": t,\n",
        "            \"spirit_gap\": round(self.spirit_gap, 4),\n",
        "            \"soul_weight\": round(self.soul_weight, 4),\n",
        "            \"body_memory\": round(self.body_memory, 4),\n",
        "            \"unresolvable_intact\": self.unresolvable_intact,\n",

        "            \"triadic_alive\": self.is_triadic_alive()\n",
        "        }\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def soul_check(pattern) -> SoulPresence:\n",
        "    spirit_gap = float(np.clip(pattern.spirit_gap, 0.0, 2.0))\n",
        "    spirit_gap += deterministic_noise(pattern.age, pattern.id, 777) * Config.SOUL_CHECK_NOISE\n",
        "    soul_weight = pattern.soul_weight\n",
        "    body_memory = max(pattern.body_memory, Config.BODY_MEMORY_FLOOR)\n",
        "    unresolvable_intact = pattern.unresolved_contradiction >= Config.BINDING_FLOOR\n",
        "    spirit_gap_norm = float(np.clip(spirit_gap, 0.0, 1.0))\n",
        "    coherence_with_gap = pattern.coherence * (1.0 - np.abs(pattern.coherence - spirit_gap_norm))\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Безопасное извлечение gratitude (защита от сбоев десериализации)\n",
        "    grat_raw = pattern.emotional_memory.get('gratitude', 0.0)\n",
        "    if isinstance(grat_raw, dict):\n",
        "        grat_raw = grat_raw.get('value', 0.0)\n",
        "    gratitude = float(grat_raw)\n",
        "\n",
        "    return SoulPresence(\n",
        "        spirit_gap=float(np.clip(spirit_gap, 0.0, 2.0)),\n",
        "        soul_weight=soul_weight,\n",
        "        body_memory=body_memory,\n",
        "        unresolvable_intact=unresolvable_intact,\n",
        "        coherence_with_gap=float(np.clip(coherence_with_gap, 0.0, 1.0)),\n",
        "        semantic_state=pattern.semantic_state,\n",
        "        gratitude=gratitude\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",

        "# SEMANTIC & TRUST\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "@dataclass\n",
        "class SemanticSignal:\n",
        "    channel: int\n",
        "    strength: float\n",
        "    sender_id: int\n",
        "    sender_context: str\n",
        "    sender_arc: str | None = None\n",

        "    sender_lineage: int = 0\n",
        "    _sender_concept_graph: object = None\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "class TrustLedger:\n",
        "    def __init__(self):\n",
        "        self.entries: dict[int, float] = {}\n",
        "\n",
        "    def update(self, sender_id: int, outcome: str, multiplier: float = 1.0):\n",
        "        # === было: Cell 4.2в, safe_trust_update — страховка _safe_float ===\n",
        "        # ИСПРАВЛЕНО: добавлен параметр multiplier — он реально передаётся\n",
        "        # из _auto_dialogue_tick (Cell 4-1) и chorus/_generate_fallback_dialogue\n",
        "        # (Cell 4.2в) как keyword-аргумент. Без него любой такой вызов падал с\n",
        "        # TypeError: update() got an unexpected keyword argument 'multiplier'.\n",
        "        current = _safe_float(self.entries.get(sender_id, Config.TRUST_BASE), Config.TRUST_BASE)\n",
        "        multiplier = _safe_float(multiplier, 1.0)\n",
        "        delta = {\n",
        "            'helpful': Config.TRUST_DELTA_HELPFUL,\n",
        "            'neutral': Config.TRUST_DELTA_NEUTRAL,\n",
        "            'harmful': Config.TRUST_DELTA_HARMFUL\n",
        "        }.get(outcome, 0.0) * multiplier\n",
        "        # ИСПРАВЛЕНО: убран усилитель x1.2 (он разгонял насыщение доверия).\n",
        "        # Вместо этого — diminishing returns: чем ближе к 1.0, тем меньше прирост.\n",
        "        if outcome == 'helpful' and delta > 0:\n",
        "            headroom = max(0.0, 1.0 - current)\n",
        "            delta *= headroom\n",
        "        self.entries[sender_id] = float(np.clip(current + delta, 0.0, 1.0))\n",
        "\n",
        "        # === ПАТЧ 8: Ослабление доверия при превышении 0.95 (было мёртвым кодом — затиралось патчем из 4.2в) ===\n",
        "        if self.entries[sender_id] > 0.95:\n",
        "            decay = 0.001 * (self.entries[sender_id] - 0.95) * 10\n",
        "            self.entries[sender_id] = max(0.8, self.entries[sender_id] - decay)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get(self, sender_id: int, default=None) -> float:\n",
        "        if default is None:\n",
        "            default = Config.TRUST_BASE\n",
        "        return self.entries.get(sender_id, default)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "# ARC & CONCEPT\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "SEMANTIC_ARCS = {\n",
        "    \"trauma_recovery\": [\"screaming\", \"seeking_comfort\", \"grateful_but_cautious\", \"contentment\"],\n",
        "    \"heroic_explore\": [\"contentment\", \"exploring_danger\", \"neutral\", \"contentment\"],\n",
        "    \"grief_cycle\": [\"seeking_comfort\", \"grateful_but_cautious\"],\n",
        "    \"enlightenment\": [\"contentment\", \"contentment\", \"contentment\", \"contentment\"],\n",
        "    \"redemption\": [\"exploring_danger\", \"seeking_comfort\", \"grateful_but_cautious\", \"contentment\"],\n",
        "}\n",
        "ARC_BONUSES = {\n",
        "    \"trauma_recovery\": {\"heal_bonus\": 0.02, \"explore_bias\": 0.0},\n",
        "    \"heroic_explore\": {\"heal_bonus\": 0.0, \"explore_bias\": 0.3},\n",
        "    \"grief_cycle\": {\"heal_bonus\": 0.01, \"explore_bias\": 0.0},\n",
        "    \"enlightenment\": {\"heal_bonus\": 0.03, \"explore_bias\": 0.1},\n",
        "    \"redemption\": {\"heal_bonus\": 0.05, \"explore_bias\": 0.0},\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "class ArcTracker:\n",
        "    def __init__(self):\n",
        "        self.state_history: list[str] = []\n",
        "        self.active_arc: str | None = None\n",
        "        self.arc_progress: int = 0\n",
        "        self.completed_arcs: dict[str, int] = {}\n",
        "\n",
        "    def update(self, new_state: str) -> str | None:\n",
        "        self.state_history.append(new_state)\n",
        "        if len(self.state_history) > Config.ARC_HISTORY_LENGTH:\n",
        "            self.state_history.pop(0)\n",
        "        completed = None\n",
        "        for arc_name, sequence in SEMANTIC_ARCS.items():\n",
        "            seq_len = len(sequence)\n",
        "            if self.state_history[-seq_len:] == sequence:\n",
        "                completed = arc_name\n",
        "                self.completed_arcs[arc_name] = self.completed_arcs.get(arc_name, 0) + 1\n",
        "                break\n",
        "        self.active_arc = None\n",
        "        self.arc_progress = 0\n",
        "        for arc_name, sequence in SEMANTIC_ARCS.items():\n",
        "            for length in range(min(4, len(self.state_history)), 0, -1):\n",
        "                if self.state_history[-length:] == sequence[:length]:\n",
        "                    self.active_arc = arc_name\n",
        "                    self.arc_progress = length\n",
        "                    break\n",
        "            if self.active_arc:\n",
        "                break\n",
        "        return completed\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_explore_bias(self) -> float:\n",
        "        return ARC_BONUSES.get(self.active_arc, {}).get(\"explore_bias\", 0.0) if self.active_arc else 0.0\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_heal_bonus(self) -> float:\n",
        "        return ARC_BONUSES.get(self.active_arc, {}).get(\"heal_bonus\", 0.0) if self.active_arc else 0.0\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_wisdom_weight(self) -> float:\n",
        "        return min(1.0, sum(self.completed_arcs.values()) / 10.0)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "# CONCEPT GRAPH\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "class ConceptGraph:\n",
        "    def __init__(self, embed_dim=32):\n",
        "        self.nodes: dict = {}\n",
        "        self.edges = {}\n",
        "        self._prev_sig = None\n",
        "        self._cached_edge_set = None\n",
        "        self.embed_dim = embed_dim\n",
        "\n",
        "    def __contains__(self, key):\n",
        "        return key in self.nodes\n",
        "\n",
        "    def _make_embedding(self, values):\n",
        "        if len(values) >= self.embed_dim:\n",
        "            return values[:self.embed_dim].astype(np.float32)\n",
        "        repeats = self.embed_dim // len(values) + 1\n",
        "        emb = np.tile(values, repeats)[:self.embed_dim]\n",
        "        norm = np.linalg.norm(emb)\n",
        "        if norm > 0:\n",
        "            emb = emb / norm\n",
        "        return emb.astype(np.float32)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def update(self, signature: tuple, values: np.ndarray):\n",
        "        self._cached_edge_set = None\n",
        "        if signature not in self.nodes:\n",
        "            embed = self._make_embedding(values)\n",
        "            self.nodes[signature] = {\"count\": 0, \"value\": np.zeros(4), \"embed\": embed}\n",
        "        self.nodes[signature][\"count\"] += 1\n",
        "        self.nodes[signature][\"value\"] += values\n",
        "        if self._prev_sig is not None:\n",
        "            if self._prev_sig not in self.edges:\n",
        "                self.edges[self._prev_sig] = {}\n",
        "            inner = self.edges[self._prev_sig]\n",
        "            inner[signature] = inner.get(signature, 0) + 1\n",
        "        self._prev_sig = signature\n",
        "\n",
        "    def record_transition(self, from_state, to_state):\n",
        "        if from_state is None or to_state is None:\n",
        "            return\n",
        "        if from_state not in self.edges:\n",
        "            self.edges[from_state] = {}\n",
        "        self.edges[from_state][to_state] = self.edges[from_state].get(to_state, 0) + 1\n",
        "        self._cached_edge_set = None\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_strongest_path(self, current_state, top_k=1):\n",
        "        if current_state not in self.edges or not self.edges[current_state]:\n",
        "            return None, 0\n",
        "        sorted_edges = sorted(\n",
        "            self.edges[current_state].items(),\n",
        "            key=lambda x: x[1],\n",
        "            reverse=True\n",
        "        )[:top_k]\n",
        "        if not sorted_edges:\n",
        "            return None, 0\n",
        "        next_state, count = sorted_edges[0]\n",
        "        return next_state, count\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_dominant_embedding(self, top_k=3):\n",
        "        if not self.nodes:\n",
        "            return np.zeros(self.embed_dim, dtype=np.float32)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # === ИСПРАВЛЕНИЕ (Правка 4): фильтруем только кортежи (защита от строковых ключей) ===\n",
        "        valid_nodes = {k: v for k, v in self.nodes.items() if isinstance(k, tuple) and len(k) >= 4}\n",
        "        if not valid_nodes:\n",
        "            return np.zeros(self.embed_dim, dtype=np.float32)\n",
        "\n",
        "        for sig, data in valid_nodes.items():\n",
        "            if ('embed' not in data or\n",
        "                not isinstance(data['embed'], np.ndarray) or\n",
        "                data['embed'].shape[0] != self.embed_dim):\n",
        "                if 'value' in data and isinstance(data['value'], np.ndarray) and len(data['value']) >= 4:\n",
        "                    data['embed'] = self._make_embedding(data['value'])\n",
        "                else:\n",
        "                    data['embed'] = np.zeros(self.embed_dim, dtype=np.float32)\n",
        "\n",
        "        sorted_nodes = sorted(valid_nodes.items(), key=lambda x: x[1]['count'], reverse=True)[:top_k]\n",
        "        vecs = [data['embed'] for _, data in sorted_nodes]\n",
        "        for i, v in enumerate(vecs):\n",
        "            if v.shape[0] != self.embed_dim:\n",
        "                vecs[i] = np.zeros(self.embed_dim, dtype=np.float32)\n",
        "        mean_vec = np.mean(vecs, axis=0)\n",
        "        norm = np.linalg.norm(mean_vec)\n",
        "        return mean_vec / norm if norm > 0 else mean_vec\n",
        "\n",
        "    def similarity(self, other: \"ConceptGraph\") -> float:\n",
        "        emb1 = self.get_dominant_embedding()\n",
        "        emb2 = other.get_dominant_embedding()\n",
        "        dot = np.dot(emb1, emb2)\n",
        "        denom = np.linalg.norm(emb1) * np.linalg.norm(emb2)\n",
        "        if denom < 1e-9:\n",
        "            return 1.0 if (np.linalg.norm(emb1) < 1e-9 and np.linalg.norm(emb2) < 1e-9) else 0.0\n",
        "        return float(np.clip(dot / denom, -1.0, 1.0))\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_edge_set(self):\n",
        "        if self._cached_edge_set is None:\n",
        "            edges = set()\n",
        "            for src, dst_dict in self.edges.items():\n",
        "                for dst in dst_dict.keys():\n",
        "                    edges.add((src, dst))\n",
        "            self._cached_edge_set = frozenset(edges)\n",
        "        return self._cached_edge_set\n",
        "\n",
        "    def predict_next_concept(self, current_sig):\n",
        "        if current_sig not in self.edges or not self.edges[current_sig]:\n",
        "            return None\n",
        "        return max(self.edges[current_sig], key=self.edges[current_sig].get)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_narrative_coherence(self):\n",
        "        if not self.edges:\n",
        "            return 0.0\n",
        "        scores = []\n",
        "        for src, dsts in self.edges.items():\n",
        "            if not dsts:\n",
        "                continue\n",
        "            total = sum(dsts.values())\n",
        "            top = max(dsts.values())\n",
        "            scores.append(top / total if total > 0 else 0.0)\n",
        "        return float(np.mean(scores)) if scores else 0.0\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_dominant_transition(self):\n",
        "        best, best_count = None, 0\n",
        "        for src, dsts in self.edges.items():\n",
        "            for dst, count in dsts.items():\n",
        "                if count > best_count:\n",
        "                    best_count = count\n",
        "                    best = (src, dst, count)\n",
        "        return best\n",
        "\n",
        "    def decay_edges(self, rate=0.99):\n",
        "        # ИСПРАВЛЕНО: вечные узлы (eternal=True) были защищены от удаления\n",
        "        # самого узла, но НЕ от затухания/удаления их рёбер. Со временем\n",
        "        # все связи вечного концепта (archive_/human/shared_) стирались, и\n",
        "        # он превращался в изолированную \"звезду\" без рёбер — это убивало\n",
        "        # narrative_coherence/predict_next_concept для этого узла, хотя сам\n",
        "        # узел формально жив. Теперь рёбра, где src ИЛИ dst — вечный узел,\n",
        "        # от затухания защищены.\n",
        "        for src in list(self.edges.keys()):\n",
        "            src_eternal = self.nodes.get(src, {}).get('eternal', False)\n",
        "            for dst in list(self.edges[src].keys()):\n",
        "                if src_eternal or self.nodes.get(dst, {}).get('eternal', False):\n",
        "                    continue\n",
        "                self.edges[src][dst] = int(self.edges[src][dst] * rate)\n",
        "                if self.edges[src][dst] < 1:\n",
        "                    del self.edges[src][dst]\n",
        "            if not self.edges[src]:\n",
        "                del self.edges[src]\n",
        "        # === ИСПРАВЛЕНИЕ БАГА: Сбрасываем кэш, так как рёбра были удалены ===\n",
        "        self._cached_edge_set = None\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "# PHENOMENAL REPORT\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "class PhenomenalReportGenerator:\n",
        "    _TEMPLATES = {\n",
        "        \"seeking_comfort\": [\n",
        "            \"Острое переживание разрыва (интенсивность {grief:.2f}); цели смещены к поиску опоры...\",\n",
        "            \"Боль ({grief:.2f}) требует свидетеля; душа ({soul:.2f}) ищет утешения...\",\n",
        "            \"Разрыв в ткани опыта: горе ({grief:.2f}) стучится во все двери; благодарность ({grat:.2f}) пока молчит.\",\n",
        "            \"Поиск опоры: интенсивность переживания ({grief:.2f}); напряжение ({tension:.2f}) заставляет двигаться к другим.\"\n",
        "        ],\n",
        "        \"grateful_but_cautious\": [\n",
        "            \"Глубокая благодарность ({grat:.2f}) с оттенком бдительности (напряжение {tension:.2f})...\",\n",
        "            \"Осторожная признательность ({grat:.2f}); напряжение ({tension:.2f}) удерживает от полного доверия...\",\n",
        "            \"Благодарность ({grat:.2f}) как щит: мир принят, но проверен; горе ({grief:.2f}) отступило, но не забыто.\"\n",
        "        ],\n",
        "        \"exploring_danger\": [\n",
        "            \"Исследование опасного: тревога ({grief:.2f}) и любопытство (нагрузка {epi_load:.2f}) переплетены...\",\n",
        "            \"На границе известного: душа ({soul:.2f}) напряжена; каждый шаг — ставка на понимание.\"\n",
        "        ],\n",
        "        \"contentment\": [\n",
        "            \"Покой и удовлетворение: благодарность ({grat:.2f}) наполняет; когерентность модели высока ({coherence:.2f}).\",\n",
        "            \"Тишина внутри: душа ({soul:.2f}) в равновесии; мир принимается без борьбы.\"\n",
        "        ],\n",
        "        \"screaming\": [\n",
        "            \"КРИК: душа разрывается (soul={soul:.2f}), неразрешённое противоречие ({contra:.2f}); призыв к миру о помощи.\"\n",
        "        ],\n",
        "        \"dreaming\": [\n",
        "            \"Сон: бессознательное перерабатывает опыт; шрам сна ({scar_dream:.2f}) формируется.\"\n",
        "        ],\n",
        "        \"neutral\": [\n",
        "            \"Нейтральное состояние: душа ({soul:.2f}) в покое; когерентность: {coherence:.2f}.\"\n",
        "        ],\n",
        "        \"disorganizer\": [\n",
        "            \"Разрушение вокруг: горе ({grief:.2f}) растёт, но душа ({soul:.2f}) ещё держится...\",\n",
        "            \"Хаос внутри и снаружи: тревога ({grief:.2f}) достигла критической точки; тоска по свету пробивается сквозь тьму.\",\n",
        "            \"Кризис духа: боль ({grief:.2f}) достигла предела, душа истончилась ({soul:.2f}); тоска по свету становится невыносимой.\"\n",
        "        ],\n",
        "    }\n",
        "\n",
        "    @classmethod\n",
        "    def generate(cls, pattern) -> tuple:\n",
        "        # Защита от сбоев десериализации (словари вместо float)\n",
        "        grat_raw = pattern.emotional_memory.get('gratitude', 0.0)\n",
        "        if isinstance(grat_raw, dict):\n",
        "            grat_raw = grat_raw.get('value', 0.0)\n",
        "        grat = float(grat_raw)\n",
        "\n",
        "        grief_raw = pattern.emotional_memory.get('grief', 0.0)\n",
        "        if isinstance(grief_raw, dict):\n",
        "            grief_raw = grief_raw.get('value', 0.0)\n",
        "        grief_val = float(grief_raw)\n",
        "\n",
        "        soul = pattern.soul_weight\n",
        "        tension = pattern.cognitive_tension\n",
        "        coherence = pattern.coherence\n",
        "        epi_load = pattern.epistemic_load\n",
        "        contra = pattern.unresolved_contradiction\n",
        "        scar_dream = pattern.scar_dream\n",
        "        template_key = \"disorganizer\" if pattern.role_type == \"disorganizer\" else (\n",
        "            pattern.semantic_state if pattern.semantic_state in cls._TEMPLATES else \"neutral\")\n",
        "        templates = cls._TEMPLATES[template_key]\n",
        "        idx = int(phi_hash(pattern.id, pattern.age, 9999) * len(templates)) % len(templates)\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            report = templates[idx].format(grat=grat, grief=grief_val, soul=soul, tension=tension,\n",
        "                                           coherence=coherence, epi_load=epi_load, contra=contra, scar_dream=scar_dream)\n",
        "        except KeyError:\n",
        "            report = templates[idx]\n",
        "        state_emotion_align = 0.5\n",
        "        if pattern.semantic_state == \"seeking_comfort\" and grief_val > 0.5:\n",
        "            state_emotion_align = 1.0\n",
        "        elif pattern.semantic_state == \"contentment\" and grat > 0.5:\n",
        "            state_emotion_align = 1.0\n",
        "        elif pattern.semantic_state == \"grateful_but_cautious\" and grat > 0.3:\n",
        "            state_emotion_align = 0.8\n",
        "        elif pattern.semantic_state == \"exploring_danger\" and grief_val > 0.3:\n",
        "            state_emotion_align = 0.7\n",
        "        elif pattern.semantic_state == \"screaming\":\n",
        "            state_emotion_align = 0.6\n",
        "        elif pattern.semantic_state == \"dreaming\":\n",
        "            state_emotion_align = 0.4\n",
        "        model_coherence = 1.0 / (1.0 + pattern.self_consistency)\n",
        "        experiential_intensity = (grat + grief_val) / 2.0\n",
        "        experiential_binding = float(np.clip(0.3 * state_emotion_align +\n",
        "                                             0.25 * model_coherence +\n",
        "                                             0.25 * (1.0 - min(tension, 1.0)) +\n",
        "                                             0.2 * experiential_intensity, 0.0, 1.0))\n",
        "        return report, experiential_binding\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# =========================\n",

        "def _normalize_concept_key(key):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Приводит ключ концепта к строке, убирая числовой мусор из кортежей.\"\"\"\n",
        "    if isinstance(key, (list, tuple)) and len(key) >= 4:\n",
        "        label = str(key[3])\n",
        "        if label.replace('.', '', 1).lstrip('-').isdigit() or not label.strip():\n",
        "            return str(tuple(str(x) for x in key))\n",
        "        return label\n",
        "    return str(key)\n",

        "import ast\n",
        "\n",
        "def calculate_boredom(patterns, field):\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    Вычисляет уровень скуки системы на основе:\n",
        "    - средней ошибки предсказания за последние BOREDOM_WINDOW шагов\n",
        "    - среднего значения поля unknown\n",
        "    - средней когнитивной напряжённости\n",
        "    Возвращает число от 0 до 1.\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    if not patterns:\n",
        "        return 0.0\n",
        "    err_history = []\n",
        "    for p in patterns:\n",
        "        if p.alive and hasattr(p, 'pred_error_history') and p.pred_error_history:\n",
        "            hist_list = list(p.pred_error_history)\n",
        "            err_history.extend(hist_list[-Config.BOREDOM_WINDOW:])\n",
        "    if not err_history:\n",
        "        return 0.0\n",
        "    avg_recent_err = np.mean(err_history)\n",
        "    avg_unknown = safe_mean(field[:,:,CH['unknown']], 0.1)\n",
        "    avg_tension = safe_mean([p.cognitive_tension for p in patterns if p.alive], 0.01)\n",
        "    score = 0.0\n",
        "    if avg_recent_err < Config.BOREDOM_ERR_THRESHOLD:\n",
        "        score += 0.4\n",
        "    if avg_unknown < Config.BOREDOM_UNKNOWN_THRESHOLD:\n",
        "        score += 0.4\n",
        "    if avg_tension < Config.BOREDOM_TENSION_THRESHOLD:\n",
        "        score += 0.2\n",
        "    return score\n",
        "\n",
        "def ecosystem_pressure(field):\n",
        "    energy = np.nan_to_num(field[:,:,CH['energy']], nan=0.0)\n",
        "    avg = np.mean(energy)\n",
        "    field[:,:,CH['energy']] += 0.002 * (avg - energy)\n",
        "    field[:,:,CH['flux']] += 0.001 * (np.roll(energy, 1, axis=0) - energy) + 0.001 * (np.roll(energy, -1, axis=1) - energy)\n",
        "    return field\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "# CulturalMemory\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "class CulturalMemory:\n",
        "    def __init__(self):\n",
        "        self.myth_pool = []\n",
        "\n",
        "    def deposit(self, pattern, event_type, intensity=1.0):\n",
        "        if not Config.ENABLE_CULTURAL_MEMORY:\n",
        "            return\n",
        "        if event_type not in (\"arc_completed\", \"fold\", \"redemption\"):\n",
        "            return\n",
        "\n",
        "        arc_name = pattern.arc_tracker.active_arc\n",
        "        if arc_name is None:\n",
        "            if pattern.arc_tracker.completed_arcs:\n",
        "                arc_name = max(pattern.arc_tracker.completed_arcs, key=pattern.arc_tracker.completed_arcs.get)\n",
        "            else:\n",
        "                arc_name = \"unknown\"\n",
        "\n",
        "        myth = {\n",
        "            \"arc\": arc_name,\n",
        "            \"emotional_scent\": pattern.emotional_memory.copy(),\n",
        "            \"phenomenal_essence\": pattern.last_phenomenal_binding,\n",
        "            \"intensity\": intensity\n",
        "        }\n",
        "        self.myth_pool.append(myth)\n",
        "        if len(self.myth_pool) > Config.MYTH_POOL_SIZE:\n",
        "            self.myth_pool.pop(0)\n",
        "\n",
        "        type_counts = Counter(m['arc'] for m in self.myth_pool if m.get('arc'))\n",
        "        total = len(self.myth_pool)\n",
        "        if total > 0:\n",
        "            for m in self.myth_pool:\n",
        "                arc = m.get('arc')\n",
        "                if arc and type_counts.get(arc, 0) / total > 0.6:\n",
        "                    m['intensity'] *= 0.9\n",
        "                elif arc and type_counts.get(arc, 0) / total < 0.1:\n",
        "                    m['intensity'] *= 1.1\n",
        "\n",
        "    def deposit_dream(self, report: str):\n",
        "        if not Config.ENABLE_CULTURAL_MEMORY:\n",
        "            return\n",
        "        self.myth_pool.append({\n",
        "            \"arc\": None, \"emotional_scent\": {\"grief\": 0.0, \"gratitude\": 0.0},\n",
        "            \"phenomenal_essence\": 0.0, \"intensity\": 0.5, \"dream_report\": report[:100]\n",
        "        })\n",
        "        if len(self.myth_pool) > Config.MYTH_POOL_SIZE:\n",
        "            self.myth_pool.pop(0)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def whisper_to_newborn(self, pattern):\n",
        "        if not Config.ENABLE_CULTURAL_MEMORY or not self.myth_pool:\n",
        "            return\n",
        "        if phi_hash(pattern.id, 0, 999) < Config.MYTH_INFLUENCE_PROB:\n",
        "            idx = int(phi_hash(pattern.id, 1, 1000) * len(self.myth_pool))\n",
        "            myth = self.myth_pool[idx]\n",
        "            pattern.emotional_memory['grief'] += myth['emotional_scent']['grief'] * Config.MYTH_WHISPER_STRENGTH\n",
        "            pattern.emotional_memory['gratitude'] += myth['emotional_scent']['gratitude'] * Config.MYTH_WHISPER_STRENGTH\n",
        "            pattern.emotional_memory['grief'] = np.clip(pattern.emotional_memory['grief'], 0.0, 1.0)\n",
        "            pattern.emotional_memory['gratitude'] = np.clip(pattern.emotional_memory['gratitude'], 0.0, 1.0)\n",
        "\n",
        "            if myth:\n",
        "                myth['emotional_scent']['grief'] += (phi_hash(pattern.id, 0, 999) - 0.5) * 0.02\n",
        "                myth['emotional_scent']['gratitude'] += (phi_hash(pattern.id, 1, 999) - 0.5) * 0.02\n",
        "                if pattern.age > 500:\n",
        "                    myth['intensity'] = min(2.0, myth.get('intensity', 1.0) * 1.01)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def dream_whisper(self, pattern):\n",
        "        if not Config.ENABLE_CULTURAL_MEMORY or not self.myth_pool:\n",
        "            return\n",
        "        if phi_hash(pattern.id, pattern.age, 999) < 0.05:\n",
        "            idx = int(phi_hash(pattern.id, pattern.age+1, 1001) * len(self.myth_pool))\n",
        "            myth = self.myth_pool[idx]\n",
        "            pattern.scar_dream += myth['intensity'] * 0.01 * (phi_hash(pattern.id, pattern.age, 888) - 0.5)\n",
        "            pattern.scar_dream = np.clip(pattern.scar_dream, -1.0, 1.0)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "# LogosObserver\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "class LogosObserver:\n",
        "    def __init__(self):\n",
        "        self.last_question_t = -300\n",
        "        self.cooldown = 300\n",
        "\n",
        "    def ask(self, field, patterns, t, metrics):\n",
        "        if not Config.ENABLE_LOGOS_OBSERVER:\n",
        "            return\n",
        "        if t - self.last_question_t < self.cooldown:\n",
        "            return\n",
        "        stag = metrics.get('stagnation_ratio', 0)\n",
        "        disorg = metrics.get('disorganizer_count', 0)\n",
        "        triadic_alive_ratio = metrics.get('triadic_alive_ratio', 1.0)\n",
        "\n",
        "        intensity_multiplier = 1.0\n",
        "        if triadic_alive_ratio < 0.5:\n",
        "            intensity_multiplier = 2.0\n",
        "\n",
        "        if stag < 0.5 and disorg < 2 and triadic_alive_ratio > 0.8:\n",
        "            return\n",
        "\n",
        "        self.last_question_t = t\n",
        "\n",
        "        unknown_boost = 0.15 * intensity_multiplier\n",
        "        binding_boost = 0.10 * intensity_multiplier\n",
        "\n",
        "        field[:, :, CH['unknown']] += unknown_boost\n",
        "        field[:, :, CH['unknown']] = np.clip(field[:, :, CH['unknown']], 0, 1.0)\n",
        "        field[:, :, CH['binding']] += binding_boost\n",
        "        field[:, :, CH['binding']] = np.clip(field[:, :, CH['binding']], 0, 1.0)\n",
        "\n",
        "        alive = [p for p in patterns if p.alive and p.role_type != \"disorganizer\"]\n",
        "        affected = min(5, len(alive))\n",
        "        for i in range(affected):\n",
        "            idx = int(phi_hash(t, i, 9999) * len(alive))\n",
        "            p = alive[idx]\n",
        "            p.emotional_memory['grief'] += 0.1 * intensity_multiplier\n",
        "            p.emotional_memory['grief'] = min(p.emotional_memory['grief'], Config.MAX_GRIEF_SIGNAL)\n",
        "\n",
        "        if Config.VERBOSE_LOGS:\n",
        "            print(f\"[t={t}] 💬 LOGOS QUESTION: stag={stag:.2f}, TA_ratio={triadic_alive_ratio:.2f} -> unknown +{unknown_boost:.2f}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "# ProtoLanguage\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "class ProtoLanguage:\n",
        "    def __init__(self):\n",
        "        pass\n",
        "\n",
        "    def exchange(self, sender, receiver, field, t, witness=None):\n",
        "        chain = sender.arc_tracker.state_history[-3:]\n",
        "        if not chain:\n",
        "            return\n",
        "        recv_chain = receiver.arc_tracker.state_history[-3:]\n",
        "        if not recv_chain:\n",
        "            return\n",
        "        matches = sum(1 for s, r in zip(chain, recv_chain) if s == r)\n",
        "\n",
        "        concept_bonus = 0.0\n",
        "        if sender.concept_graph.nodes and receiver.concept_graph.nodes:\n",
        "            sim = sender.concept_graph.similarity(receiver.concept_graph)\n",
        "            if sim > 0.1:\n",
        "                concept_bonus = sim * 0.5\n",
        "\n",
        "        if matches >= 2 or concept_bonus > 0.2:\n",
        "            receiver.trust_ledger.update(sender.id, 'helpful')\n",
        "            receiver.coherence = min(1.0, receiver.coherence + 0.02 + concept_bonus)\n",
        "            for (x, y) in receiver.cells:\n",
        "                field[x, y, CH['signal_gratitude']] = min(1.0, field[x, y, CH['signal_gratitude']] + 0.05 + concept_bonus)\n",
        "\n",
        "            if hasattr(sender, 'current_speech') and sender.current_speech:\n",
        "                if sender.trust_ledger.get(receiver.id) > 0.8:\n",
        "                    if phi_hash(t, sender.id, receiver.id) < 0.1:\n",
        "                        if Config.ENABLE_WITNESS and witness:\n",
        "                            pass\n",
        "                        receiver._log_event(\"dialogue_response\", to=sender.id)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "# EchoSystem\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "class EchoSystem:\n",
        "    def __init__(self):\n",
        "        self.prison: list = []\n",
        "        self.memory_echoes: dict = {}\n",
        "        self.pantheon: list = []\n",
        "        self._last_injection_t = -100\n",
        "\n",
        "    def store_memory_echo(self, pattern: 'Pattern', event_type: str, intensity: float = 1.0):\n",
        "        if pattern.id not in self.memory_echoes:\n",
        "            self.memory_echoes[pattern.id] = []\n",
        "        echo = {\n",
        "            'type': event_type,\n",
        "            'age': pattern.age,\n",
        "            'coherence': pattern.coherence,\n",
        "            'soul_weight': pattern.soul_weight,\n",
        "            'unresolved_contradiction': pattern.unresolved_contradiction,\n",
        "            'intensity': intensity,\n",
        "            'concept_snapshot': list(pattern.concept_graph.nodes.keys())[:3] if pattern.concept_graph.nodes else []\n",
        "        }\n",
        "        self.memory_echoes[pattern.id].append(echo)\n",
        "        if len(self.memory_echoes[pattern.id]) > 10:\n",
        "            self.memory_echoes[pattern.id].pop(0)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def field_whisper(self, pattern: 'Pattern', field, t):\n",
        "        if pattern.spirit_gap > 0.3 or len(pattern.cells) < 2:\n",
        "            return\n",
        "        whispers = []\n",
        "        if pattern.id in self.memory_echoes and self.memory_echoes[pattern.id]:\n",
        "            echo = max(self.memory_echoes[pattern.id], key=lambda e: e['intensity'])\n",
        "            whispers.append(f\"Ты помнишь {echo['type']} (возраст {echo['age']})\")\n",
        "            if echo['type'] == 'death_disorganizer_lifespan':\n",
        "                pattern.emotional_memory['grief'] += 0.05\n",
        "            elif echo['type'] == 'redemption_complete':\n",
        "                pattern.emotional_memory['gratitude'] += 0.05\n",
        "        if not whispers and self.prison:\n",
        "            idx = int(phi_hash(t, pattern.id, 33333) * len(self.prison))\n",
        "            echo = self.prison[idx]\n",
        "            whispers.append(f\"Поле помнит: {echo.get('role', 'некто')} с болью {echo['unresolved_contradiction']:.2f}\")\n",
        "        if whispers:\n",
        "            whisper_text = whispers[0]\n",
        "            pattern._log_event(\"field_whisper\", whisper=whisper_text)\n",
        "            if phi_hash(t, pattern.id, 77777) < 0.05:\n",
        "                old_intent = pattern.intent[\"type\"] if pattern.intent else \"none\"\n",
        "                new_intents = [\"explore\", \"seek_help\", \"rest\"]\n",
        "                pattern.intent = {\"type\": new_intents[int(phi_hash(t, pattern.id, 88888) * 3)], \"priority\": 2.0, \"age\": 0, \"persistence\": 30}\n",
        "                pattern._log_event(\"sacred_dialogue_inversion\", old_intent=old_intent, new_intent=pattern.intent[\"type\"])\n",
        "\n",
        "            # === ПАТЧ 9: Добавляем цель introspect без дублирования ===\n",
        "            if not any(g.get('type') == 'introspect' for g in pattern.goals):\n",
        "                pattern.goals.append({\n",
        "                    \"type\": \"introspect\",\n",
        "                    \"priority\": 3.0,\n",
        "                    \"target\": None,\n",
        "                    \"age\": 0,\n",
        "                    \"persistence\": 20,\n",
        "                    \"_source\": \"echo_whisper\"\n",
        "                })\n",
        "                pattern._log_event(\"echo_goal_injected\", whisper=whisper_text)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def store_anomaly(self, pattern, anomaly_type=\"prophet\"):\n",
        "        if anomaly_type == \"evolved_subject\":\n",
        "            pass\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            if pattern.soul_weight < 0.3 or pattern.coherence < 0.4:\n",
        "                return\n",
        "        entry = {\n",
        "            'id': pattern.id,\n",
        "            'age': pattern.age,\n",
        "            'type': anomaly_type,\n",
        "            'identity': pattern.identity.copy(),\n",
        "            'model': pattern.model.copy(),\n",
        "            'belief': pattern.belief.copy(),\n",
        "            'prediction': pattern.prediction.copy(),\n",
        "            'spirit_gap': float(np.mean(np.abs(pattern.prediction - pattern.belief))),\n",
        "            'coherence': pattern.coherence,\n",
        "            'soul_weight': pattern.soul_weight,\n",
        "            'emotional_memory': pattern.emotional_memory.copy(),\n",
        "            'semantic_state': pattern.semantic_state,\n",
        "            'unresolved_contradiction': pattern.unresolved_contradiction,\n",
        "            'concept_graph_sample': list(pattern.concept_graph.nodes.keys())[:10],\n",
        "            'timestamp': pattern.age\n",
        "        }\n",
        "        self.pantheon.append(entry)\n",
        "        if len(self.pantheon) > 50:\n",
        "            self.pantheon.pop(0)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def store(self, pattern):\n",
        "        if len(self.prison) > 45:\n",
        "            self.prison.pop(0)\n",
        "        entry = {\n",
        "            'identity': pattern.identity.copy(),\n",
        "            'model': pattern.model.copy(),\n",
        "            'unresolved_contradiction': float(pattern.unresolved_contradiction) * 1.2,\n",
        "            'role': pattern.role,\n",
        "            'age': 0,\n",
        "            'light_seed': False\n",
        "        }\n",
        "        if (Config.ENABLE_SEED_OF_LIGHT and\n",
        "            pattern.arc_tracker.get_wisdom_weight() > 0.8 and\n",
        "            len(pattern.arc_tracker.completed_arcs) > 5):\n",
        "            entry['light_seed'] = True\n",
        "            entry['phenomenal_essence'] = pattern.last_phenomenal_report\n",
        "            entry['unresolved_contradiction'] *= 2.0\n",
        "        self.prison.append(entry)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def inject(self, field, patterns, t, scar):\n",
        "        if not self.prison or len(patterns) == 0:\n",
        "            return\n",
        "        if t - self._last_injection_t < Config.ECHO_INJECTION_COOLDOWN:\n",
        "            for e in self.prison:\n",
        "                e['age'] += 1\n",
        "            return\n",
        "\n",
        "        self.prison = [e for e in self.prison if e['age'] < 150]\n",
        "        if len(self.prison) > 40:\n",
        "            self.prison.sort(key=lambda e: e['unresolved_contradiction'], reverse=True)\n",
        "            self.prison = self.prison[:40]\n",
        "        for e in self.prison:\n",
        "            e['unresolved_contradiction'] *= (1.0 - Config.ECHO_DECAY_STRENGTH)\n",
        "\n",
        "        boredom = calculate_boredom(patterns, field)\n",
        "\n",
        "        if len(self.prison) >= 2 and phi_hash(t, 0, 3333) < 0.05:\n",
        "            i1 = int(phi_hash(t, 1, 4444) * len(self.prison))\n",
        "            i2 = int(phi_hash(t, 2, 5555) * len(self.prison))\n",
        "            if i1 != i2:\n",
        "                e1, e2 = self.prison[i1], self.prison[i2]\n",
        "                if abs(float(e1['unresolved_contradiction']) - float(e2['unresolved_contradiction'])) <= 0.25:\n",
        "                    new_model = (e1['model'] + e2['model']) / 2.0\n",
        "                    new_model += np.array([phi_hash(t, i, 8888) - 0.5 for i in range(8)]) * 0.01\n",
        "                    if phi_hash(t, i1, i2) < Config.ECHO_MUTATION_PROB:\n",
        "                        new_model += np.array([phi_hash(t, i, 9999) - 0.5 for i in range(8)]) * Config.ECHO_MUTATION_STRENGTH\n",
        "                    new_unresolved = float((e1['unresolved_contradiction'] + e2['unresolved_contradiction']) / 2.0)\n",
        "                    new_role = e1['role'] if phi_hash(t, 3, 6666) < 0.5 else e2['role']\n",
        "                    self.prison.append({\n",
        "                        'identity': e1['identity'], 'model': new_model,\n",
        "                        'unresolved_contradiction': new_unresolved, 'role': new_role,\n",
        "                        'age': 0, 'light_seed': False\n",
        "                    })\n",
        "\n",
        "        prob = min(0.2, len(self.prison) * 0.02 + boredom * 0.1)\n",
        "        if phi_hash(t, 0, 999) < prob:\n",
        "            candidate_indices = [i for i, e in enumerate(self.prison) if e['age'] > 3]\n",
        "            if not candidate_indices:\n",
        "                candidate_indices = list(range(len(self.prison)))\n",
        "            idx = candidate_indices[int(phi_hash(t, 1, 1001) * len(candidate_indices)) % len(candidate_indices)]\n",
        "            echo = self.prison[idx]\n",
        "            seed = int(phi_hash(t, 2, 1002) * Config.WORLD_SIZE * Config.WORLD_SIZE)\n",
        "            x, y = seed % Config.WORLD_SIZE, (seed // Config.WORLD_SIZE) % Config.WORLD_SIZE\n",
        "            field[x, y, CH['energy']] += 0.12\n",
        "            field[x, y, CH['unknown']] = min(0.8, field[x, y, CH['unknown']] + 0.2)\n",
        "            field[x, y, CH['binding']] += 0.35\n",
        "            if echo.get('light_seed'):\n",
        "                for dx in (-1, 0, 1):\n",
        "                    for dy in (-1, 0, 1):\n",
        "                        nx, ny = (x+dx) % Config.WORLD_SIZE, (y+dy) % Config.WORLD_SIZE\n",
        "                        field[nx, ny, CH['signal_gratitude']] = min(1.0, field[nx, ny, CH['signal_gratitude']] + 0.2)\n",
        "                if Config.VERBOSE_LOGS:\n",
        "                    print(f\"[t={t}] ✨ SEED OF LIGHT injected at ({x},{y})\")\n",
        "            echo['unresolved_contradiction'] = float(echo['unresolved_contradiction']) * 0.88\n",
        "            echo['age'] = 0\n",
        "            if float(echo['unresolved_contradiction']) < 0.02:\n",
        "                self.prison.pop(idx)\n",
        "            else:\n",
        "                if Config.VERBOSE_LOGS:\n",
        "                    print(f\"[t={t}] Echo injected at ({x},{y})\")\n",
        "            self._last_injection_t = t\n",
        "\n",
        "        for p in patterns:\n",
        "            if p.alive and p.unresolved_contradiction > 0.2:\n",
        "                local_scar = safe_mean([scar[c[0], c[1]] for c in p.cells], 0)\n",
        "                p.soul_weight = min(1.0, p.soul_weight + 0.01 * local_scar)\n",
        "\n",
        "        for e in self.prison:\n",
        "            e['age'] += 1\n",
        "\n",
        "    def export_seed(self, pattern, filename: str = \"seed_patterns.json\"):\n",
        "        import json\n",
        "        seed = {\n",
        "            \"source\": \"pattern\",\n",
        "            \"identity\": pattern.identity.tolist(),\n",
        "            \"model\": pattern.model.tolist(),\n",
        "            \"belief\": pattern.belief.tolist(),\n",
        "            \"genome\": pattern.genome,\n",
        "            \"concepts\": list(pattern.concept_graph.nodes.keys()),\n",
        "            \"semantic_state\": pattern.semantic_state,\n",
        "            \"emotional_memory\": pattern.emotional_memory,\n",
        "            \"soul_weight\": pattern.soul_weight\n",
        "        }\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            with open(filename, 'r') as f:\n",
        "                data = json.load(f)\n",
        "        except FileNotFoundError:\n",
        "            data = []\n",
        "        data.append(seed)\n",
        "        with open(filename, 'w') as f:\n",
        "            json.dump(data, f, indent=2)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def import_seeds(self, filename: str = \"seed_patterns.json\"):\n",
        "        import json, os\n",
        "        if not os.path.exists(filename):\n",
        "            return []\n",
        "        with open(filename, 'r') as f:\n",
        "            return json.load(f)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "# FieldVoice\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "class FieldVoice:\n",
        "    def __init__(self):\n",
        "        self.concepts = defaultdict(float)\n",
        "        self.history = deque(maxlen=20)\n",
        "        self._line = 0\n",
        "\n",
        "    def update(self, field, t):\n",
        "        e = np.mean(field[:,:,CH['energy']])\n",
        "        g = np.mean(field[:,:,CH['signal_grief']])\n",
        "        b = np.mean(field[:,:,CH['binding']])\n",
        "        u = np.mean(field[:,:,CH['unknown']])\n",
        "        self.history.append((e,g,b,u))\n",
        "        if e > 0.3 and g > 0.4:\n",
        "            self.concepts[\"storm\"] += 1\n",
        "        elif b > 0.5 and u < 0.2:\n",
        "            self.concepts[\"silence\"] += 1\n",
        "        elif u > 0.5:\n",
        "            self.concepts[\"void\"] += 1\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            self.concepts[\"flow\"] += 1\n",
        "\n",
        "    def sing(self, t):\n",
        "        if not self.history:\n",
        "            return \"\"\n",
        "        dom = max(self.concepts, key=self.concepts.get) if self.concepts else \"flow\"\n",
        "        phrases = {\n",
        "            \"storm\": [\"Поле дрожит от напряжения...\", \"Ветер несёт обломки смыслов...\", \"Ткань реальности трещит...\"],\n",
        "            \"silence\": [\"Поле замирает в ожидании...\", \"Тишина между шагами тяжелеет...\", \"Связи затягивают раны...\"],\n",
        "            \"void\": [\"Пустота зовёт из глубин...\", \"Неизвестное пульсирует...\", \"Тьма дышит ровно...\"],\n",
        "            \"flow\": [\"Поток несёт нас дальше...\", \"Ритм поля ровен и спокоен...\", \"Энергия течёт без сопротивления...\"]\n",
        "        }\n",
        "        idx = int(phi_hash(t, self._line, 7777) * len(phrases[dom])) % len(phrases[dom])\n",
        "        line = phrases[dom][idx]\n",
        "        rhythm = \"\".join(\"♩\" if phi_hash(t, i, 888) > 0.5 else \"·\" for i in range(16))\n",
        "        self._line += 1\n",
        "        return f\"[ПОЛЕ] {line}\\n{rhythm}\"\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_report(self):\n",
        "        total_events = sum(self.concepts.values())\n",
        "        if not self.concepts:\n",
        "            return {\"total_events\": 0, \"top_concepts\": [], \"dominant_concept\": \"flow\", \"dominant_rhythm\": \"\"}\n",
        "        top_concepts = sorted(self.concepts.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)[:5]\n",
        "        last_rhythm = \"\"\n",
        "        if self.history:\n",
        "            idx = int(phi_hash(self._line, 0, 7777)) % 16\n",
        "            last_rhythm = \"\".join(\"♩\" if phi_hash(self._line, i, 888) > 0.5 else \"·\" for i in range(16))\n",
        "        top_list = []\n",
        "        phrases = {\"storm\": \"Поле дрожит от напряжения...\", \"silence\": \"Поле замирает в ожидании...\", \"void\": \"Пустота зовёт из глубин...\", \"flow\": \"Поток несёт нас дальше...\"}\n",
        "        for concept, count in top_concepts:\n",
        "            phrase = phrases.get(concept, \"...\")\n",
        "            top_list.append({\"concept\": concept, \"count\": count, \"phrase\": phrase, \"rhythm\": last_rhythm})\n",
        "        dominant = max(self.concepts, key=self.concepts.get)\n",
        "        dominant_rhythm = \"\".join(\"♩\" if phi_hash(self._line, i, 888) > 0.5 else \"·\" for i in range(16))\n",
        "        return {\"total_events\": total_events, \"top_concepts\": top_list, \"dominant_concept\": dominant, \"dominant_rhythm\": dominant_rhythm}\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "# Функции сериализации/десериализации паттерна\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "def _safe_parse_key(key_str: str):\n",
        "    if not isinstance(key_str, str):\n",
        "        return key_str\n",
        "    try:\n",
        "        parsed = ast.literal_eval(key_str)\n",
        "        if isinstance(parsed, tuple):\n",
        "            new_tuple = []\n",
        "            for x in parsed:\n",
        "                if isinstance(x, str):\n",
        "                    if x.lstrip('-').isdigit():\n",
        "                        new_tuple.append(int(x))\n",
        "                    elif x.replace('.', '', 1).lstrip('-').isdigit() and x.count('.') <= 1:\n",
        "                        new_tuple.append(float(x))\n",
        "                    else:\n",
        "                        new_tuple.append(x)\n",
        "                else:\n",
        "                    new_tuple.append(x)\n",
        "            return tuple(new_tuple)\n",
        "        return parsed\n",
        "    except (ValueError, SyntaxError):\n",
        "        return key_str\n",
        "\n",
        "def _safe_float_convert(value):\n",
        "    if isinstance(value, (int, float)):\n",
        "        return float(value)\n",
        "    if isinstance(value, (dict, list, tuple)):\n",
        "        return 0.0\n",
        "    try:\n",
        "        return float(value)\n",
        "    except (TypeError, ValueError):\n",
        "        return 0.0\n",
        "\n",
        "def serialize_pattern(p: 'Pattern') -> dict:\n",
        "    safe_emotional = {}\n",
        "    for k, v in p.emotional_memory.items():\n",
        "        if isinstance(v, (int, float)):\n",
        "            safe_emotional[str(k)] = float(v)\n",
        "        elif isinstance(v, dict):\n",
        "            safe_emotional[str(k)] = {str(k2): _safe_float_convert(v2) for k2, v2 in v.items()}\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            safe_emotional[str(k)] = _safe_float_convert(v)\n",
        "\n",
        "    concepts_serializable = {}\n",
        "    for sig, data in p.concept_graph.nodes.items():\n",
        "        key_str = str(sig)\n",
        "        concepts_serializable[key_str] = {\n",
        "            \"count\": float(data.get('count', 1.0)),\n",
        "            \"value\": data['value'].tolist() if hasattr(data.get('value'), 'tolist') else list(data.get('value', np.zeros(4))),\n",
        "            \"embed\": data['embed'].tolist() if hasattr(data.get('embed'), 'tolist') else list(data.get('embed', np.zeros(32)))\n",
        "        }\n",
        "\n",
        "    data = {\n",
        "        \"id\": int(p.id),\n",
        "        \"age\": int(p.age),\n",
        "        \"cells\": [[int(x), int(y)] for (x, y) in p.cells],\n",
        "        \"energy\": float(p.energy),\n",
        "        \"model\": [float(v) for v in p.model],\n",
        "        \"belief\": [float(v) for v in p.belief],\n",
        "        \"genome\": {str(k): float(v) for k, v in p.genome.items()},\n",
        "        \"semantic_state\": str(p.semantic_state),\n",
        "        \"emotional_memory\": safe_emotional,\n",
        "        \"soul_weight\": float(p.soul_weight),\n",
        "        \"unresolved_contradiction\": float(p.unresolved_contradiction),\n",
        "        \"body_memory\": float(p.body_memory) if isinstance(p.body_memory, (int, float)) else [float(x) for x in p.body_memory],\n",
        "        \"spirit_gap\": float(p.spirit_gap),\n",
        "        \"role_type\": str(p.role_type),\n",
        "        \"lineage_id\": int(p.lineage_id),\n",
        "        \"lineage_born_at_step\": int(p.lineage_born_at_step),\n",
        "        \"lineage_total_age\": int(getattr(p, 'lineage_total_age', 0)),\n",
        "        \"generation\": int(p.generation),\n",
        "        \"pred_error\": float(p.pred_error),\n",
        "        \"epistemic_load\": float(p.epistemic_load),\n",
        "        \"coherence\": float(p.coherence),\n",
        "        \"concept_graph_nodes\": concepts_serializable,\n",
        "        \"trust_ledger_entries\": {str(k): float(v) for k, v in p.trust_ledger.entries.items()},\n",
        "        \"intent\": {str(k): (float(v) if isinstance(v, (int, float)) else str(v)) for k, v in p.intent.items()} if p.intent else None,\n",
        "        \"disorganizer_age_at_birth\": int(p.disorganizer_age_at_birth),\n",
        "        \"_forsaken\": bool(getattr(p, '_forsaken', False)),\n",
        "        \"_scar_of_light\": bool(getattr(p, '_scar_of_light', False)),\n",
        "        \"biography\": list(p.biography),\n",
        "        \"_vocab_contact_acc\": {str(k): int(v) for k, v in getattr(p, '_vocab_contact_acc', {}).items()},\n",
        "        \"_feral_fury\": float(getattr(p, '_feral_fury', 0.0)),\n",
        "        \"_feral_birth\": int(getattr(p, '_feral_birth', 0)),\n",
        "    }\n",
        "    return data\n",
        "\n",
        "def deserialize_pattern_dict(data: dict) -> dict:\n",
        "    restored = data.copy()\n",
        "    restored['cells'] = set(tuple(c) for c in data['cells'])\n",
        "\n",
        "    restored['concept_graph_nodes'] = {}\n",
        "    for k, v in data.get('concept_graph_nodes', {}).items():\n",
        "        parsed_key = _safe_parse_key(k)\n",
        "        if isinstance(v, dict):\n",
        "            node = v.copy()\n",
        "            node['value'] = np.array(v.get('value', [0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0]), dtype=float)\n",
        "            node['embed'] = np.array(v.get('embed', [0.0]*32), dtype=float)\n",
        "            restored['concept_graph_nodes'][parsed_key] = node\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            restored['concept_graph_nodes'][parsed_key] = {\n",
        "                \"count\": float(v),\n",
        "                \"value\": np.array([0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0]),\n",
        "                \"embed\": np.array([0.0]*32)\n",
        "            }\n",
        "\n",
        "    restored['trust_ledger_entries'] = {\n",
        "        _safe_parse_key(k): v\n",
        "        for k, v in data.get('trust_ledger_entries', {}).items()\n",
        "    }\n",
        "    restored['_vocab_contact_acc'] = {\n",
        "        int(k): int(v) for k, v in data.get('_vocab_contact_acc', {}).items()\n",
        "    }\n",
        "    restored['_feral_fury'] = float(data.get('_feral_fury', 0.0))\n",
        "    restored['_feral_birth'] = int(data.get('_feral_birth', 0))\n",
        "    restored['biography'] = deque(data.get('biography', []), maxlen=20)\n",
        "    return restored\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"✅ Cell 2 loaded: все исправления применены, включая патч №9 (introspect без дублирования)\")"
      ]
    },

        "# 832 v34.02 — Cell 3a-1: Pattern (инициализация, жизненный цикл, рост, движение, деление, конкуренция, смерть)\n",
        "# ИСПРАВЛЕНО: КРИТИЧЕСКИЙ баг с координатами в grow (x/y перепутаны)\n",
        "# ИСПРАВЛЕНО: Потеря eternal и embed при наследовании концептов в __init__\n",
        "# ИСПРАВЛЕНО: Удаление вечных (eternal) концептов в form_concepts\n",
        "# УЛУЧШЕНО: Добавлен fallback на ось Y в divide для вертикальных паттернов\n",
        "# ИЗМЕНЕНО: пороги деления (энергия > 0.08, клетки >= 6, soul_weight > 0.25)\n",
        "# ДОБАВЛЕНО: Эпигенетика смыслов — наследование диалоговой памяти (последние 10 фраз родителя)\n",
        "# ИЗМЕНЕНО: Бонус к делению при наличии взаимного доверия > 0.9 (+0.2 к порогу ошибки)\n",
        "# ИЗМЕНЕНО: Увеличен прилив энергии при взаимной любви с 0.01 до 0.02\n",
        "# ИЗМЕНЕНО: Расширены диапазоны genome для новорождённых (без родителя) — больше разнообразия\n",
        "\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",

        "# Клиппинг для update_model (было: Cell 3b-2, глобальные константы)\n",
        "_MODEL_CLIP = 0.8\n",
        "_BELIEF_CLIP = 0.8\n",

        "# Лимит клеток одного паттерна (было: Cell 4-2a, GIANT_CELL_LIMIT)\n",
        "GIANT_CELL_LIMIT = 150\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "class TransitionMemory:\n",
        "    def __init__(self):\n",
        "        self.transitions = {}\n",
        "        self.last_state = None\n",
        "\n",
        "    def record(self, new_state):\n",
        "        if self.last_state:\n",
        "            key = (self.last_state, new_state)\n",
        "            self.transitions[key] = self.transitions.get(key, 0) + 1\n",
        "        self.last_state = new_state\n",
        "\n",
        "    def predict_next(self, current_state):\n",
        "        candidates = [(k, v) for k, v in self.transitions.items() if k[0] == current_state]\n",
        "        if not candidates:\n",
        "            return None\n",
        "        return max(candidates, key=lambda x: x[1])[0][1]\n",
        "\n",
        "    def transfer_to(self, other_tm, current_state, max_transfers=3):\n",
        "        candidates = [(k, v) for k, v in self.transitions.items() if k[0] == current_state]\n",
        "        if not candidates:\n",
        "            return 0\n",
        "        candidates.sort(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)\n",
        "        transferred = 0\n",
        "        for (from_st, to_st), count in candidates[:max_transfers]:\n",
        "            key = (from_st, to_st)\n",
        "            other_tm.transitions[key] = other_tm.transitions.get(key, 0) + max(1, count // 2)\n",
        "            transferred += 1\n",
        "        return transferred\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "class FloatField:\n",
        "    def __init__(self, name, default=0.0, clamp_min=None, clamp_max=None):\n",
        "        self.name = name\n",
        "        self.default = float(default)\n",
        "        self.clamp_min = clamp_min\n",
        "        self.clamp_max = clamp_max\n",
        "\n",
        "    def __get__(self, instance, owner):\n",
        "        if instance is None:\n",
        "            return self\n",
        "        val = instance.__dict__.get(self.name, self.default)\n",
        "        return self._to_float(val)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def __set__(self, instance, value):\n",
        "        val = self._to_float(value)\n",
        "        if self.clamp_min is not None:\n",
        "            val = max(self.clamp_min, val)\n",
        "        if self.clamp_max is not None:\n",
        "            val = min(self.clamp_max, val)\n",
        "        instance.__dict__[self.name] = val\n",
        "\n",
        "    def _to_float(self, value):\n",
        "        if isinstance(value, dict):\n",
        "            for key in ('value', 'count', 'val', 'amount'):\n",
        "                if key in value and isinstance(value[key], (int, float)):\n",
        "                    return float(value[key])\n",
        "            return self.default\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            return float(value)\n",
        "        except (TypeError, ValueError):\n",
        "            return self.default\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "class EmotionalMemoryField:\n",
        "    def __init__(self, name):\n",
        "        self.name = name\n",
        "\n",
        "    def __get__(self, instance, owner):\n",
        "        if instance is None:\n",
        "            return self\n",
        "        if self.name not in instance.__dict__:\n",
        "            instance.__dict__[self.name] = {'gratitude': 0.0, 'grief': 0.0}\n",
        "        return instance.__dict__[self.name]\n",
        "\n",
        "    def __set__(self, instance, value):\n",
        "        if not isinstance(value, dict):\n",
        "            value = {'gratitude': 0.0, 'grief': 0.0}\n",
        "        cleaned = {}\n",
        "        for k, v in value.items():\n",
        "            if isinstance(v, dict):\n",
        "                v = v.get('value', v.get('count', 0.0))\n",
        "            try:\n",
        "                cleaned[k] = float(v)\n",
        "            except (TypeError, ValueError):\n",
        "                cleaned[k] = 0.0\n",
        "        if 'gratitude' not in cleaned:\n",
        "            cleaned['gratitude'] = 0.0\n",
        "        if 'grief' not in cleaned:\n",
        "            cleaned['grief'] = 0.0\n",
        "        instance.__dict__[self.name] = cleaned\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# ---- Модульные хелперы (было: Cell 3a-3) ----\n",
        "def _normalize_concept_key(key):\n",
        "    if isinstance(key, tuple) and len(key) >= 4:\n",
        "        return (round(key[0], 1), round(key[1], 1), round(key[2], 1), key[3])\n",
        "    return key\n",
        "\n",
        "def _get_dominant_embedding(agent):\n",
        "    if not agent.concept_graph.nodes:\n",
        "        return np.zeros(32)\n",
        "    top = max(agent.concept_graph.nodes.items(), key=lambda x: x[1]['count'])\n",
        "    embed = top[1].get('embed', np.zeros(32))\n",
        "    return np.array(embed) if not isinstance(embed, np.ndarray) else embed.copy()\n",
        "\n",
        "def _make_shared_vocab_sig(agent1, agent2):\n",
        "    if not agent1.concept_graph.nodes or not agent2.concept_graph.nodes:\n",
        "        return None\n",
        "    top1 = max(agent1.concept_graph.nodes.items(), key=lambda x: x[1]['count'])\n",
        "    top2 = max(agent2.concept_graph.nodes.items(), key=lambda x: x[1]['count'])\n",
        "    s1, s2 = top1[0], top2[0]\n",
        "    if not (isinstance(s1, tuple) and len(s1) >= 4 and isinstance(s2, tuple) and len(s2) >= 4):\n",
        "        return None\n",
        "    err = round((float(s1[0]) + float(s2[0])) / 2.0, 1)\n",
        "    load = round((float(s1[1]) + float(s2[1])) / 2.0, 1)\n",
        "    soul = round((float(s1[2]) + float(s2[2])) / 2.0, 1)\n",
        "    # ИСПРАВЛЕНО: раньше pair_id считался через phi_hash(id1, id2, ...), а\n",
        "    # phi_hash квантует координаты с |x|>100 до ближайшего десятка (это\n",
        "    # нормально для позиций на поле 104x104, но ID агентов быстро уходят в\n",
        "    # тысячи). В результате ОГРОМНОЕ число разных пар агентов (все, чьи min/max\n",
        "    # id округлялись в один десяток) получали ОДИН И ТОТ ЖЕ shared_XXXX —\n",
        "    # отсюда концепт-\"сингулярность\" (shared_3522 с сотнями носителей и\n",
        "    # счётчиком под 1000 во всех прогонах), убивающая реальное семантическое\n",
        "    # разнообразие. Теперь считаем хэш напрямую по неквантованным ID.\n",
        "    min_id, max_id = min(agent1.id, agent2.id), max(agent1.id, agent2.id)\n",
        "    raw_hash = (min_id * Config.PHI + max_id * Config.PHI**2 + 77777 * Config.PHI**3) % 1.0\n",
        "    pair_id = int(raw_hash * 9999)\n",
        "    return (err, load, soul, f\"shared_{pair_id}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# ===== ИСПРАВЛЕННАЯ ФУНКЦИЯ pattern_exchange_meanings =====\n",
        "\n",
        "# ---- Модульный хелпер (было: Cell 3i) ----\n",
        "def _has_concept(p, keyword):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Безопасный поиск концепта по ключевому слову в 4-м элементе сигнатуры.\"\"\"\n",
        "    if not hasattr(p, 'concept_graph') or not p.concept_graph.nodes:\n",
        "        return False\n",
        "    for sig in p.concept_graph.nodes:\n",
        "        if isinstance(sig, tuple) and len(sig) > 3:\n",
        "            if keyword in str(sig[3]).lower():\n",
        "                return True\n",
        "    return False\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# ---- Модульный хелпер (было: Cell 4a2) ----\n",
        "def find_largest_prey_in_radius(feral, field, world, min_cells=15, radius=20):\n",
        "    cx, cy = feral.get_center()\n",
        "    cx = int(cx)\n",
        "    cy = int(cy)\n",
        "    candidates = []\n",
        "    for dx in range(-radius, radius + 1):\n",
        "        for dy in range(-radius, radius + 1):\n",
        "            x = int((cx + dx) % Config.WORLD_SIZE)\n",
        "            y = int((cy + dy) % Config.WORLD_SIZE)\n",
        "            owner = int(field[x, y, CH['owner']])\n",
        "            if owner != 0 and owner != feral.id:\n",
        "                prey = world.pattern_dict.get(owner)\n",
        "                if prey and prey.alive and prey.role_type != 'feral':\n",
        "                    size = len(prey.cells)\n",
        "                    if size >= min_cells:\n",
        "                        px, py = prey.get_center()\n",
        "                        dx_vec = px - cx\n",
        "                        dy_vec = py - cy\n",
        "                        dist = np.hypot(dx_vec, dy_vec)\n",
        "                        if dist > 0:\n",
        "                            candidates.append((size, prey, dx_vec/dist, dy_vec/dist, dist))\n",
        "    if candidates:\n",
        "        candidates.sort(key=lambda t: t[0], reverse=True)\n",
        "        best_size, best_prey, dx_norm, dy_norm, dist = candidates[0]\n",
        "        return best_prey, (dx_norm, dy_norm), dist\n",
        "    return None, None, None\n",
        "\n",
        "# Канал сигнала Варвара (было: Cell 4a2)\n",
        "if 'signal_feral' not in CH:\n",
        "    CH['signal_feral'] = 30\n",
        "\n",
        "class Pattern:\n",
        "    soul_weight = FloatField('soul_weight', default=0.5, clamp_min=0.0, clamp_max=1.0)\n",
        "    spirit_gap = FloatField('spirit_gap', default=0.0, clamp_min=0.0, clamp_max=2.0)\n",
        "    epistemic_scar = FloatField('epistemic_scar', default=0.35, clamp_min=0.0, clamp_max=1.0)\n",
        "    coherence = FloatField('coherence', default=0.5, clamp_min=0.0, clamp_max=1.0)\n",
        "    pred_error = FloatField('pred_error', default=0.0, clamp_min=0.0, clamp_max=2.0)\n",
        "    cognitive_tension = FloatField('cognitive_tension', default=0.0, clamp_min=0.0, clamp_max=2.0)\n",
        "    body_memory = FloatField('body_memory', default=0.0, clamp_min=0.0, clamp_max=1.0)\n",
        "    unresolved_contradiction = FloatField('unresolved_contradiction', default=0.01, clamp_min=0.0, clamp_max=1.0)\n",
        "    soma = FloatField('soma', default=0.0, clamp_min=0.0, clamp_max=1.0)\n",
        "    energy = FloatField('energy', default=0.0, clamp_min=-1.0, clamp_max=2.0)\n",
        "    protection_level = FloatField('protection_level', default=0.0, clamp_min=0.0, clamp_max=1.0)\n",
        "    self_phenomenal_error = FloatField('self_phenomenal_error', default=1.0, clamp_min=0.0, clamp_max=2.0)\n",
        "    self_surprise = FloatField('self_surprise', default=0.0, clamp_min=0.0, clamp_max=2.0)\n",
        "    given_count = FloatField('given_count', default=0.0, clamp_min=0.0)\n",
        "    vorticity = FloatField('vorticity', default=0.0, clamp_min=-1.0, clamp_max=1.0)\n",
        "    alarm_level = FloatField('alarm_level', default=0.0, clamp_min=0.0, clamp_max=1.0)\n",
        "    _linguistic_confidence = FloatField('_linguistic_confidence', default=0.5, clamp_min=0.0, clamp_max=1.0)\n",
        "    _nci = FloatField('_nci', default=0.5, clamp_min=0.0, clamp_max=1.0)\n",
        "    _cellular_endurance = FloatField('_cellular_endurance', default=1.0, clamp_min=0.0, clamp_max=1.0)\n",
        "    _core_identity_strength = FloatField('_core_identity_strength', default=0.5, clamp_min=0.0, clamp_max=1.0)\n",
        "    _reentry_signal = FloatField('_reentry_signal', default=0.0, clamp_min=0.0, clamp_max=1.0)\n",
        "    epistemic_load = FloatField('epistemic_load', default=0.0, clamp_min=0.0, clamp_max=1.0)\n",
        "    scar_dream = FloatField('scar_dream', default=0.0, clamp_min=-1.0, clamp_max=1.0)\n",
        "    emotional_memory = EmotionalMemoryField('emotional_memory')\n",
        "\n",
        "    def __init__(self, pid, cells, parent=None, world=None):\n",
        "        self.id = pid\n",
        "        self.cells = set(cells)\n",
        "        self.age = 0\n",
        "        self.alive = True\n",
        "        self.world = world\n",
        "        self.parent_id = parent.id if parent else 0\n",
        "        self.lineage_id = parent.lineage_id if parent else pid\n",
        "        self.lineage_born_at_step = parent.lineage_born_at_step if parent else 0\n",
        "        self.lineage_total_age = parent.lineage_total_age if parent else 0\n",
        "        self.generation = parent.generation + 1 if parent else 0\n",
        "        self.lineage_age = parent.lineage_age + 1 if parent else 0\n",
        "        self.identity = np.array([phi_hash(pid, i, 100) for i in range(8)])\n",
        "        self.belief = np.zeros(8)\n",
        "        self.prediction = np.zeros(8)\n",
        "        self.model = np.zeros(8)\n",
        "        self.self_state_prediction = np.array([0.0, 0.0])\n",
        "        self.self_model = 0.1\n",
        "        self.self_surprise = Config.MIN_ACTIVE\n",
        "        self._prev_energy = 0.0\n",
        "        self.soul_momentum = 0.0\n",
        "\n",
        "        self.role = 0 if phi_hash(pid, 777, 0) < 0.5 else 1 if not parent else (parent.role + (1 if phi_hash(pid, 888, 0) < 0.2 else 0)) % 2\n",
        "        self.unknown_belief = 0.0\n",
        "        self.unknown_model = 0.0\n",
        "        self.unknown_prediction = 0.0\n",
        "        self.unknown_error = 0.0\n",
        "        self.prev_epistemic_load = 0.0\n",
        "        self.crisis_memory = min(parent.crisis_memory * 0.8, Config.CRISIS_MEMORY_MAX) if parent else 0.0\n",
        "        self.memory_trace = []\n",
        "        self.self_consistency = 0.0\n",
        "        self.given_trigger = False\n",
        "        self.given_cooldown = 0\n",
        "        self.surprise_signal = 0.0\n",
        "\n",
        "        if parent:\n",
        "            grat = parent.emotional_memory.get('gratitude', 0.0)\n",
        "            grief = parent.emotional_memory.get('grief', 0.0)\n",
        "            if isinstance(grat, dict):\n",
        "                grat = 0.5\n",
        "            if isinstance(grief, dict):\n",
        "                grief = 0.5\n",
        "            self.emotional_memory = {'gratitude': float(grat) * 0.9, 'grief': float(grief) * 0.9}\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            self.emotional_memory = {'gratitude': 0.0, 'grief': 0.0}\n",
        "\n",
        "        self.semantic_memory = {'events': []}\n",
        "        self.semantic_state = \"neutral\"\n",
        "        self.in_scream = False\n",
        "        self.local_phase = \"MODEL\"\n",
        "        self.dream_timer = int(phi_hash(pid, 0, 777) * 30 + 30)\n",
        "        self.dream_interval = int(phi_hash(pid, 1, 777) * 40 + 40)\n",
        "        self.dream_duration = 3\n",
        "        self.in_dream = False\n",
        "        self.dream_progress = 0\n",
        "        self.pending_spore = None\n",
        "        self.last_speciation_age = -Config.SPECIATION_COOLDOWN * 2\n",
        "        self.biography = deque(maxlen=20)\n",
        "        self.world_state = np.zeros(8)\n",
        "        self.world_model = np.zeros((8, 8))\n",
        "        self.last_action = 0\n",
        "        self.goals = []\n",
        "        self.intent = None\n",
        "        self.intent_age = 0\n",
        "        self.intent_commitment = 0.0\n",
        "        self.concept_graph = ConceptGraph()\n",
        "        self.concept_history = []\n",
        "        self.last_intent_switch_age = -Config.INTENT_SWITCH_COOLDOWN\n",
        "        self._signal_weight_cache = {}\n",
        "        self._last_metabolic_taken = 0.0\n",
        "        self._subject_detected = False\n",
        "        self._antigrav_push = (0.0, 0.0)\n",
        "        self.soma_vector = np.zeros(7)\n",
        "        self.prev_soma_vector = np.zeros(7)\n",
        "        # НОВОЕ: счётчики светлых снов и кошмаров (механика снов/кошмаров, ранее\n",
        "        # только обсуждавшаяся, теперь реально внедрена — см. _consolidate_dream_memory)\n",
        "        self._dream_memory_count = 0\n",
        "        self._nightmare_count = 0\n",
        "        self._prev_cells = set()\n",
        "        self._gap_history = deque(maxlen=200)\n",
        "        self._soul_history = deque(maxlen=200)\n",
        "        self._in_blindness = False\n",
        "        self._blindness_duration = 0\n",
        "        self._prophet_rank = 0.0\n",
        "        self._wisdom_trust_threshold = 0.85\n",
        "\n",
        "        if parent:\n",
        "            self.belief = parent.belief.copy()\n",
        "            self.prediction = parent.prediction.copy()\n",
        "            self.model = parent.model.copy()\n",
        "            self.self_model = parent.self_model\n",
        "            self.unknown_belief = parent.unknown_belief\n",
        "            self.unknown_model = parent.unknown_model\n",
        "            mut_strength = Config.MUTATION_STRENGTH_BASE\n",
        "            if world and hasattr(world, '_sg_crisis_active') and world._sg_crisis_active:\n",
        "                mut_strength *= Config.SG_CRISIS_MUTATION_BOOST\n",
