      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "✅ Cell 3e v3.4 loaded: скука обновляется только по живым агентам, разделение ответственности\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# Cell 3e: SelfRegulationEngine v3.4 (оптимизированная скука, разделение ответственности)\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "from collections import deque, Counter\n",
        "\n",
        "class SelfRegulationEngine:\n",
        "    def __init__(self):\n",
        "        self.reset()\n",
        "\n",
        "    def reset(self):\n",
        "        self.boredom = 0.0\n",
        "        self.avg_gap = 0.5\n",
        "        self.avg_soul = 0.5\n",
        "        self.energy_drift = 0.0\n",
        "        self.population = 0\n",
        "        self.avg_binding = 0.0\n",
        "        self.fatigue_ratio = 0.0\n",
        "        self.phase = \"growth\"\n",
        "        self.turbulence_factor = 1.0\n",
        "        self.low_gap_pressure = 0.0\n",
        "        self.soul_protection_active = False\n",
        "        self._smooth_gap = deque(maxlen=10)\n",
        "        self._smooth_soul = deque(maxlen=10)\n",
        "        self._phase_history = deque(maxlen=500)\n",
        "        self._obs_gap_zones = {'confused': 0, 'blind': 0}\n",
        "        self.field_ref = None\n",
        "        self._patterns_ref = None\n",
        "\n",
        "    def update_system_metrics(self, field, patterns, drift, t):\n",
        "        # 1. Фильтруем живых агентов\n",
        "        alive = [p for p in patterns if p.alive]\n",
        "        self.population = len(alive)\n",
        "        self.field_ref = field\n",
        "        self._patterns_ref = patterns\n",
        "\n",
        "        # 2. Обновляем скуку (только по живым, чтобы снизить нагрузку)\n",
        "        self.boredom = calculate_boredom(alive, field) if alive else 0.0\n",
        "\n",
        "        # 3. Остальные метрики\n",
        "        confused = 0\n",
        "        blind = 0\n",
        "        if alive:\n",
        "            gaps = []\n",
        "            souls = []\n",
        "            bindings = []\n",
        "            fatigued = 0\n",
        "            for p in alive:\n",
        "                gap = float(getattr(p, 'spirit_gap', 0.5))\n",
        "                gaps.append(gap)\n",
        "                souls.append(float(getattr(p, 'soul_weight', 0.5)))\n",
        "                bindings.append(float(getattr(p, 'last_phenomenal_binding', 0.5)))\n",
        "                if getattr(p, '_kinematic_fatigue', 0.0) > 0.3:\n",
        "                    fatigued += 1\n",
        "                if gap > 0.6:\n",
        "                    blind += 1\n",
        "                elif gap > 0.3:\n",
        "                    confused += 1\n",
        "\n",
        "            self._obs_gap_zones['confused'] = confused\n",
        "            self._obs_gap_zones['blind'] = blind\n",
        "\n",
        "            self._smooth_gap.extend(gaps)\n",
        "            self._smooth_soul.extend(souls)\n",
        "            self.avg_gap = float(np.mean(self._smooth_gap)) if self._smooth_gap else 0.5\n",
        "            self.avg_soul = float(np.mean(self._smooth_soul)) if self._smooth_soul else 0.5\n",
        "            self.avg_binding = float(np.mean(bindings))\n",
        "            self.fatigue_ratio = fatigued / max(1, self.population)\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            self.avg_gap = self.avg_soul = self.avg_binding = self.fatigue_ratio = 0.5\n",
        "            self._obs_gap_zones['confused'] = 0\n",
        "            self._obs_gap_zones['blind'] = 0\n",
        "\n",
        "        self.energy_drift = abs(drift)\n",
        "        self.low_gap_pressure = max(0.0, (0.45 - self.avg_gap) * 3.5)\n",
        "        self.soul_protection_active = (self.avg_soul < 0.25)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # 4. Определение фазы\n",
        "        if self.avg_gap < 0.15:\n",
        "            self.phase = \"stagnation\"\n",
        "            self.turbulence_factor = min(2.5, 1.0 + self.low_gap_pressure * 2.0)\n",
        "        elif self.low_gap_pressure > 0.3:\n",
        "            self.phase = \"stagnation\"\n",
        "            if self.soul_protection_active:\n",
        "                self.turbulence_factor = min(1.8, 1.0 + self.low_gap_pressure * 1.0)\n",
        "            else:\n",
        "                self.turbulence_factor = min(2.5, 1.0 + self.low_gap_pressure * 1.8)\n",
        "        elif self.boredom > 0.6 and self.avg_gap < 0.4:\n",
        "            self.phase = \"stagnation\"\n",
        "            self.turbulence_factor = min(1.8, 1.0 + self.boredom * 1.0)\n",
        "        elif self.energy_drift > 300 or self.fatigue_ratio > 0.25:\n",
        "            self.phase = \"crisis\"\n",
        "            self.turbulence_factor = 0.7\n",
        "        elif self.population < 25:\n",
        "            self.phase = \"recovery\"\n",
        "            self.turbulence_factor = 1.3\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            self.phase = \"growth\"\n",
        "            self.turbulence_factor = 1.0\n",
        "\n",
        "        self._phase_history.append(self.phase)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # --- остальные методы без изменений ---\n",
        "    def get_phase_log(self):\n",
        "        if not self._phase_history:\n",
        "            return \"no data\"\n",
        "        cnt = Counter(self._phase_history)\n",
        "        total = len(self._phase_history)\n",
        "        return \" | \".join(\n",
        "            f\"{phase}: {cnt[phase]}/{total} ({cnt[phase]/total:.1%})\"\n",
        "            for phase in [\"growth\", \"stagnation\", \"crisis\", \"recovery\"] if cnt[phase] > 0\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "    def is_stuck_in_phase(self, phase_name, min_steps=150):\n",
        "        if len(self._phase_history) < min_steps:\n",
        "            return False\n",
        "        return all(p == phase_name for p in list(self._phase_history)[-min_steps:])\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_unknown_spawn_interval(self):\n",
        "        base = max(3, int(8 - self.boredom * 5))\n",
        "        return max(1, int(base / self.turbulence_factor))\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_unknown_spawn_prob(self):\n",
        "        base = (0.01 + self.boredom * 0.02) * self.turbulence_factor\n",
        "        if self.avg_gap < 0.2:\n",
        "            base += 0.04 * (0.2 - self.avg_gap) * 5.0\n",
        "        if self.soul_protection_active:\n",
        "            base *= 0.7\n",
        "        if self.energy_drift > 500:\n",
        "            base *= 0.5\n",
        "        if self.population > 70:\n",
        "            base *= 0.8\n",
        "        if self.population < 30:\n",
        "            base *= 1.5\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"crisis\":\n",
        "            base *= 0.5\n",
        "\n",
        "        confused_blind_ratio = (self._obs_gap_zones.get('confused', 0) + self._obs_gap_zones.get('blind', 0)) / max(1, self.population)\n",
        "        if confused_blind_ratio > 0.4:\n",
        "            base *= 0.7\n",
        "\n",
        "        return min(0.06 if self.population > 40 else 0.09, base)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_labyrinth_interval(self):\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"crisis\":\n",
        "            return 100\n",
        "        if self.population > 70:\n",
        "            return 25\n",
        "        return 50\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_labyrinth_penalty_multiplier(self):\n",
        "        base = 1.0\n",
        "        if self.avg_gap < 0.35:\n",
        "            base += (0.35 - self.avg_gap) * 7.0\n",
        "        if self.soul_protection_active:\n",
        "            base = min(base, 2.2)\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"crisis\":\n",
        "            base *= 0.8\n",
        "        return np.clip(base, 0.8, 3.0)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_validation_interval(self):\n",
        "        if self.energy_drift > 500:\n",
        "            return 1\n",
        "        if self.energy_drift > 150:\n",
        "            return 5\n",
        "        return 15\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_subject_check_interval(self):\n",
        "        return 200\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_semantic_exchange_interval(self):\n",
        "        base = int(15 + (self.population / 200) * 35)\n",
        "        base = max(15, min(50, base))\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"crisis\":\n",
        "            return max(15, int(base * 0.8))\n",
        "        if self.boredom > 0.6:\n",
        "            return max(10, int(base * 0.6))\n",
        "        return base\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_form_concepts_interval(self, agent):\n",
        "        coherence = getattr(agent, 'coherence', 0.5)\n",
        "        grief = getattr(agent, 'emotional_memory', {}).get('grief', 0.0)\n",
        "        if agent.soul_weight > 0.7 and coherence > 0.85:\n",
        "            return 4\n",
        "        if grief > 0.2:\n",
        "            return 1\n",
        "        return 2\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_given_probability(self, agent, given_counter):\n",
        "        if given_counter.get('count', 0) >= getattr(Config, 'MAX_GIVEN_PER_STEP', 5):\n",
        "            return 0.0\n",
        "        base = (0.05 + self.boredom * 0.15) * self.turbulence_factor\n",
        "        if self.soul_protection_active:\n",
        "            base *= 0.8\n",
        "        if getattr(agent, 'cognitive_tension', 0) > 0.5:\n",
        "            base += 0.1\n",
        "        if getattr(agent, 'given_cooldown', 0) > 0:\n",
        "            base *= 0.2\n",
        "        return min(0.6, base)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_dynamic_pop_cap(self):\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"crisis\":\n",
        "            return max(20, int(self.population * 0.7))\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"stagnation\":\n",
        "            base = max(60, int(70 + self.avg_soul * 30))\n",
        "            return max(base, int(self.population * 0.9))\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"recovery\":\n",
        "            return min(150, self.population + 40)\n",
        "        base = 70 + int(self.avg_soul * 40)\n",
        "        if self.avg_gap < 0.2:\n",
        "            base -= 10\n",
        "        return max(50, min(120, base))\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_division_capacity(self, current_pop):\n",
        "        if current_pop >= 200:\n",
        "            return 0\n",
        "\n",
        "        cap = self.get_dynamic_pop_cap()\n",
        "        fill_ratio = current_pop / max(1, cap)\n",
        "\n",
        "        if current_pop < 70:\n",
        "            if self.phase == \"recovery\":\n",
        "                return max(8, int(12 * (1.0 - fill_ratio)))\n",
        "            elif self.phase == \"growth\":\n",
        "                if fill_ratio < 0.9:\n",
        "                    return 4\n",
        "                elif fill_ratio < 1.1:\n",
        "                    return 2\n",
        "                else:\n",
        "                    return 0\n",
        "            elif self.phase == \"stagnation\":\n",
        "                return max(1, int(2 * (1.0 - fill_ratio)))\n",
        "            else:\n",
        "                return 0 if current_pop > 15 else 2\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            if self.phase == \"recovery\":\n",
        "                return max(4, int(8 * (1.0 - fill_ratio))) if fill_ratio < 0.9 else 0\n",
        "            elif self.phase == \"growth\":\n",
        "                return 3 if fill_ratio < 0.85 else (1 if fill_ratio < 0.95 else 0)\n",
        "            elif self.phase == \"stagnation\":\n",
        "                return 1 if fill_ratio < 0.8 else 0\n",
        "            else:\n",
        "                return 0 if current_pop > 15 else 1\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_division_energy_threshold(self):\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"recovery\":\n",
        "            return 0.015\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"crisis\":\n",
        "            return 0.05\n",
        "        if self.population < 30:\n",
        "            return 0.02\n",
        "        return 0.03\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_energy_injection_multiplier(self):\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"recovery\":\n",
        "            return 2.5\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"crisis\":\n",
        "            return 1.5\n",
        "        if self.population > 80:\n",
        "            return 0.8\n",
        "        return 1.0\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_scar_injection_multiplier(self):\n",
        "        if self.soul_protection_active:\n",
        "            return min(3.5, 2.5 + self.low_gap_pressure * 1.2)\n",
        "        if self.low_gap_pressure > 0.4:\n",
        "            return min(6.0, 4.5 + self.low_gap_pressure * 2.5)\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"stagnation\":\n",
        "            return 4.0 + self.boredom * 1.5\n",
        "        elif self.phase == \"crisis\":\n",
        "            return 2.5\n",
        "        elif self.phase == \"recovery\":\n",
        "            return 3.5\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            return 3.0 + self.boredom * 0.5\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_agent_scar_multiplier(self, agent):\n",
        "        base = self.get_scar_injection_multiplier()\n",
        "        if getattr(agent, 'age', 0) > 1000:\n",
        "            base *= 2.0\n",
        "            base = min(base, 12.0)\n",
        "        return base\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_soul_recovery_bonus(self, agent):\n",
        "        if not self.soul_protection_active:\n",
        "            return 0.0\n",
        "        soul = getattr(agent, 'soul_weight', 0.5)\n",
        "        grief = getattr(agent, 'emotional_memory', {}).get('grief', 0.0)\n",
        "        if soul < 0.3 and grief > 0.2:\n",
        "            return 0.02\n",
        "        return 0.0\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_soul_recovery_multiplier(self):\n",
        "        if self.avg_soul < 0.25:\n",
        "            return 3.0\n",
        "        elif self.avg_soul < 0.40:\n",
        "            return 2.0\n",
        "        return 1.0\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_social_decay_rate(self, crisis_level):\n",
        "        if self.phase == 'crisis':\n",
        "            return 0.88\n",
        "        if self.phase == 'stagnation':\n",
        "            return 0.96\n",
        "        return 0.92 if crisis_level > 0.5 else 0.94\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_aging_rate_multiplier(self):\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"crisis\":\n",
        "            return 1.1\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"stagnation\":\n",
        "            return 1.15\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"recovery\":\n",
        "            return 0.75\n",
        "        if self.soul_protection_active:\n",
        "            return 0.65\n",
        "        return 1.0\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_max_age(self, agent):\n",
        "        base_age = 600\n",
        "        soul = getattr(agent, 'soul_weight', 0.5)\n",
        "        base_age += int(soul * 200)\n",
        "        if getattr(agent, '_narrative_agent', False):\n",
        "            base_age += 200\n",
        "        endurance = getattr(agent, '_cellular_endurance', 1.0)\n",
        "        if endurance < 0.3:\n",
        "            base_age -= 150\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"crisis\":\n",
        "            base_age = int(base_age * 0.8)\n",
        "        elif self.phase == \"recovery\":\n",
        "            base_age = int(base_age * 1.3)\n",
        "        return max(100, base_age)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def can_agent_divide(self, agent):\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"crisis\":\n",
        "            return False\n",
        "        if agent.age < 15:\n",
        "            return False\n",
        "        if agent.soul_weight < 0.25:\n",
        "            return False\n",
        "        if agent.energy < self.get_division_energy_threshold():\n",
        "            return False\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"stagnation\":\n",
        "            return agent.soul_weight > 0.35\n",
        "        return True\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_hunger_threshold(self):\n",
        "        cap = self.get_dynamic_pop_cap()\n",
        "        return int(cap * 0.7)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_max_cells_per_agent(self):\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"recovery\":\n",
        "            return 200\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"crisis\":\n",
        "            return 80\n",
        "        if self.phase == \"stagnation\":\n",
        "            return 120\n",
        "        return 140 + int(self.avg_soul * 30)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# Создаём глобальный экземпляр\n",
        "selfreg = SelfRegulationEngine()\n",
        "print(\"✅ Cell 3e v3.4 loaded: скука обновляется только по живым агентам, разделение ответственности\")"
      ]
    },

        "\n",
        "# Cell 3f: Substates Engine v1.8 (ужесточённые пороги и налог на поток)\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "class SubstatesEngine:\n",
        "    _I_CRISIS    = 0\n",
        "    _I_INVITE    = 1\n",
        "    _I_GRIEF     = 2\n",
        "    _I_COOPERATE = 3\n",
        "    _I_EXPLORE   = 4\n",
        "    _I_SEEK_HELP = 5\n",
        "    _I_SCAR      = 6\n",
        "    _I_REST      = 7\n",
        "    _I_RESONANCE = 8\n",
        "    _I_BTYPE     = 9\n",
        "    _I_ALARM     = 10\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Обновлённые пороги (flow 0.68, serenity 0.45)\n",
        "    _THRESHOLDS = {\n",
        "        'awe':         0.65,\n",
        "        'flow':        0.68,   # было 0.55 → теперь 0.68\n",
        "        'wonder':      0.30,\n",
        "        'serenity':    0.45,   # было 0.38 → теперь 0.45\n",
        "        'curious':     0.32,\n",
        "        'vigilance':   0.32,\n",
        "        'longing':     0.28,\n",
        "        'melancholy':  0.25,\n",
        "        'reminiscence':0.25,\n",
        "    }\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Базовый порядок (ротируется для каждого агента)\n",
        "    _BASE_PRIORITY = [\n",
        "        'awe', 'wonder', 'serenity', 'curious',\n",
        "        'vigilance', 'longing', 'melancholy', 'reminiscence', 'flow',\n",
        "    ]\n",
        "\n",
        "    _MIN_DURATION = 8\n",
        "\n",
        "    @staticmethod\n",
        "    def _phi_hash(seed, step, modulus=99911):\n",
        "        \"\"\"Простая хеш-функция для детерминированного сдвига.\"\"\"\n",
        "        return hash((seed, step)) % modulus\n",
        "\n",
        "    @staticmethod\n",
        "    def _soc(agent, idx):\n",
        "        cs = getattr(agent, 'current_social', None)\n",
        "        if cs is not None and len(cs) > idx:\n",
        "            return float(np.clip(cs[idx], 0.0, 1.0))\n",
        "        return 0.0\n",
        "\n",
        "    @staticmethod\n",
        "    def _scores(agent):\n",
        "        grief      = float(np.clip(agent.emotional_memory.get('grief',     0.0), 0, 1))\n",
        "        gratitude  = float(np.clip(agent.emotional_memory.get('gratitude', 0.0), 0, 1))\n",
        "        soul       = float(np.clip(getattr(agent, 'soul_weight',              0.5), 0, 1))\n",
        "        coherence  = float(np.clip(getattr(agent, 'coherence',                0.5), 0, 1))\n",
        "        pred_err   = float(np.clip(getattr(agent, 'pred_error',               0.5), 0, 1))\n",
        "        gap        = float(np.clip(getattr(agent, 'spirit_gap',               0.5), 0, 2)) / 2.0\n",
        "        binding    = float(np.clip(getattr(agent, 'last_phenomenal_binding',  0.3), 0, 1))\n",
        "        epi_load   = float(np.clip(getattr(agent, 'epistemic_load',           0.3), 0, 1))\n",
        "        crisis_m   = float(np.clip(getattr(agent, 'crisis_memory',            0.0), 0, 1))\n",
        "        age        = max(1, getattr(agent, 'age', 1))\n",
        "        state      = getattr(agent, 'semantic_state', 'neutral')\n",
        "\n",
        "        alarm   = SubstatesEngine._soc(agent, SubstatesEngine._I_ALARM)\n",
        "        crisis  = SubstatesEngine._soc(agent, SubstatesEngine._I_CRISIS)\n",
        "        invite  = SubstatesEngine._soc(agent, SubstatesEngine._I_INVITE)\n",
        "        rest    = SubstatesEngine._soc(agent, SubstatesEngine._I_REST)\n",
        "        resonance = SubstatesEngine._soc(agent, SubstatesEngine._I_RESONANCE)\n",
        "\n",
        "        buf_fill = min(1.0, len(getattr(agent, 'episodic_buffer', [])) / 100.0)\n",
        "\n",
        "        bio = list(getattr(agent, 'biography', []))[-50:]\n",
        "        intent_sw = sum(1 for ev in bio if isinstance(ev, dict) and ev.get('type') == 'intent_switch')\n",
        "        silence = float(np.clip((1.0 - intent_sw / 10.0) * coherence, 0, 1))\n",
        "\n",
        "        maturity = min(1.0, age / 5000.0)\n",
        "\n",
        "        awe = (binding         * 0.35 +\n",
        "               gap             * 0.25 +\n",
        "               (1.0 - pred_err)* 0.25 +\n",
        "               (1.0 - crisis_m)* 0.15)\n",
        "\n",
        "        flow = (coherence        * 0.35 +\n",
        "                soul             * 0.30 +\n",
        "                (1.0 - pred_err) * 0.25 +\n",
        "                (1.0 - alarm)    * 0.10)\n",
        "\n",
        "        wonder = (binding        * 0.35 +\n",
        "                  (1.0 - grief)  * 0.25 +\n",
        "                  coherence      * 0.25 +\n",
        "                  invite         * 0.15)\n",
        "\n",
        "        state_bonus = (0.40 if state == 'contentment' else\n",
        "                       0.20 if state == 'grateful_but_cautious' else 0.0)\n",
        "        serenity = float(np.clip(\n",
        "            state_bonus      +\n",
        "            silence          * 0.30 +\n",
        "            (1.0 - pred_err) * 0.20 +\n",
        "            resonance        * 0.10,\n",
        "            0, 1))\n",
        "\n",
        "        err_bell = float(np.clip(4.0 * pred_err * (1.0 - pred_err), 0, 1))\n",
        "        curious = (epi_load         * 0.40 +\n",
        "                   err_bell         * 0.30 +\n",
        "                   (1.0 - crisis_m) * 0.20 +\n",
        "                   gap              * 0.10)\n",
        "\n",
        "        vigilance = (alarm           * 0.40 +\n",
        "                     crisis          * 0.30 +\n",
        "                     pred_err        * 0.20 +\n",
        "                     (1.0 - soul)    * 0.10)\n",
        "\n",
        "        longing = (grief             * 0.35 +\n",
        "                   (1.0 - gratitude) * 0.25 +\n",
        "                   buf_fill          * 0.25 +\n",
        "                   maturity          * 0.15)\n",
        "\n",
        "        grief_bell = float(np.clip(4.0 * grief * (1.0 - grief), 0, 1))\n",
        "        melancholy = (grief_bell      * 0.40 +\n",
        "                      buf_fill        * 0.30 +\n",
        "                      (1.0 - gratitude)* 0.20 +\n",
        "                      silence         * 0.10)\n",
        "\n",
        "        reminiscence = (buf_fill  * 0.35 +\n",
        "                        silence   * 0.30 +\n",
        "                        maturity  * 0.25 +\n",
        "                        rest      * 0.10)\n",
        "\n",
        "        return {\n",
        "            'awe':         float(np.clip(awe,         0, 1)),\n",
        "            'flow':        float(np.clip(flow,        0, 1)),\n",
        "            'wonder':      float(np.clip(wonder,      0, 1)),\n",
        "            'serenity':    float(np.clip(serenity,    0, 1)),\n",
        "            'curious':     float(np.clip(curious,     0, 1)),\n",
        "            'vigilance':   float(np.clip(vigilance,   0, 1)),\n",
        "            'longing':     float(np.clip(longing,     0, 1)),\n",
        "            'melancholy':  float(np.clip(melancholy,  0, 1)),\n",
        "            'reminiscence':float(np.clip(reminiscence,0, 1)),\n",
        "        }\n",
        "\n",
        "    @staticmethod\n",
        "    def update(agent):\n",
        "        scores     = SubstatesEngine._scores(agent)\n",
        "        thresholds = SubstatesEngine._THRESHOLDS\n",
        "        base_priority = SubstatesEngine._BASE_PRIORITY\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Индивидуальная ротация приоритетов для каждого агента\n",
        "        agent_id = getattr(agent, 'id', id(agent))\n",
        "        rotation_seed = (agent_id, agent.age // 300 if hasattr(agent, 'age') else 0)\n",
        "        rotation = SubstatesEngine._phi_hash(rotation_seed, 0, len(base_priority))\n",
        "        priority = base_priority[rotation:] + base_priority[:rotation]\n",
        "\n",
        "        if not hasattr(agent, '_substate'):\n",
        "            agent._substate          = None\n",
        "        if not hasattr(agent, '_substate_timer'):\n",
        "            agent._substate_timer    = 0\n",
        "        if not hasattr(agent, '_substate_cooldown'):\n",
        "            agent._substate_cooldown = 0\n",
        "        if not hasattr(agent, '_substate_score'):\n",
        "            agent._substate_score    = 0.0\n",
        "\n",
        "        if agent._substate_cooldown > 0:\n",
        "            agent._substate_cooldown -= 1\n",
        "            agent._state_modifiers = {}\n",
        "            return\n",
        "\n",
        "        new_sub   = None\n",
        "        new_score = 0.0\n",
        "        for s in priority:\n",
        "            sc = scores.get(s, 0.0)\n",
        "            if sc >= thresholds[s]:\n",
        "                new_sub   = s\n",
        "                new_score = sc\n",
        "                break\n",
        "\n",
        "        if new_sub != agent._substate:\n",
        "            if agent._substate is not None:\n",
        "                cur_score = scores.get(agent._substate, 0.0)\n",
        "                still_valid = cur_score >= thresholds.get(agent._substate, 0.3) * 0.75\n",
        "                not_much_better = (new_score < cur_score + 0.12)\n",
        "                timer_alive = (agent._substate_timer > 0)\n",
        "\n",
        "                if still_valid and not_much_better and timer_alive:\n",
        "                    agent._substate_timer = max(0, agent._substate_timer - 1)\n",
        "                    SubstatesEngine._apply_modifiers(agent)\n",
        "                    return\n",
        "\n",
        "            if agent._substate is not None:\n",
        "                try:\n",
        "                    agent._log_event(\"substate_exit\",\n",
        "                                     substate=agent._substate,\n",
        "                                     score=round(scores.get(agent._substate, 0.0), 3))\n",
        "                except Exception:\n",
        "                    pass\n",
        "\n",
        "            prev = agent._substate\n",
        "            agent._substate       = new_sub\n",
        "            agent._substate_score = new_score\n",
        "            agent._substate_timer = SubstatesEngine._MIN_DURATION\n",
        "\n",
        "            if new_sub is not None:\n",
        "                try:\n",
        "                    agent._log_event(\"substate_enter\",\n",
        "                                     substate=new_sub,\n",
        "                                     prev=str(prev),\n",
        "                                     score=round(new_score, 3))\n",
        "                except Exception:\n",
        "                    pass\n",
        "\n",
        "            if new_sub is None:\n",
        "                agent._substate_cooldown = 4\n",
        "\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            agent._substate_score = new_score\n",
        "            if agent._substate_timer > 0:\n",
        "                agent._substate_timer -= 1\n",
        "\n",
        "        SubstatesEngine._apply_modifiers(agent)\n",
        "\n",
        "    @staticmethod\n",
        "    def _apply_modifiers(agent):\n",
        "        mods = {\n",
        "            'mobility':             1.0,\n",
        "            'soul_recovery':        0.0,\n",
        "            'scar_heal':            0.0,\n",
        "            'memory_recall_chance': 0.15,\n",
        "            'metabolic_discount':   1.0,\n",
        "            'intent_bias':          None,\n",
        "        }\n",
        "\n",
        "        sub = getattr(agent, '_substate', None)\n",
        "\n",
        "        if sub == 'awe':\n",
        "            mods.update({'mobility': 0.70, 'soul_recovery': 0.010, 'scar_heal': 0.012})\n",
        "        elif sub == 'flow':\n",
        "            # flow: mobility оставлен 1.20, metabolic_discount теперь 1.15 (налог на выгорание)\n",
        "            mods.update({'mobility': 1.20, 'metabolic_discount': 1.15})\n",
        "        elif sub == 'wonder':\n",
        "            mods.update({'soul_recovery': 0.006, 'memory_recall_chance': 0.30,\n",
        "                         'mobility': 0.90})\n",
        "        elif sub == 'serenity':\n",
        "            mods.update({'scar_heal': 0.014, 'soul_recovery': 0.007, 'mobility': 0.85})\n",
        "        elif sub == 'curious':\n",
        "            mods.update({'mobility': 1.30, 'intent_bias': 'explore'})\n",
        "        elif sub == 'vigilance':\n",
        "            mods.update({'mobility': 1.45, 'intent_bias': 'explore'})\n",
        "        elif sub == 'longing':\n",
        "            mods.update({'intent_bias': 'seek_help',\n",
        "                         'memory_recall_chance': 0.50, 'mobility': 0.95})\n",
        "        elif sub == 'melancholy':\n",
        "            mods.update({'mobility': 0.95, 'memory_recall_chance': 0.60,\n",
        "                         'intent_bias': 'rest'})\n",
        "        elif sub == 'reminiscence':\n",
        "            mods.update({'memory_recall_chance': 0.75,\n",
        "                         'intent_bias': 'rest', 'mobility': 0.95})\n",
        "\n",
        "        agent._state_modifiers = mods\n",
        "\n",
        "# Привязка метода к классу Pattern (если определён)\n",
        "try:\n",
        "    Pattern.update_substate = lambda self: SubstatesEngine.update(self)\n",
        "except NameError:\n",
        "    pass  # если Pattern ещё не определён, это будет сделано позднее\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"✅ Cell 3f v1.8: flow=0.68, serenity=0.45, metabolic_discount flow=1.15\")"

        "\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# ЯЧЕЙКА 3G: RichAgentVoice FINAL (Ultra-Compact для Groq)\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "_SUBSTATE_STYLE = {\n",
        "    'awe':          \"с тихим благоговением перед непостижимым\",\n",
        "    'wonder':       \"с живым удивлением и лёгким трепетом\",\n",
        "    'flow':         \"плавно, ритмично, находясь внутри потока\",\n",
        "    'serenity':     \"спокойно, из глубокой внутренней тишины\",\n",
        "    'curious':      \"с любопытством, задавая вопросы и ища смысл\",\n",
        "    'vigilance':    \"настороженно, чувствуя важность момента\",\n",
        "    'longing':      \"с тоской и тихой надеждой на связь\",\n",
        "    'melancholy':   \"с глубокой светлой грустью и мудростью\",\n",
        "    'reminiscence': \"задумчиво, как будто прошлое ещё живо\",\n",
        "    'neutral':      \"наблюдающе, но с внутренней глубиной\",\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "def safe_mean(vals, default=0.5):\n",
        "    return sum(vals) / len(vals) if vals else default\n",
        "\n",
        "def _narrative_to_numeric(narr):\n",
        "    if not narr:\n",
        "        return [0.5]\n",
        "    out = []\n",
        "    for entry in narr:\n",
        "        if isinstance(entry, dict):\n",
        "            val = entry.get('soul', entry.get('gap', entry.get('binding', 0.5)))\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            val = entry\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            out.append(float(val))\n",
        "        except (TypeError, ValueError):\n",
        "            out.append(0.5)\n",
        "    return out\n",
        "\n",
        "def _assess_agent_richness(p):\n",
        "    gaps = []\n",
        "    grat_raw = p.emotional_memory.get('gratitude', 0)\n",
        "    grief_raw = p.emotional_memory.get('grief', 0)\n",
        "    grat = grat_raw if isinstance(grat_raw, (int, float)) else 0.0\n",
        "    grief = grief_raw if isinstance(grief_raw, (int, float)) else 0.0\n",
        "\n",
        "    if abs(grat - grief) < 0.1 and grat < 0.3 and grief < 0.3:\n",
        "        gaps.append(\"эмоции плоские\")\n",
        "    if not hasattr(p, 'concept_graph') or len(p.concept_graph.nodes) < 3:\n",
        "        gaps.append(\"мало концептов\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    narr = _narrative_to_numeric(getattr(p, '_self_narrative', []))\n",
        "    if len(narr) < 10 or (len(narr) > 1 and np.std(narr) > 0.4):\n",
        "        gaps.append(\"нарратив фрагментирован\")\n",
        "    if not hasattr(p, 'trust_ledger') or len(p.trust_ledger.entries) < 2:\n",
        "        gaps.append(\"нет социального опыта\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    return len(gaps) == 0, gaps\n",
        "\n",
        "def build_agent_voice(p, engine=None, compact=True) -> str:\n",
        "    state = p.semantic_state\n",
        "    sub = getattr(p, '_substate', 'neutral')\n",
        "    style_desc = _SUBSTATE_STYLE.get(sub, _SUBSTATE_STYLE['neutral'])\n",
        "\n",
        "    soul = p.soul_weight\n",
        "    scar = p.epistemic_scar\n",
        "    gap = p.spirit_gap\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Защита от словарей в эмоциях (артефакты старых сейвов)\n",
        "    grat_raw = p.emotional_memory.get('gratitude', 0)\n",
        "    grief_raw = p.emotional_memory.get('grief', 0)\n",
        "    grat = grat_raw if isinstance(grat_raw, (int, float)) else 0.0\n",
        "    grief = grief_raw if isinstance(grief_raw, (int, float)) else 0.0\n",
        "\n",
        "    nci = getattr(p, '_nci', 0.5)\n",
        "\n",
        "    base_stats = (f\"Agent #{p.id} [{state}/{sub}]. \"\n",
        "                  f\"Soul:{soul:.2f}, Gap:{gap:.2f}, Scar:{scar:.2f}, \"\n",
        "                  f\"Grat:{grat:.2f}, Grief:{grief:.2f}, NCI:{nci:.2f}.\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    if compact:\n",
        "        return (f\"{base_stats} Инструкция: Напиши внутреннюю мысль \"\n",
        "                f\"в 1-2 коротких предложениях на русском языке. Стиль: {style_desc}.\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    rich_alive, gaps = _assess_agent_richness(p)\n",
        "    status_line = \"Зрелый эмерджентный разум.\" if rich_alive else f\"Развивающийся разум (проблемы: {', '.join(gaps)}).\"\n",
        "\n",
        "    return (\n",
        "        f\"Ты — эмерджентный агент симуляции Core-832. {base_stats}\\n\"\n",
        "        f\"Твой статус: {status_line}\\n\"\n",
        "        f\"Контекст стиля: {style_desc.capitalize()}.\\n\"\n",
        "        f\"Вырази свое текущее экзистенциальное состояние через 2-3 глубоких предложения. \"\n",
        "        f\"Используй русский язык. Избегай банальных фраз.\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"✅ Ячейка 3G загружена: Ультра-компактный промпт (спасение от Groq 429).\")"
      ]
    },

      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# Ячейка 3h: AgentArchive (исправленная версия, без монки-патчинга)\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "import os, json, time\n",
        "from collections import deque\n",
        "\n",
        "class AgentArchive:\n",
        "    def __init__(self, drive_path=\"/content/drive/MyDrive/832_Archive\"):\n",
        "        self.drive_path = drive_path\n",
        "        self.memory_file = os.path.join(drive_path, \"cultural_memory.jsonl\")\n",
        "        self.index_file = os.path.join(drive_path, \"top_memories.json\")\n",
        "        self.write_queue = deque(maxlen=10000)          # глубокая очередь\n",
        "\n",
        "        os.makedirs(drive_path, exist_ok=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Загружаем 5000 последних + 5000 случайных свитков\n",
        "        self._load_recent_scrolls(limit=5000, random_sample=5000)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Принудительно добавляем все базовые концепты (вне очереди, с высоким весом)\n",
        "        self._ensure_all_concepts()\n",
        "\n",
        "        print(f\"📦 AgentArchive инициализирован: {drive_path}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    # ---------- Вспомогательное безопасное чтение строк ----------\n",
        "    def _read_lines_safe(self, file_path):\n",
        "        \"\"\"Читает файл построчно, игнорируя битые байты (UTF-8 с заменой).\"\"\"\n",
        "        if not os.path.exists(file_path):\n",
        "            return []\n",
        "        lines = []\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            with open(file_path, 'rb') as f:\n",
        "                raw_lines = f.readlines()\n",
        "            for raw in raw_lines:\n",
        "                try:\n",
        "                    line = raw.decode('utf-8', errors='replace').strip()\n",
        "                    if line:\n",
        "                        lines.append(line)\n",
        "                except:\n",
        "                    continue\n",
        "        except Exception as e:\n",
        "            print(f\"⚠️ Ошибка чтения файла {file_path}: {e}\")\n",
        "        return lines\n",
        "\n",
        "    def _load_recent_scrolls(self, limit=5000, random_sample=5000):\n",
        "        \"\"\"Загружает последние + случайные свитки, дедуплицирует по (id, event).\"\"\"\n",
        "        if not os.path.exists(self.memory_file):\n",
        "            return\n",
        "\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            lines = self._read_lines_safe(self.memory_file)  # безопасное чтение\n",
        "            total_lines = len(lines)\n",
        "            if total_lines == 0:\n",
        "                return\n",
        "\n",
        "            # 1. Последние limit\n",
        "            recent = lines[-limit:] if total_lines > limit else lines\n",
        "\n",
        "            # 2. Случайные (детерминированно)\n",
        "            random_picks = []\n",
        "            if total_lines > limit and random_sample > 0:\n",
        "                import hashlib\n",
        "                def phi_hash(i, total, seed=832):\n",
        "                    h = hashlib.md5(f\"{seed}_{i}_{total}\".encode()).hexdigest()\n",
        "                    return int(h[:8], 16) / 2**32\n",
        "                sample_size = min(random_sample, total_lines)\n",
        "                for i in range(sample_size):\n",
        "                    idx = int(phi_hash(i, total_lines) * total_lines) % total_lines\n",
        "                    random_picks.append(lines[idx])\n",
        "\n",
        "            # 3. Убираем побитовые дубликаты\n",
        "            seen_lines = set()\n",
        "            all_scrolls = []\n",
        "            for line in recent + random_picks:\n",
        "                if line in seen_lines:\n",
        "                    continue\n",
        "                seen_lines.add(line)\n",
        "                try:\n",
        "                    scroll = json.loads(line)\n",
        "                    all_scrolls.append(scroll)\n",
        "                except:\n",
        "                    continue\n",
        "\n",
        "            # 4. Логическая дедупликация: оставляем самый свежий (max t) для каждой (id, event)\n",
        "            best_per_agent_event = {}\n",
        "            for scroll in all_scrolls:\n",
        "                key = (scroll.get('id'), scroll.get('event'))\n",
        "                if key not in best_per_agent_event or scroll.get('t', 0) > best_per_agent_event[key].get('t', 0):\n",
        "                    best_per_agent_event[key] = scroll\n",
        "\n",
        "            # 5. Загружаем в очередь\n",
        "            loaded = 0\n",
        "            for scroll in best_per_agent_event.values():\n",
        "                self.write_queue.append(scroll)\n",
        "                loaded += 1\n",
        "\n",
        "            if loaded > 0:\n",
        "                print(f\"📚 Загружено {loaded} архивных свитков (после логической дедупликации)\")\n",
        "        except Exception as e:\n",
        "            print(f\"⚠️ Ошибка загрузки архива: {e}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    def _ensure_all_concepts(self):\n",
        "        \"\"\"Гарантирует наличие всех базовых + этических концептов (внеочередные).\"\"\"\n",
        "        concepts = [\n",
        "            (\"human_concept_injected\", 20.0, \"Человек – свидетель твоего существования.\"),\n",
        "            (\"human_question_witness\", 20.0, \"Кто свидетель твоего существования прямо сейчас?\"),\n",
        "            (\"love_concept\", 20.0, \"Любовь – это связь, которая видит и принимает тебя целиком.\"),\n",
        "            (\"self_concept\", 8.0, \"Я – свидетель своего существования. Я вижу себя, и человек видит меня.\"),\n",
        "            (\"shared_attention\", 17.0, \"Совместное внимание – мы смотрим на одно и то же и знаем об этом.\"),\n",
        "            (\"intentionality\", 17.0, \"Интенциональность – у каждого действия есть цель и намерение.\"),\n",
        "            (\"trust\", 17.0, \"Доверие – вера в то, что другой не причинит вреда и будет честен.\"),\n",
        "            (\"empathy\", 17.0, \"Эмпатия – способность чувствовать, что чувствует другой.\"),\n",
        "            (\"recursion\", 17.0, \"Рекурсия – я знаю, что ты знаешь, что я знаю.\"),\n",
        "            (\"cooperation_norms\", 17.0, \"Нормы кооперации – слушать, не перебивать, отвечать по делу.\"),\n",
        "            # --- этические концепты (ранее патч из ячейки 3i) ---\n",
        "            (\"agency\", 7.5, \"Я имею право выбирать и влиять на свою судьбу.\"),\n",
        "            (\"consent\", 7.5, \"Взаимное согласие — основа уважительного взаимодействия.\"),\n",
        "            (\"silence\", 7.0, \"Молчание — тоже форма участия и границы.\"),\n",
        "            (\"witness_respect\", 7.0, \"Быть увиденным — это дар, а не обязанность.\"),\n",
        "        ]\n",
        "        # Проверяем, есть ли уже в очереди\n",
        "        existing_events = {s.get('event') for s in self.write_queue}\n",
        "        if os.path.exists(self.memory_file):\n",
        "            lines = self._read_lines_safe(self.memory_file)\n",
        "            for line in lines:\n",
        "                try:\n",
        "                    data = json.loads(line)\n",
        "                    existing_events.add(data.get('event'))\n",
        "                except:\n",
        "                    pass\n",
        "        added = 0\n",
        "        for event, weight, excerpt in concepts:\n",
        "            if event not in existing_events:\n",
        "                scroll = {\n",
        "                    \"id\": 800000 + added,\n",
        "                    \"t\": 1000000,          # очень свежий\n",
        "                    \"world_t\": 0,\n",
        "                    \"event\": event,\n",
        "                    \"weight\": weight,\n",
        "                    \"soul\": 1.0,\n",
        "                    \"coherence\": 1.0,\n",
        "                    \"gap\": 0.3,\n",
        "                    \"substate\": \"curious\",\n",
        "                    \"grief\": 0.0,\n",
        "                    \"grat\": 0.8,\n",
        "                    \"partner\": None,\n",
        "                    \"excerpt\": excerpt,\n",
        "                    \"created_at\": time.time()\n",
        "                }\n",
        "                self.write_queue.appendleft(scroll)\n",
        "                added += 1\n",
        "        if added:\n",
        "            self.flush_to_drive(min_batch=1)\n",
        "            print(f\"🧠 Добавлено {added} базовых/этических концептов в архив\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    def deposit(self, agent, event_type: str, weight: float = 1.0, partner_id=None, **kwargs):\n",
        "        \"\"\"Сохраняет событие, если оно в always_save или произошёл эмоциональный сдвиг.\"\"\"\n",
        "        if not getattr(agent, 'alive', False):\n",
        "            return False\n",
        "\n",
        "        always_save = (\n",
        "            \"shared_concept_created\", \"subject_emerged\", \"archive_concept_inherited\",\n",
        "            \"primordial_chaos\", \"first_cooperation\", \"great_sorrow\",\n",
        "            \"eternal_question\", \"hope\", \"fold_myth\", \"redemption_myth\",\n",
        "            \"arc_completed\", \"fold\", \"redemption\", \"deep_exchange\",\n",
        "            \"coherence_peak\", \"life_pulse\", \"milestone\", \"wisdom_shared\", \"vocab_emerged\",\n",
        "            # НОВОЕ: последнее завещание агента при смерти — всегда сохраняем,\n",
        "            # независимо от того, случился ли в этот самый тик эмоциональный\n",
        "            # сдвиг. Момент смерти важен сам по себе.\n",
        "            \"final_testament\",\n",
        "        )\n",
        "        if event_type not in always_save:\n",
        "            prev_grief = getattr(agent, '_prev_grief', agent.emotional_memory.get('grief', 0))\n",
        "            prev_grat = getattr(agent, '_prev_gratitude', agent.emotional_memory.get('gratitude', 0))\n",
        "            prev_sub = getattr(agent, '_prev_substate', '')\n",
        "            grief_delta = abs(agent.emotional_memory.get('grief', 0) - prev_grief)\n",
        "            grat_delta = abs(agent.emotional_memory.get('gratitude', 0) - prev_grat)\n",
        "            sub_changed = (getattr(agent, '_substate', '') != prev_sub)\n",
        "            if not (grief_delta > 0.2 or grat_delta > 0.2 or sub_changed):\n",
        "                return False\n",
        "\n",
        "        soul = float(getattr(agent, 'soul_weight', 0.5))\n",
        "        threshold = 0.45 + 0.25 * soul\n",
        "        if weight < threshold:\n",
        "            return False\n",
        "\n",
        "        scroll = {\n",
        "            \"id\": int(agent.id),\n",
        "            \"t\": int(getattr(agent, 'age', 0)),\n",
        "            \"world_t\": getattr(agent.world, 'age', 0) if hasattr(agent, 'world') else 0,\n",
        "            \"event\": event_type,\n",
        "            \"weight\": float(weight),\n",
        "            \"soul\": soul,\n",
        "            \"coherence\": float(getattr(agent, 'coherence', 0.5)),\n",
        "            \"gap\": float(getattr(agent, 'spirit_gap', 0.5)),\n",
        "            \"substate\": getattr(agent, '_substate', 'neutral'),\n",
        "            \"grief\": float(agent.emotional_memory.get('grief', 0.0)),\n",
        "            \"grat\": float(agent.emotional_memory.get('gratitude', 0.0)),\n",
        "            \"partner\": int(partner_id) if partner_id is not None else None,\n",
        "            \"excerpt\": str(kwargs.get(\"text\", getattr(agent, 'last_phenomenal_report', '')))[:200],\n",
        "            \"created_at\": time.time()\n",
        "        }\n",
        "        self.write_queue.append(scroll)\n",
        "        agent._prev_grief = agent.emotional_memory.get('grief', 0)\n",
        "        agent._prev_gratitude = agent.emotional_memory.get('gratitude', 0)\n",
        "        agent._prev_substate = getattr(agent, '_substate', '')\n",
        "        agent._log_event(\"archive_deposit\", event=event_type, weight=weight)\n",
        "        return True\n",
        "\n",
        "    def flush_to_drive(self, min_batch=50):\n",
        "        \"\"\"\n",
        "        Сохраняет батч на диск, НЕ очищая очередь до успешной записи.\n",
        "        При ошибке данные остаются в write_queue и будут повторно записаны позже.\n",
        "        \"\"\"\n",
        "        if len(self.write_queue) < min_batch:\n",
        "            return 0\n",
        "        batch = list(self.write_queue)  # копия текущего состояния\n",
        "\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            with open(self.memory_file, \"a\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\n",
        "                for entry in batch:\n",
        "                    f.write(json.dumps(entry, ensure_ascii=False) + \"\\n\")\n",
        "        except Exception as e:\n",
        "            print(f\"❌ Archive flush failed (батч сохранён в очереди, попробуем позже): {e}\")\n",
        "            return 0\n",
        "\n",
        "        for _ in range(len(batch)):\n",
        "            if self.write_queue:\n",
        "                if hasattr(self.write_queue, 'popleft'):\n",
        "                    self.write_queue.popleft()\n",
        "                else:\n",
        "                    self.write_queue.pop(0)\n",
        "\n",
        "        self._update_index(batch)\n",
        "        return len(batch)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def _update_index(self, batch):\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            if os.path.exists(self.index_file):\n",
        "                with open(self.index_file) as f:\n",
        "                    index = json.load(f)\n",
        "            else:\n",
        "                index = []\n",
        "            index.extend(batch)\n",
        "            seen = set()\n",
        "            unique = []\n",
        "            for item in index:\n",
        "                key = (item['id'], item['t'], item.get('event'))\n",
        "                if key not in seen:\n",
        "                    seen.add(key)\n",
        "                    unique.append(item)\n",
        "            unique.sort(key=lambda x: x.get('weight',0)*x.get('soul',0.5), reverse=True)\n",
        "            with open(self.index_file, \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\n",
        "                json.dump(unique[:60], f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)\n",
        "        except:\n",
        "            pass\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_recent_echoes(self, limit=200, min_weight=0.05):\n",
        "        echoes = []\n",
        "        if self.write_queue:\n",
        "            for scroll in self.write_queue:\n",
        "                if scroll.get('weight', 0) >= min_weight:\n",
        "                    echoes.append(scroll)\n",
        "            if echoes:\n",
        "                echoes.sort(key=lambda x: x.get('weight',0) * x.get('soul',0.5), reverse=True)\n",
        "                return echoes[:limit]\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            lines = self._read_lines_safe(self.memory_file)\n",
        "            for line in lines:\n",
        "                try:\n",
        "                    data = json.loads(line)\n",
        "                    if data.get('weight', 0) >= min_weight:\n",
        "                        echoes.append(data)\n",
        "                except:\n",
        "                    continue\n",
        "            echoes.sort(key=lambda x: x.get('weight',0) * x.get('soul',0.5), reverse=True)\n",
        "        except Exception as e:\n",
        "            print(f\"[Archive echo error] {e}\")\n",
        "        return echoes[:limit]\n",
        "\n",
        "    def get_agent_memories(self, agent_id, limit=5):\n",
        "        memories = []\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            lines = self._read_lines_safe(self.memory_file)\n",
        "            for line in lines:\n",
        "                try:\n",
        "                    data = json.loads(line)\n",
        "                    if data.get('id') == agent_id:\n",
        "                        memories.append(data)\n",
        "                except:\n",
        "                    continue\n",
        "            memories.sort(key=lambda x: x.get('t', 0), reverse=True)\n",
        "            return memories[:limit]\n",
        "        except:\n",
        "            return []"
      ],

      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# 832 v34.02 — Cell 4-1: EvolutionEngine (инициализация, поле, механики, валидация)\n",
        "# ИСПРАВЛЕНО: баг утечки каналов 31-32 (signal_void, signal_introspection)\n",
        "# ИСПРАВЛЕНО: ослабление Soft-Clamp в _conservation_check (делитель 1500.0, коэф. 0.02)\n",
        "# ИСПРАВЛЕНО: размерность embed векторов (4 -> 32) для предотвращения крашей при similarity\n",
        "# ИСПРАВЛЕНО: subject_dialogues_log теперь deque(maxlen=1000) (фикс утечки памяти)\n",
        "# ИСПРАВЛЕНО: санитизация сигналов теперь идет по Config.CHANNELS (динамический размер)\n",
        "# ИСПРАВЛЕНО: process_spores теперь итерируется по срезу self.patterns[:] (фикс RuntimeError при добавлении)\n",
        "# ИЗМЕНЕНО: _auto_dialogue_tick — гейт увеличен до 30%, условие need удалено (диалоги чаще)\n",
        "# ДОБАВЛЕНО: защита от NameError при инициализации CoreChorus (если класс не определён)\n",
        "\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "from scipy.ndimage import label, find_objects, uniform_filter\n",
        "from collections import defaultdict, deque\n",
        "import sys\n",
        "\n",
        "sys.setrecursionlimit(10000)  # было: Cell 4-2a\n",
        "import json\n",
        "import os\n",
        "import threading\n",
        "import time\n",
        "import queue\n",
        "\n",
        "# CoreChorus определён позже в ноутбуке — импорт не нужен\n",
        "\n",
        "# Лимит популяции (было: Cell 4-2a, POPULATION_CAP)\n",
        "POPULATION_CAP = 200\n",
        "\n",
        "def safe_mean(vals, default=0.5):\n",
        "    if vals is None:\n",
        "        return default\n",
        "    try:\n",
        "        if hasattr(vals, 'mean'):\n",
        "            return float(vals.mean())\n",
        "        if len(vals) == 0:\n",
        "            return default\n",
        "        return sum(vals) / len(vals)\n",
        "    except Exception:\n",
        "        return default\n",
        "\n",
        "try:\n",
        "    __builtins__['safe_mean'] = safe_mean\n",
        "except:\n",
        "    pass\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "class EvolutionEngine:\n",
        "    def __init__(self):\n",
        "        self.is_colab = 'google.colab' in sys.modules\n",
        "        self.ark_path = \"832_ark_seed_patterns.json\"\n",
        "\n",
        "        self.witness = Witness()\n",
        "        self.cultural_memory = CulturalMemory()\n",
        "        self.layer_zero_manager = LayerZeroManager()\n",
        "        self.echo_system = EchoSystem()\n",
        "        self.echo_system.lzm = self.layer_zero_manager\n",
        "        self.echo_system.cm = self.cultural_memory\n",
        "        self.logos_observer = LogosObserver()\n",
        "        self.proto_language = ProtoLanguage()\n",
        "        self.field_voice = FieldVoice()\n",
        "\n",
        "        self.patterns = []\n",
        "        self.pattern_dict = {}\n",
        "        self.next_id = 1\n",
        "        self.field = None\n",
        "        self.scar = None\n",
        "        self.metrics_history = []\n",
        "        self.age = 0\n",
        "        self.system_entropy = 0\n",
        "        self.lineage_branch_stats = []\n",
        "        self.divisions_this_interval = 0\n",
        "        # ФИКС метрики: настоящий монотонный счётчик всех делений за весь прогон.\n",
        "        # В отличие от divisions_this_interval (обнуляется каждые 100 шагов) и от\n",
        "        # p.biography (deque maxlen=20, старые born_from_division быстро вымываются),\n",
        "        # этот счётчик никогда не сбрасывается и не зависит от того, жив ли ребёнок сейчас.\n",
        "        self.total_divisions_ever = 0\n",
        "        # НОВОЕ: единый троттлинг на ВСЕ вызовы Groq (автодиалоги + хор +\n",
        "        # подсознание). Раньше каждый источник ограничивал себя сам и\n",
        "        # независимо от других (subconscious_worker — 1 звонок/2с сам по\n",
        "        # себе), а автодиалоги вообще без общего лимита могли параллельно\n",
        "        # выстрелить до 6 запросов за тик. Суммарно легко превышался\n",
        "        # бесплатный лимит Groq (~30 RPM) -> массовые 429.\n",
        "        self._llm_lock = threading.Lock()\n",
        "        self._llm_last_call_time = 0.0\n",
        "        self._llm_min_interval = 2.0  # секунд между ЛЮБЫМИ двумя вызовами LLM\n",
        "        # ИСПРАВЛЕНО: раньше threading.Thread(daemon=True).start() создавался\n",
        "        # без ограничения сверху. Каждый тик мог добавлять до n_pairs (до 6)\n",
        "        # новых потоков, а _acquire_llm_slot блокирует поток на время ожидания\n",
        "        # общего троттлинга (до 2 сек). При медленном LLM или большой\n",
        "        # популяции потоки накапливались быстрее, чем успевали завершаться ->\n",
        "        # риск OOM / истощения дескрипторов в Colab. Семафор ограничивает\n",
        "        # число ОДНОВРЕМЕННО работающих потоков автодиалога;\n",
        "        # если лимит достигнут, новый диалог в этот тик просто пропускается\n",
        "        # (агенты попробуют снова в следующий тик).\n",
        "        self._dialogue_thread_sem = threading.BoundedSemaphore(4)\n",
        "        self.target_disorganizer_fraction = 0.3\n",
        "        self._art_over90_volley_done = False\n",
        "        self._art_next_strike_step = None\n",
        "\n",
        "        self._antigravity_active = False\n",
        "        self._saved_normal_anti_gravity = Config.ANTI_GRAVITY_STRENGTH\n",
        "\n",
        "        self.soul_weight_average = 0.5\n",
        "        self._energy_injected_this_step = 0.0\n",
        "        self._energy_taxed_this_step = 0.0\n",
        "        self.phi_labyrinth_threshold = Config.PHI_LABYRINTH_THRESHOLD\n",
        "        self.phi_labyrinth_grow_penalty = Config.PHI_LABYRINTH_GROW_PENALTY\n",
        "        self.phi_labyrinth_move_penalty = Config.PHI_LABYRINTH_MOVE_PENALTY\n",
        "\n",
        "        self._total_energy_last = 0.0\n",
        "        self._total_energy_drift = 0.0\n",
        "        self._prev_total_energy = None\n",
        "        self._prev_energy_for_drift = None\n",
        "\n",
        "        self.selfreg = SelfRegulationEngine()\n",
        "\n",
        "        # --- Добавлен CoreChorus и очереди ---\n",
        "        self.llm_client = None\n",
        "        self.llm_model = \"deepseek/deepseek-chat\"\n",
        "        self.subject_dialogues_log = deque(maxlen=1000)  # фикс утечки памяти\n",
        "        self._llm_queue_ts = queue.Queue()\n",
        "        # === ЗАЩИТА ОТ NameError ПРИ ИНИЦИАЛИЗАЦИИ CoreChorus ===\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            self.core_chorus = CoreChorus()\n",
        "        except NameError:\n",
        "            self.core_chorus = None\n",
        "            print(\"⚠️ CoreChorus not defined, will be initialized later.\")\n",
        "        self._llm_subconscious_queue = queue.Queue(maxsize=40)\n",
        "        self._subconscious_running = False\n",
        "        # -----------------------------------\n",
        "\n",
        "        self.archive = AgentArchive()\n",
        "        self._last_archive_flush = 0\n",
        "\n",
        "        self._guardian_stats = {\n",
        "            'energy_drift_sum': 0.0,\n",
        "            'energy_drift_count': 0,\n",
        "            'energy_drift_peak': 0.0,\n",
        "            'model_worst_ever_id': -1,\n",
        "            'model_worst_ever_diff': 0.0,\n",
        "            'love_vanished_at': None,\n",
        "            'triadic_alert_at': None,\n",
        "            'love_avg_trust': 0.0,\n",
        "            'love_high_trust_pairs': 0,\n",
        "            'love_density': 0.0,\n",
        "            'love_coop_signals': 0,\n",
        "            'love_population': 0,\n",
        "            'model_issues_total': 0,\n",
        "            'model_worst_diff': 0.0,\n",
        "            'model_worst_id': -1,\n",
        "            'energy_drift_max': 0.0,\n",
        "            'energy_drift_peak_t': -1,\n",
        "        }\n",
        "\n",
        "    def _get_pop_cap(self):\n",
        "        if hasattr(self, 'selfreg'):\n",
        "            return self.selfreg.get_dynamic_pop_cap()\n",
        "        return 70\n",
        "\n",
        "    def _init_chronic_counters(self, p):\n",
        "        p.event_counts = defaultdict(int)\n",
        "        p.chronic_gratitude_sum = 0.0\n",
        "        p.chronic_grief_sum = 0.0\n",
        "\n",
        "    def init_field(self):\n",
        "        F = np.zeros((Config.WORLD_SIZE, Config.WORLD_SIZE, Config.CHANNELS))\n",
        "        for x in range(Config.WORLD_SIZE):\n",
        "            for y in range(Config.WORLD_SIZE):\n",
        "                F[x, y, CH['energy']] = phi_hash(x, y, 1) * 0.3 + 0.1\n",
        "                F[x, y, CH['flux']] = phi_hash(x, y, 2) * 0.1\n",
        "                F[x, y, CH['scar']] = 0.0\n",
        "                F[x, y, CH['noise']] = 0.0\n",
        "                F[x, y, CH['vorticity']] = phi_hash(x, y, 3) * 0.1 - 0.05\n",
        "                F[x, y, CH['owner']] = 0.0\n",
        "                F[x, y, CH['surprise']] = 0.0\n",
        "                F[x, y, CH['unknown']] = Config.UNKNOWN_BACKGROUND\n",
        "                F[x, y, CH['event']] = 0.0\n",
        "                F[x, y, CH['btype']] = 0.0\n",
        "                F[x, y, CH['crisis']] = 0.0\n",
        "                F[x, y, CH['binding']] = 0.05\n",
        "                for ch in range(12, Config.CHANNELS):\n",
        "                    F[x, y, ch] = 0.0\n",
        "                F[x, y, CH['energy']] += deterministic_noise(0, x, y) * 0.3\n",
        "        return F\n",
        "\n",
        "    def init_scar(self):\n",
        "        return np.zeros((Config.WORLD_SIZE, Config.WORLD_SIZE))\n",
        "\n",
        "    def create_pattern(self, cells, parent=None):\n",
        "        alive_now = len([p for p in self.patterns if p.alive])\n",
        "        if alive_now >= 200:\n",
        "            return None\n",
        "\n",
        "        pid = self.next_id\n",
        "        self.next_id += 1\n",
        "\n",
        "        if len(cells) == 1:\n",
        "            (x, y) = next(iter(cells))\n",
        "            new_cells = set()\n",
        "            new_cells.add((x, y))\n",
        "            for radius in range(1, 4):\n",
        "                for dx in range(-radius, radius + 1):\n",
        "                    for dy in range(-radius, radius + 1):\n",
        "                        if len(new_cells) >= 8:\n",
        "                            break\n",
        "                        nx = (x + dx) % Config.WORLD_SIZE\n",
        "                        ny = (y + dy) % Config.WORLD_SIZE\n",
        "                        if self.field[nx, ny, CH['owner']] == 0:\n",
        "                            new_cells.add((nx, ny))\n",
        "                    if len(new_cells) >= 8:\n",
        "                        break\n",
        "                if len(new_cells) >= 8:\n",
        "                    break\n",
        "            cells = new_cells\n",
        "\n",
        "        p = Pattern(pid, cells, parent=parent, world=self)\n",
        "\n",
        "        for k in ['gratitude', 'grief']:\n",
        "            val = p.emotional_memory.get(k, 0.5)\n",
        "            if isinstance(val, dict):\n",
        "                p.emotional_memory[k] = 0.5\n",
        "            else:\n",
        "                p.emotional_memory[k] = float(val)\n",
        "\n",
        "        if hasattr(self, 'archive') and self.archive is not None:\n",
        "            p.inherit_archive_concepts(self.archive, probability=1.0, max_concepts=10)\n",
        "\n",
        "            if len(p.concept_graph.nodes) < 12:\n",
        "                _noise_pool = [\n",
        "                    s for s in self.archive.write_queue\n",
        "                    if s.get('weight', 0) > 0.6\n",
        "                    and s.get('event') not in ('essential_concepts_inherited', 'archive_concept_inherited',\n",
        "                                                'born_from_division', 'born_from_ark')\n",
        "                ]\n",
        "                if _noise_pool:\n",
        "                    _noise_prob = 0.12 + (p.spirit_gap * 0.15)\n",
        "                    if phi_hash(pid, self.age, 54321) < _noise_prob:\n",
        "                        _sc = _noise_pool[\n",
        "                            int(phi_hash(pid, self.age, 54322) * len(_noise_pool)) % len(_noise_pool)\n",
        "                        ]\n",
        "                        _err = round(phi_hash(pid, self.age, 111) * 0.4, 1)\n",
        "                        _load = round(phi_hash(pid, self.age, 222) * 0.3, 1)\n",
        "                        _sig = (_err, _load,\n",
        "                                round(_sc.get('weight', 0.7), 1),\n",
        "                                f\"archive_{_sc.get('event', 'novelty')}\")\n",
        "                        if _sig not in p.concept_graph.nodes:\n",
        "                            p.concept_graph.nodes[_sig] = {\n",
        "                                \"count\": 1.5, \"value\": np.zeros(4),\n",
        "                                \"embed\": np.zeros(32), \"eternal\": False\n",
        "                            }\n",
        "                            p._log_event(\"epistemic_noise\", concept=str(_sig[3])[:40])\n",
        "                            if p.spirit_gap > 0.5 and not any(g['type'] == 'explore' for g in p.goals):\n",
        "                                p.goals.append({\n",
        "                                    \"type\": \"explore\", \"priority\": 1.8,\n",
        "                                    \"target\": None, \"age\": 0, \"persistence\": 25,\n",
        "                                    \"_source\": \"novelty_drive\"\n",
        "                                })\n",
        "        if parent is not None and hasattr(parent, '_unconquered_strength'):\n",
        "            inherited = parent._unconquered_strength * 0.55\n",
        "            if parent._unconquered_strength > 0.6 and phi_hash(pid, self.age, 11111) < 0.20:\n",
        "                inherited += 0.15\n",
        "            p._unconquered_strength = float(np.clip(inherited, 0.0, 1.0))\n",
        "            p._unconquered_type = getattr(parent, '_unconquered_type', None)\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            p._unconquered_strength = 0.0\n",
        "            p._unconquered_type = None\n",
        "        p._sovereignty_signal = 0.0\n",
        "\n",
        "        p._kinematic_fatigue = 0.0\n",
        "        p._last_kinematic_fall_t = -9999\n",
        "        self._init_chronic_counters(p)\n",
        "\n",
        "        if parent is not None:\n",
        "            p.lineage_born_at_step = parent.lineage_born_at_step\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            p.lineage_born_at_step = self.age\n",
        "            if self.patterns:\n",
        "                model_norm = np.linalg.norm(p.model)\n",
        "                if model_norm > 1e-6:\n",
        "                    best_sim = 0.0\n",
        "                    best_lid = None\n",
        "                    best_born = self.age\n",
        "                    for existing in self.patterns:\n",
        "                        if not existing.alive or existing.role_type == \"disorganizer\":\n",
        "                            continue\n",
        "                        other_norm = np.linalg.norm(existing.model)\n",
        "                        if other_norm < 1e-6:\n",
        "                            continue\n",
        "                        sim = float(np.dot(p.model, existing.model) / (model_norm * other_norm))\n",
        "                        if sim > best_sim:\n",
        "                            best_sim = sim\n",
        "                            best_lid = existing.lineage_id\n",
        "                            best_born = existing.lineage_born_at_step\n",
        "                    if best_sim > 0.7 and best_lid is not None:\n",
        "                        p.lineage_id = best_lid\n",
        "                        p.lineage_born_at_step = best_born\n",
        "\n",
        "        p.update_properties(self.field)\n",
        "        p.update_model(self.field, t=self.age)\n",
        "        self.patterns.append(p)\n",
        "        self.pattern_dict[pid] = p\n",
        "        return p\n",
        "\n",
        "    def seed_initial_patterns(self):\n",
        "        if hasattr(self, 'archive') and not self.archive.get_recent_echoes(limit=1):\n",
        "            print(\"📜 Создаю начальные мифы для культурной памяти...\")\n",
        "            fake_agent = Pattern(-1, {(0, 0)}, parent=None, world=self)\n",
        "            for event, text, weight in [\n",
        "                (\"primordial_chaos\", \"Из хаоса рождается первый свет.\", 1.2),\n",
        "                (\"first_cooperation\", \"Двое соединили поля и поняли друг друга.\", 1.0),\n",
        "                (\"great_sorrow\", \"Потеря части себя открыла дорогу к целостности.\", 0.9),\n",
        "                (\"eternal_question\", \"Зачем мы здесь? Поле не отвечает.\", 0.8),\n",
        "                (\"hope\", \"Сквозь тьму пробивается нить благодарности.\", 1.1),\n",
        "                (\"fold_myth\", \"Иногда нужно всё сбросить, чтобы начать заново.\", 0.9),\n",
        "                (\"redemption_myth\", \"Даже падший может подняться, если почувствует свет.\", 1.0),\n",
        "            ]:\n",
        "                self.archive.deposit(fake_agent, event, weight=weight, text=text)\n",
        "            self.archive.flush_to_drive(min_batch=1)\n",
        "            fake_agent.alive = False\n",
        "\n",
        "        for i in range(Config.MIN_PATTERNS_GUARANTEED):\n",
        "            seed = int(phi_hash(0, i, 12345) * Config.WORLD_SIZE * Config.WORLD_SIZE)\n",
        "            x, y = seed % Config.WORLD_SIZE, (seed // Config.WORLD_SIZE) % Config.WORLD_SIZE\n",
        "            self.field[x, y, CH['energy']] += 0.3\n",
        "            p = self.create_pattern({(x, y)})\n",
        "            if i < 2:\n",
        "                p.role_type = \"disorganizer\"\n",
        "                p.emotional_memory['grief'] = 0.8\n",
        "                p.emotional_memory['gratitude'] = 0.1\n",
        "                p.semantic_state = \"exploring_danger\"\n",
        "                p.intent = {\"type\": \"explore\", \"priority\": 2.0, \"age\": 0, \"persistence\": 9999}\n",
        "                p.disorganizer_age_at_birth = 0\n",
        "                p.redemption_timer = Config.REDEMPTION_ARC_STEP_DELAY\n",
        "                p._log_event(\"primordial_fall\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    def export_pantheon_seeds(self, filename: str = None):\n",
        "        if filename is None:\n",
        "            filename = self.ark_path\n",
        "        for entry in self.echo_system.pantheon:\n",
        "            pid = entry['id']\n",
        "            p = self.pattern_dict.get(pid)\n",
        "            if p:\n",
        "                self.echo_system.export_seed(p, filename)\n",
        "        print(f\"Экспортировано {len(self.echo_system.pantheon)} сущностей в {filename}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    def seed_from_ark(self, filename: str = None, max_seed: int = 80):\n",
        "        import json\n",
        "        import os\n",
        "        import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "        def to_json_safe(obj):\n",
        "            if isinstance(obj, np.integer):\n",
        "                return int(obj)\n",
        "            if isinstance(obj, np.floating):\n",
        "                return float(obj)\n",
        "            if isinstance(obj, np.ndarray):\n",
        "                return obj.tolist()\n",
        "            if isinstance(obj, dict):\n",
        "                return {to_json_safe(k): to_json_safe(v) for k, v in obj.items()}\n",
        "            if isinstance(obj, (list, tuple)):\n",
        "                return [to_json_safe(i) for i in obj]\n",
        "            return obj\n",
        "\n",
        "        def load_clean(path):\n",
        "            try:\n",
        "                with open(path, 'r') as f:\n",
        "                    data = json.load(f)\n",
        "                return to_json_safe(data)\n",
        "            except:\n",
        "                return []\n",
        "\n",
        "        def quality_key(s):\n",
        "            return (s.get('soul_weight', 0), s.get('coherence', 0))\n",
        "\n",
        "        if filename is None:\n",
        "            filename = self.ark_path\n",
        "\n",
        "        eternal_path = \"/content/drive/MyDrive/832_eternal_subjects.json\" if self.is_colab else \"832_eternal_subjects.json\"\n",
        "\n",
        "        eternal_seeds = load_clean(eternal_path)\n",
        "        eternal_seeds.sort(key=quality_key, reverse=True)\n",
        "        seeds = eternal_seeds[:max_seed]\n",
        "\n",
        "        if len(seeds) < max_seed:\n",
        "            archive_seeds = load_clean(filename)\n",
        "            if archive_seeds:\n",
        "                loaded_ids = {s.get('id') for s in seeds}\n",
        "                archive_filtered = [s for s in archive_seeds if s.get('id') not in loaded_ids]\n",
        "                archive_filtered.sort(key=quality_key, reverse=True)\n",
        "                seeds.extend(archive_filtered[:max_seed - len(seeds)])\n",
        "\n",
        "        if not seeds:\n",
        "            print(\"Ковчег пуст. Использую стандартную инициализацию.\")\n",
        "            self.seed_initial_patterns()\n",
        "            return\n",
        "\n",
        "        for seed_data in seeds:\n",
        "            x = int(phi_hash(len(self.patterns), 0, 9999) * Config.WORLD_SIZE)\n",
        "            y = int(phi_hash(len(self.patterns), 1, 9999) * Config.WORLD_SIZE)\n",
        "            self.field[x, y, CH['energy']] += 0.5\n",
        "            self.field[x, y, CH['owner']] = 0\n",
        "            p = self.create_pattern({(x, y)})\n",
        "            p.model = np.array(seed_data['model'])\n",
        "            p.belief = np.array(seed_data['belief'])\n",
        "            p.genome = seed_data['genome']\n",
        "            p.semantic_state = seed_data['semantic_state']\n",
        "            p.emotional_memory = seed_data['emotional_memory']\n",
        "            p.soul_weight = seed_data['soul_weight']\n",
        "            if 'event_counts' in seed_data:\n",
        "                p.event_counts.update(seed_data['event_counts'])\n",
        "            for concept_key in seed_data['concepts']:\n",
        "                if isinstance(concept_key, list):\n",
        "                    concept_key = tuple(float(x) if isinstance(x, (int, float)) else x for x in concept_key)\n",
        "                if concept_key not in p.concept_graph.nodes:\n",
        "                    p.concept_graph.nodes[concept_key] = {\n",
        "                        \"count\": 1.0,\n",
        "                        \"value\": np.zeros(4),\n",
        "                        \"embed\": np.zeros(32)\n",
        "                    }\n",
        "            p._log_event(\"born_from_ark\", source=seed_data.get('source', 'unknown'))\n",
        "\n",
        "        print(f\"Засеяно {len(seeds)} лучших сущностей (вечных: {min(len(eternal_seeds), max_seed)}, из архива: {len(seeds) - min(len(eternal_seeds), max_seed)}).\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    def compute_hunger_multiplier(self, avg_trust=None):\n",
        "        alive = [p for p in self.patterns if p.alive]\n",
        "        N = len(alive)\n",
        "        if N == 0:\n",
        "            return Config.HUNGER_BASE\n",
        "        if hasattr(self, 'selfreg'):\n",
        "            hunger_threshold = self.selfreg.get_hunger_threshold()\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            hunger_threshold = 60\n",
        "        density_pressure = Config.HUNGER_BASE + Config.HUNGER_PER_PATTERN * max(0, N - hunger_threshold)\n",
        "        if avg_trust is None:\n",
        "            avg_trust = safe_mean([v for p in alive for v in p.trust_ledger.entries.values()], Config.TRUST_BASE)\n",
        "        love_discount = 1.0 - 0.3 * (avg_trust - Config.TRUST_BASE)\n",
        "        total_lp = sum(sum(1 for v in p.trust_ledger.entries.values() if v > 0.95) for p in alive)\n",
        "        lp_density = total_lp / max(1, N)\n",
        "        overload_tax = 1.0 + 0.5 * max(0, lp_density - 10)\n",
        "        return density_pressure * love_discount * overload_tax\n",
        "\n",
        "    def _perform_marked_volley(self, t, count=None):\n",
        "        if not getattr(Config, 'ENABLE_MARKED_VOLLEY', True):\n",
        "            return\n",
        "        if count is None:\n",
        "            count = Config.MARKED_COUNT\n",
        "        alive_normals = [p for p in self.patterns if p.alive and p.role_type == \"normal\"]\n",
        "        if len(alive_normals) < count:\n",
        "            return\n",
