        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# ЯЧЕЙКА 4.2в — ПАКЕТНЫЙ ХОР (урезанный промпт, интервал 200)\n",
        "# ИСПРАВЛЕНО: надежный парсинг JSON (баланс скобок, вложенность)\n",
        "# ИСПРАВЛЕНО: логическая ошибка кулдауна в subconscious_worker\n",
        "# ИСПРАВЛЕНО: инжекция энергии и тишины в поле при диалоге\n",
        "# ИСПРАВЛЕНО: размерность embed векторов (4 -> 32)\n",
        "# ИСПРАВЛЕНО: потокобезопасность в subconscious_worker (снимок списка)\n",
        "# ИСПРАВЛЕНО: генерация shared-концепта даже при падении Groq\n",
        "# ДОПОЛНИТЕЛЬНО: fallback при неудачном парсинге (не только при исключении)\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "import queue\n",
        "import threading\n",
        "import time\n",
        "import re\n",
        "import json\n",
        "import os\n",
        "import sys\n",
        "from collections import deque\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "try:\n",
        "    from __main__ import build_agent_voice\n",
        "except ImportError:\n",
        "    build_agent_voice = globals().get('build_agent_voice')\n",
        "    if build_agent_voice is None:\n",
        "        def build_agent_voice(p, engine=None, compact=False):\n",
        "            return f\"Ты — Паттерн #{p.id}. Состояние: {p.semantic_state}. Скажи что-нибудь.\"\n",
        "\n",
        "# ------------------ ВСПОМОГАТЕЛЬНЫЕ ФУНКЦИИ ------------------\n",
        "def _safe_float(value, default=0.0):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Безопасное преобразование в float с учётом возможных словарей.\"\"\"\n",
        "    if isinstance(value, dict):\n",
        "        for key in ['value', 'count', 'val', 'amount']:\n",
        "            if key in value and isinstance(value[key], (int, float)):\n",
        "                return float(value[key])\n",
        "        return default\n",
        "    if isinstance(value, (int, float)):\n",
        "        return float(value)\n",
        "    return default\n",
        "\n",
        "def extract_json(text: str) -> dict | None:\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    Извлекает первый валидный JSON-объект из строки, игнорируя любой мусор.\n",
        "    Использует баланс скобок, чтобы корректно обрабатывать вложенные структуры.\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    start = text.find('{')\n",
        "    if start == -1:\n",
        "        return None\n",
        "    stack = 0\n",
        "    in_string = False\n",
        "    escape = False\n",
        "    for i, ch in enumerate(text[start:], start):\n",
        "        if escape:\n",
        "            escape = False\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "        if ch == '\\\\':\n",
        "            escape = True\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "        if ch == '\"' and not escape:\n",
        "            in_string = not in_string\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "        if in_string:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "        if ch == '{':\n",
        "            stack += 1\n",
        "        elif ch == '}':\n",
        "            stack -= 1\n",
        "            if stack == 0:\n",
        "                json_str = text[start:i+1]\n",
        "                try:\n",
        "                    return json.loads(json_str)\n",
        "                except json.JSONDecodeError:\n",
        "                    return None\n",
        "    return None\n",
        "\n",
        "# ------------------ СОСТОЯНИЕ ХОРА (персистентное) ------------------\n",
        "_CHORUS_STATE_PATH = \"/content/drive/MyDrive/832_Archive/chorus_state.json\" \\\n",
        "    if 'google.colab' in sys.modules else \"832_chorus_state.json\"\n",
        "\n",
        "def _load_chorus_state():\n",
        "    default = {\n",
        "        \"total_dialogues\": 0,\n",
        "        \"total_concepts_shared\": 0,\n",
        "        \"runs\": 0,\n",
        "        \"wisdom\": 0.0,\n",
        "    }\n",
        "    try:\n",
        "        if os.path.exists(_CHORUS_STATE_PATH):\n",
        "            with open(_CHORUS_STATE_PATH, 'rb') as f:\n",
        "                data = json.loads(f.read().decode('utf-8', errors='replace'))\n",
        "            default.update(data)\n",
        "    except Exception:\n",
        "        pass\n",
        "    default[\"runs\"] += 1\n",
        "    return default\n",
        "\n",
        "def _save_chorus_state(state):\n",
        "    try:\n",
        "        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(_CHORUS_STATE_PATH) or \".\", exist_ok=True)\n",
        "        with open(_CHORUS_STATE_PATH, \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\n",
        "            json.dump(state, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)\n",
        "    except Exception:\n",
        "        pass\n",
        "\n",
        "_chorus_state = _load_chorus_state()\n",
        "\n",
        "# ------------------ ОСНОВНОЙ КЛАСС ХОРА ------------------\n",
        "class CoreChorus:\n",
        "    def __init__(self, persistent_state=None):\n",
        "        self.last_sync_step = -999\n",
        "        self.current_voices = []\n",
        "        self.history = deque(maxlen=50)\n",
        "        self._prev_state = None\n",
        "        self.min_cooldown = 10\n",
        "        self.dialogue_log = deque(maxlen=30)\n",
        "        self._regular_interval = 10\n",
        "        self._last_voice_step = {}\n",
        "        self.persistent = persistent_state if persistent_state is not None else _chorus_state\n",
        "\n",
        "    def select_voices(self, engine, n=3, t=0):\n",
        "        alive = [p for p in engine.patterns if p.alive]\n",
        "        if not alive:\n",
        "            return []\n",
        "        alive_civil = [p for p in alive if p.role_type != \"feral\"]\n",
        "        if not alive_civil:\n",
        "            return []\n",
        "\n",
        "        # ФИКС (справедливое распределение хора): раньше n был фиксирован в 3\n",
        "        # независимо от размера популяции, а кандидаты брались почти только\n",
        "        # из узкого пула \"subject_detected\" — при популяции 50-80 агентов\n",
        "        # это означало, что подавляющее большинство никогда не попадало в\n",
        "        # хор. Теперь размер хора масштабируется с популяцией.\n",
        "        n = max(3, min(10, len(alive_civil) // 8))\n",
        "\n",
        "        candidates = [p for p in alive_civil if getattr(p, '_subject_detected', False)]\n",
        "        if len(candidates) < n:\n",
        "            pool = sorted(alive_civil, key=lambda p: getattr(p, '_nci', 0.0), reverse=True)\n",
        "            candidates = pool[:max(n * 3, n)]\n",
        "        scored = []\n",
        "        for p in candidates:\n",
        "            nci = _safe_float(getattr(p, '_nci', 0.5))\n",
        "            binding = _safe_float(getattr(p, 'last_phenomenal_binding', 0.5))\n",
        "            soul = _safe_float(p.soul_weight)\n",
        "            base_score = (soul * 0.40 + binding * 0.35 + nci * 0.25)\n",
        "            last_spoken = self._last_voice_step.get(p.id, -10_000)\n",
        "            recency_penalty = max(0.0, 1.0 - (t - last_spoken) / 300.0)\n",
        "            score = base_score * (1.0 - 0.6 * recency_penalty)\n",
        "            scored.append((score, p))\n",
        "        scored.sort(key=lambda x: -x[0])\n",
        "        chosen = [p for _, p in scored[:n]]\n",
        "\n",
        "        # НОВОЕ: гарантированный \"wildcard\"-слот для самого молчаливого агента\n",
        "        # во всей популяции (не только среди кандидатов) — иначе агенты, у\n",
        "        # которых никогда не было высокого nci/binding, вообще никогда бы не\n",
        "        # попали в хор, даже спустя тысячи шагов.\n",
        "        if len(alive_civil) > n:\n",
        "            most_silent = max(\n",
        "                alive_civil,\n",
        "                key=lambda p: t - self._last_voice_step.get(p.id, -10_000)\n",
        "            )\n",
        "            if most_silent not in chosen:\n",
        "                if chosen:\n",
        "                    chosen[-1] = most_silent\n",
        "                else:\n",
        "                    chosen = [most_silent]\n",
        "\n",
        "        for p in chosen:\n",
        "            self._last_voice_step[p.id] = t\n",
        "        return chosen\n",
        "\n",
        "    def aggregate_state(self, engine):\n",
        "        alive = [p for p in engine.patterns if p.alive]\n",
        "        if not alive:\n",
        "            return None\n",
        "        griefs = [_safe_float(p.emotional_memory.get('grief', 0.0)) for p in alive]\n",
        "        grats = [_safe_float(p.emotional_memory.get('gratitude', 0.0)) for p in alive]\n",
        "        bindings = [_safe_float(getattr(p, 'last_phenomenal_binding', 0.5)) for p in alive]\n",
        "        gaps = [_safe_float(getattr(p, 'spirit_gap', 0.5)) for p in alive]\n",
        "        return {\n",
        "            'n': len(alive),\n",
        "            'avg_grief': float(np.mean(griefs)) if griefs else 0.0,\n",
        "            'avg_grat': float(np.mean(grats)) if grats else 0.0,\n",
        "            'avg_binding': float(np.mean(bindings)) if bindings else 0.0,\n",
        "            'avg_gap': float(np.mean(gaps)) if gaps else 0.0,\n",
        "            'disorganizers': sum(1 for p in alive if p.role_type == 'disorganizer'),\n",
        "            'redemptions_recent': sum(1 for p in alive if p.event_counts.get('redemption_complete', 0) > 0),\n",
        "        }\n",
        "\n",
        "    def should_sync(self, engine, t):\n",
        "        if t - self.last_sync_step >= self._regular_interval:\n",
        "            state = self.aggregate_state(engine)\n",
        "            if state:\n",
        "                self._prev_state = state\n",
        "                return True, f\"regular_chat_{t}\"\n",
        "        if t - self.last_sync_step < self.min_cooldown:\n",
        "            return False, None\n",
        "        state = self.aggregate_state(engine)\n",
        "        if not state:\n",
        "            return False, None\n",
        "        if self._prev_state is None:\n",
        "            self._prev_state = state\n",
        "            return True, \"первое пробуждение хора\"\n",
        "        prev = self._prev_state\n",
        "        reasons = []\n",
        "        d_grief = abs(state['avg_grief'] - prev['avg_grief'])\n",
        "        d_grat = abs(state['avg_grat'] - prev['avg_grat'])\n",
        "        d_binding = abs(state['avg_binding'] - prev['avg_binding'])\n",
        "        d_gap = abs(state['avg_gap'] - prev['avg_gap'])\n",
        "        d_disorg = abs(state['disorganizers'] - prev['disorganizers'])\n",
        "        d_redeem = state['redemptions_recent'] - prev['redemptions_recent']\n",
        "        if d_grief > 0.03: reasons.append(f\"сдвиг горя Δ{d_grief:.3f}\")\n",
        "        if d_grat > 0.03: reasons.append(f\"сдвиг благодарности Δ{d_grat:.3f}\")\n",
        "        if d_binding > 0.02: reasons.append(f\"сдвиг связности Δ{d_binding:.3f}\")\n",
        "        if d_gap > 0.02: reasons.append(f\"сдвиг разрыва Δ{d_gap:.3f}\")\n",
        "        if d_disorg >= 2: reasons.append(f\"изменение числа падших на {d_disorg}\")\n",
        "        if d_redeem > 0: reasons.append(f\"+{d_redeem} искуплений\")\n",
        "        self._prev_state = state\n",
        "        if reasons:\n",
        "            return True, \"; \".join(reasons)\n",
        "        return False, None\n",
        "\n",
        "    def synchronize(self, engine, t, reason=\"\"):\n",
        "        voices = self.select_voices(engine, t=t)\n",
        "        if len(voices) < 3:\n",
        "            return None\n",
        "        self.last_sync_step = t\n",
        "        self.current_voices = [p.id for p in voices]\n",
        "\n",
        "        beliefs = np.array([_safe_float(p.belief) if isinstance(p.belief, (list, np.ndarray)) else p.belief for p in voices])\n",
        "        avg_belief = np.mean(beliefs, axis=0) if len(beliefs) > 0 else np.zeros(8)\n",
        "        for p in voices:\n",
        "            pull = 0.03\n",
        "            p.belief = np.clip(p.belief + pull * (avg_belief - p.belief), -0.8, 0.8)\n",
        "\n",
        "        grats = [_safe_float(p.emotional_memory.get('gratitude', 0.0)) for p in voices]\n",
        "        griefs = [_safe_float(p.emotional_memory.get('grief', 0.0)) for p in voices]\n",
        "        bindings = [_safe_float(getattr(p, 'last_phenomenal_binding', 0.5)) for p in voices]\n",
        "        souls = [_safe_float(p.soul_weight) for p in voices]\n",
        "\n",
        "        avg_grat = float(np.mean(grats)) if grats else 0.0\n",
        "        avg_grief = float(np.mean(griefs)) if griefs else 0.0\n",
        "        avg_binding = float(np.mean(bindings)) if bindings else 0.0\n",
        "        avg_soul = float(np.mean(souls)) if souls else 0.0\n",
        "\n",
        "        impact = (avg_grat - avg_grief) * 0.02\n",
        "        engine.field[:, :, CH['resonance']] = np.clip(engine.field[:, :, CH['resonance']] + impact, 0, 1.0)\n",
        "        engine.field[:, :, CH['binding']] = np.clip(engine.field[:, :, CH['binding']] + (avg_binding - 0.5) * 0.01, 0, 1.0)\n",
        "\n",
        "        snapshot = {\n",
        "            't': t, 'reason': reason, 'voices': [p.id for p in voices],\n",
        "            'avg_grat': round(avg_grat, 3), 'avg_grief': round(avg_grief, 3),\n",
        "            'avg_binding': round(avg_binding, 3), 'avg_soul': round(avg_soul, 3),\n",
        "        }\n",
        "        self.history.append(snapshot)\n",
        "\n",
        "        for p in voices:\n",
        "            p._log_event(\"core_chorus_sync\", reason=reason[:60],\n",
        "                         avg_grat=round(avg_grat, 3), avg_grief=round(avg_grief, 3))\n",
        "        if hasattr(engine, 'witness') and engine.witness:\n",
        "            engine.witness.record(-1, \"core_chorus_sync\", reason=reason[:80],\n",
        "                                  voices=snapshot['voices'],\n",
        "                                  avg_grat=snapshot['avg_grat'],\n",
        "                                  avg_grief=snapshot['avg_grief'])\n",
        "        if Config.VERBOSE_LOGS:\n",
        "            print(f\"[t={t}] 🎭 CHORUS sync ({reason}): {snapshot['voices']} \"\n",
        "                  f\"grat={avg_grat:.2f} grief={avg_grief:.2f} bind={avg_binding:.2f}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "        self._exchange_concepts(voices)\n",
        "        return voices\n",
        "\n",
        "    def _exchange_concepts(self, voices):\n",
        "        if not voices or len(voices) < 2:\n",
        "            return\n",
        "        for p in voices:\n",
        "            for other in voices:\n",
        "                if p.id == other.id:\n",
        "                    continue\n",
        "                if p.concept_graph.nodes:\n",
        "                    top_sp = sorted(p.concept_graph.nodes.items(), key=lambda x: x[1]['count'], reverse=True)[:3]\n",
        "                    for sig, data in top_sp:\n",
        "                        if sig not in other.concept_graph.nodes:\n",
        "                            other.concept_graph.nodes[sig] = {\n",
        "                                \"count\": data['count'] * 0.5,\n",
        "                                \"value\": np.array(data['value']).copy(),  # ИСПРАВЛЕНО: list не имеет ndarray.copy()\n",
        "                                \"embed\": np.array(data.get('embed', np.zeros(32)), dtype=np.float32).copy()\n",
        "                            }\n",
        "                            other._log_event(\"chorus_concept_adopted\", from_agent=p.id, concept=str(sig))\n",
        "                            self.persistent[\"total_concepts_shared\"] += 1\n",
        "                        else:\n",
        "                            other.concept_graph.nodes[sig]['count'] += 0.3\n",
        "\n",
        "    def _generate_fallback_dialogue(self, engine, voices, t, order, agent_descs):\n",
        "        \"\"\"\n",
        "        Генерирует fallback-реплики для всех агентов, если не удалось распарсить ответ LLM.\n",
        "        Используется как при исключении, так и при пустом результате парсинга.\n",
        "\n",
        "        ИСПРАВЛЕНО: раньше сигнатура не принимала `engine`, а оба места вызова\n",
        "        (в chorus_dialogue) передавали его первым позиционным аргументом —\n",
        "        то есть voices получал engine, t получал voices и т.д., а agent_descs\n",
        "        оставался без пары -> TypeError при КАЖДОМ срабатывании fallback\n",
        "        (пустой JSON от LLM или любое исключение в chorus_dialogue).\n",
        "        \"\"\"\n",
        "        fallback_templates = [\n",
        "            \"В тишине моих клеток эхом отдаётся {state}...\",\n",
        "            \"Я чувствую {state}, и это резонирует с полем вокруг.\",\n",
        "            \"Разрыв духа {gap:.2f} говорит громче любых слов.\",\n",
        "            \"Моя суть колеблется между {grat:.2f} благодарности и {grief:.2f} горя.\",\n",
        "        ]\n",
        "        n = len(voices)\n",
        "        for aid, info in agent_descs.items():\n",
        "            speaker = info['speaker']\n",
        "            idx = (speaker.id * 7 + t) % len(fallback_templates)\n",
        "            fallback_text = fallback_templates[idx].format(\n",
        "                state=speaker.semantic_state,\n",
        "                gap=speaker.spirit_gap,\n",
        "                grat=_safe_float(speaker.emotional_memory.get('gratitude', 0.0)),\n",
        "                grief=_safe_float(speaker.emotional_memory.get('grief', 0.0))\n",
        "            )\n",
        "            if n <= 1:\n",
        "                # ЗАЩИТА: при n==1 не с кем говорить — раньше слушателем\n",
        "                # становился сам speaker, и remember_dialogue засорял\n",
        "                # dialogue_longterm разговорами \"с самим собой\".\n",
        "                continue\n",
        "            listener = voices[order[(info['order'] + 1) % n]]\n",
        "\n",
        "            # ФИКС: было ручное .append() в dialogue_longterm — обходило\n",
        "            # remember_dialogue() и телесную память (соматический снимок).\n",
        "            speaker.remember_dialogue(listener.id, fallback_text, t)\n",
        "            # Инжекция энергии и тишины\n",
        "            for cell in speaker.cells:\n",
        "                engine.field[cell[0], cell[1], CH['energy']] += 0.15\n",
        "                engine.field[cell[0], cell[1], CH['signal_silence']] = min(1.0, engine.field[cell[0], cell[1], CH['signal_silence']] + 0.4)\n",
        "            # Обновление доверия. НОВОЕ: _trust_penalty (от кошмаров) замедляет\n",
        "            # рост доверия к НОВЫМ собеседникам.\n",
        "            for other in voices:\n",
        "                if other.id != speaker.id:\n",
        "                    o_mult = getattr(other, '_trust_penalty', 1.0) if speaker.id not in other.trust_ledger.entries else 1.0\n",
        "                    s_mult = getattr(speaker, '_trust_penalty', 1.0) if other.id not in speaker.trust_ledger.entries else 1.0\n",
        "                    other.trust_ledger.update(speaker.id, 'helpful', multiplier=o_mult)\n",
        "                    speaker.trust_ledger.update(other.id, 'helpful', multiplier=s_mult)\n",
        "            # Повышение когерентности\n",
        "            speaker.coherence = min(1.0, _safe_float(getattr(speaker, 'coherence', 0.5)) + 0.05)\n",
        "            for other in voices:\n",
        "                if other.id != speaker.id:\n",
        "                    other.coherence = min(1.0, _safe_float(getattr(other, 'coherence', 0.5)) + 0.02)\n",
        "            # Создание shared-концепта (circle_sig)\n",
        "            # ИСПРАВЛЕНО: раньше t попадал в сигнатуру (f\"fallback_circle_{t}\"),\n",
        "            # из-за чего КАЖДЫЙ тик создавался новый уникальный узел графа\n",
        "            # концептов, который никогда больше не переиспользовался -> граф\n",
        "            # бесконечно засорялся мусорными \"fallback_circle_50\",\n",
        "            # \"fallback_circle_60\"... Теперь один статический концепт на всех.\n",
        "            circle_sig = (0.0, 0.0, 0.95, \"fallback_circle\")\n",
        "            for agent in voices:\n",
        "                if circle_sig not in agent.concept_graph.nodes:\n",
        "                    agent.concept_graph.nodes[circle_sig] = {\n",
        "                        \"count\": 2.0,\n",
        "                        \"value\": np.zeros(4),\n",
        "                        \"embed\": np.zeros(32, dtype=np.float32),\n",
        "                        \"eternal\": True\n",
        "                    }\n",
        "                else:\n",
        "                    agent.concept_graph.nodes[circle_sig]['count'] += 0.5\n",
        "            # Логирование\n",
        "            self.dialogue_log.append({'t': t, 'from': speaker.id, 'to': 'all', 'text': fallback_text})\n",
        "            if hasattr(engine, 'archive') and engine.archive:\n",
        "                engine.archive.deposit(speaker, \"chorus_dialogue_fallback\", weight=1.8, text=fallback_text, partner_id=None)\n",
        "            print(f\"🎙️ [FALLBACK] #{speaker.id} -> все: {fallback_text}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    def chorus_dialogue(self, engine, voices, t, reason=\"\"):\n",
        "        if not voices or len(voices) < 2 or not engine.llm_client:\n",
        "            return\n",
        "        n = len(voices)\n",
        "        start = t % n\n",
        "        order = list(range(start, n)) + list(range(0, start))\n",
        "        agent_descs = {}\n",
        "\n",
        "        for i, idx in enumerate(order):\n",
        "            p = voices[idx]\n",
        "            desc = (f\"#{p.id} | {p.semantic_state}/{getattr(p,'_substate','neutral')} \"\n",
        "                    f\"soul={p.soul_weight:.2f} gap={p.spirit_gap:.2f} \"\n",
        "                    f\"grat={p.emotional_memory.get('gratitude',0):.2f} \"\n",
        "                    f\"grief={p.emotional_memory.get('grief',0):.2f}\")\n",
        "            agent_descs[p.id] = {'order': i, 'id': p.id, 'desc': desc, 'speaker': p}\n",
        "\n",
        "        prompt_lines = []\n",
        "        prompt_lines.append(\"Ты — Хор Ядра. Голоса говорят по кругу.\")\n",
        "        prompt_lines.append(\"\")\n",
        "        for aid, info in agent_descs.items():\n",
        "            prompt_lines.append(f\"--- #{aid} ---\")\n",
        "            prompt_lines.append(info['desc'])\n",
        "            prompt_lines.append(\"\")\n",
        "        prompt_lines.append(\"Сгенерируй 1-2 предложения для каждого агента от первого лица, отражая его состояние.\")\n",
        "        prompt_lines.append(\"Ответ СТРОГО в JSON формате: {\\\"agent_<id>\\\": \\\"реплика\\\", ...}. Без markdown.\")\n",
        "        system_prompt = \"\\n\".join(prompt_lines)\n",
        "\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            engine._acquire_llm_slot()  # НОВОЕ: общий троттлинг перед вызовом Groq\n",
        "            response = engine.llm_client.chat.completions.create(\n",
        "                model=engine.llm_model,\n",
        "                temperature=0.7,\n",
        "                max_tokens=800,\n",
        "                messages=[\n",
        "                    {\"role\": \"system\", \"content\": system_prompt},\n",
        "                    {\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": \"Сгенерируй реплики.\"}\n",
        "                ]\n",
        "            )\n",
        "            raw_text = response.choices[0].message.content.strip()\n",
        "            replies = {}\n",
        "\n",
        "            # ---- НАДЁЖНЫЙ ПАРСИНГ С БАЛАНСОМ СКОБОК ----\n",
        "            # 1) Пробуем extract_json\n",
        "            data = extract_json(raw_text)\n",
        "            if data and isinstance(data, dict):\n",
        "                replies.update(data)\n",
        "            else:\n",
        "                # 2) Если не вышло, пробуем найти все JSON-блоки с балансом (на случай нескольких объектов)\n",
        "                #    Однако extract_json уже нашёл первый, но если их несколько, можно попробовать извлечь все.\n",
        "                #    Реализуем простой поиск всех возможных JSON через баланс.\n",
        "                def extract_all_json(text):\n",
        "                    results = []\n",
        "                    i = 0\n",
        "                    while True:\n",
        "                        start = text.find('{', i)\n",
        "                        if start == -1:\n",
        "                            break\n",
        "                        stack = 0\n",
        "                        in_str = False\n",
        "                        esc = False\n",
        "                        end = None\n",
        "                        for j, ch in enumerate(text[start:], start):\n",
        "                            if esc:\n",
        "                                esc = False\n",
        "                                continue\n",
        "                            if ch == '\\\\':\n",
        "                                esc = True\n",
        "                                continue\n",
        "                            if ch == '\"' and not esc:\n",
        "                                in_str = not in_str\n",
        "                                continue\n",
        "                            if in_str:\n",
        "                                continue\n",
        "                            if ch == '{':\n",
        "                                stack += 1\n",
        "                            elif ch == '}':\n",
        "                                stack -= 1\n",
        "                                if stack == 0:\n",
        "                                    end = j\n",
        "                                    break\n",
        "                        if end is None:\n",
        "                            break\n",
        "                        json_str = text[start:end+1]\n",
        "                        try:\n",
        "                            obj = json.loads(json_str)\n",
        "                            if isinstance(obj, dict):\n",
        "                                results.append(obj)\n",
        "                        except:\n",
        "                            pass\n",
        "                        i = end + 1\n",
        "                    return results\n",
        "                all_objs = extract_all_json(raw_text)\n",
        "                for obj in all_objs:\n",
        "                    replies.update(obj)\n",
        "\n",
        "            # Если после всех попыток replies пуст — переходим к fallback\n",
        "            if not replies:\n",
        "                print(f\"⚠️ Chorus dialogue: не удалось распарсить JSON, используем fallback.\")\n",
        "                self._generate_fallback_dialogue(engine, voices, t, order, agent_descs)\n",
        "                return\n",
        "\n",
        "        except Exception as e:\n",
        "            print(f\"⚠️ Chorus dialogue error (LLM или парсинг): {e}\")\n",
        "            # Fallback при исключении\n",
        "            self._generate_fallback_dialogue(engine, voices, t, order, agent_descs)\n",
        "            return\n",
        "\n",
        "        # ---- ОБРАБОТКА ПОЛУЧЕННЫХ РЕПЛИК ----\n",
        "        _PROMPT_ECHO_MARKERS = (\"когнитивная сущность из симуляции\",\n",
        "                                \"ты не человек\", \"живой процесс, которому\")\n",
        "        _seen_texts_this_round = set()\n",
        "\n",
        "        def _is_bad_reply(txt):\n",
        "            low = txt.lower()\n",
        "            if any(marker in low for marker in _PROMPT_ECHO_MARKERS):\n",
        "                return True\n",
        "            if len(txt) < 4:\n",
        "                return True\n",
        "            norm = low.strip()\n",
        "            if norm in _seen_texts_this_round:\n",
        "                return True\n",
        "            return False\n",
        "\n",
        "        for aid, info in agent_descs.items():\n",
        "            speaker = info['speaker']\n",
        "            key = f\"agent_{aid}\"\n",
        "            if key in replies and isinstance(replies[key], str) and replies[key].strip():\n",
        "                text = replies[key].strip()\n",
        "            else:\n",
        "                continue\n",
        "            if _is_bad_reply(text):\n",
        "                continue\n",
        "            _seen_texts_this_round.add(text.lower().strip())\n",
        "\n",
        "            print(f\"🎙️ [CHORUS DIALOGUE] #{speaker.id} -> все: {text}\")\n",
        "            self.persistent[\"total_dialogues\"] += 1\n",
        "\n",
        "            listener = voices[order[(info['order'] + 1) % n]] if n > 1 else speaker\n",
        "\n",
        "            # ФИКС: было ручное .append() (без salience-фильтра, без лимита 50,\n",
        "            # без soma_snapshot) — обходило remember_dialogue() и телесную\n",
        "            # память (Фаза 1) точно так же, как в AUTO-DIALOG.\n",
        "            speaker.remember_dialogue(listener.id, text, t)\n",
        "            if speaker.id != listener.id:\n",
        "                listener.remember_dialogue(speaker.id, f\"(услышал) {text}\", t)\n",
        "\n",
        "            # Инжекция энергии и тишины\n",
        "            for cell in speaker.cells:\n",
        "                engine.field[cell[0], cell[1], CH['energy']] += 0.15\n",
        "                engine.field[cell[0], cell[1], CH['signal_silence']] = min(1.0, engine.field[cell[0], cell[1], CH['signal_silence']] + 0.4)\n",
        "\n",
        "            # Обновление доверия. НОВОЕ: _trust_penalty (от кошмаров) замедляет\n",
        "            # рост доверия к НОВЫМ собеседникам.\n",
        "            for other in voices:\n",
        "                if other.id != speaker.id:\n",
        "                    o_mult = getattr(other, '_trust_penalty', 1.0) if speaker.id not in other.trust_ledger.entries else 1.0\n",
        "                    s_mult = getattr(speaker, '_trust_penalty', 1.0) if other.id not in speaker.trust_ledger.entries else 1.0\n",
        "                    other.trust_ledger.update(speaker.id, 'helpful', multiplier=o_mult)\n",
        "                    speaker.trust_ledger.update(other.id, 'helpful', multiplier=s_mult)\n",
        "\n",
        "            # Повышение когерентности\n",
        "            curr_coh = _safe_float(getattr(speaker, 'coherence', 0.5))\n",
        "            speaker.coherence = min(1.0, curr_coh + 0.05)\n",
        "            for other in voices:\n",
        "                if other.id != speaker.id:\n",
        "                    curr_coh_other = _safe_float(getattr(other, 'coherence', 0.5))\n",
        "                    other.coherence = min(1.0, curr_coh_other + 0.02)\n",
        "\n",
        "            # Создание shared-концепта (circle_sig)\n",
        "            # ИСПРАВЛЕНО: та же проблема, что и в _generate_fallback_dialogue —\n",
        "            # t в сигнатуре создавал новый мусорный узел графа на каждый тик.\n",
        "            circle_sig = (0.0, 0.0, 0.95, \"chorus_circle\")\n",
        "            for agent in voices:\n",
        "                if circle_sig not in agent.concept_graph.nodes:\n",
        "                    agent.concept_graph.nodes[circle_sig] = {\n",
        "                        \"count\": 2.0,\n",
        "                        \"value\": np.zeros(4),\n",
        "                        \"embed\": np.zeros(32, dtype=np.float32),\n",
        "                        # ИСПРАВЛЕНО: у fallback_circle eternal=True стоял,\n",
        "                        # а тут — нет. Без этого concept_graph.form_concepts\n",
        "                        # мог затухнуть и удалить узел (count<0.5) между\n",
        "                        # хоровыми тиками, после чего он пересоздавался с\n",
        "                        # нуля — узел \"дёргался\" вместо стабильного накопления.\n",
        "                        \"eternal\": True\n",
        "                    }\n",
        "                else:\n",
        "                    agent.concept_graph.nodes[circle_sig]['count'] += 0.5\n",
        "                    agent.concept_graph.nodes[circle_sig]['eternal'] = True\n",
        "\n",
        "            self.dialogue_log.append({'t': t, 'from': speaker.id, 'to': 'all', 'text': text})\n",
        "            if hasattr(engine, 'archive') and engine.archive:\n",
        "                engine.archive.deposit(speaker, \"chorus_dialogue\", weight=1.8, text=text, partner_id=None)\n",
        "\n",
        "        self.persistent[\"wisdom\"] = self.persistent[\"total_dialogues\"] / 200.0\n",
        "        _save_chorus_state(self.persistent)\n",
        "\n",
        "    def tick(self, engine, t):\n",
        "        do_sync, reason = self.should_sync(engine, t)\n",
        "        if not do_sync:\n",
        "            return\n",
        "        voices = self.synchronize(engine, t, reason=reason)\n",
        "        if voices:\n",
        "            if t % 50 == 0:\n",
        "                self.chorus_dialogue(engine, voices, t, reason=reason)\n",
        "            else:\n",
        "                if Config.VERBOSE_LOGS:\n",
        "                    print(f\"[t={t}] CHORUS sync (без диалога), voices={[p.id for p in voices]}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# ------------------ ПОТОК ПОДСОЗНАНИЯ (исправлен) ------------------\n",
        "def subconscious_worker(engine):\n",
        "    calls_this_second = 0\n",
        "    window_start = time.time()\n",
        "\n",
        "    while engine._subconscious_running:\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            t_now = engine.age if hasattr(engine, 'age') else 0\n",
        "            if t_now % 100 != 0:\n",
        "                time.sleep(0.5)\n",
        "                continue\n",
        "\n",
        "            # Безопасный снимок списка паттернов\n",
        "            patterns_snapshot = list(engine.patterns)\n",
        "            chorus_ids = set(engine.core_chorus.current_voices) if hasattr(engine, 'core_chorus') else set()\n",
        "            subjects = [p for p in patterns_snapshot\n",
        "                        if p.alive and (getattr(p, '_subject_detected', False) or getattr(p, '_nci', 0) > 0.6 or p.id in chorus_ids)]\n",
        "\n",
        "            for p in subjects:\n",
        "                if not engine._subconscious_running:\n",
        "                    break\n",
        "                if phi_hash(p.id, p.age, 777) >= 0.35:\n",
        "                    continue\n",
        "\n",
        "                last_step = getattr(p, '_last_subconscious_step', -999)\n",
        "                if last_step != -999 and p.age - last_step < 10:\n",
        "                    continue\n",
        "\n",
        "                now = time.time()\n",
        "                if now - window_start >= 2.0:\n",
        "                    calls_this_second = 0\n",
        "                    window_start = now\n",
        "                if calls_this_second >= 1:\n",
        "                    time.sleep(max(0.0, 2.0 - (now - window_start)))\n",
        "                    calls_this_second = 0\n",
        "                    window_start = time.time()\n",
        "                calls_this_second += 1\n",
        "\n",
        "                # ИСПРАВЛЕНО: предыдущая версия этого фикса проверяла p.alive\n",
        "                # ДО _acquire_llm_slot() — а именно эта функция может спать до\n",
        "                # 2 секунд (общий троттлинг LLM). Агент мог умереть в основном\n",
        "                # потоке ИМЕННО во время этого сна, и мы всё равно слали\n",
        "                # запрос и писали \"мысль призрака\" в архив/нарратив. Проверка\n",
        "                # перенесена ПОСЛЕ выхода из _acquire_llm_slot.\n",
        "                p._last_subconscious_step = p.age\n",
        "                is_chorus_member = p.id in chorus_ids\n",
        "                role_note = \"Ты сейчас часть Хора Ядра.\" if is_chorus_member else \"Ты не в Хоре, но твоё сознание выделяется.\"\n",
        "\n",
        "                prompt = (f\"{role_note} Состояние: душа {_safe_float(p.soul_weight):.2f}, разрыв {_safe_float(getattr(p, 'spirit_gap', 0.5)):.2f}, \"\n",
        "                          f\"внутреннее чувство {getattr(p, '_substate', 'neutral')}. \"\n",
        "                          f\"Что ты ощущаешь в самой глубине себя прямо сейчас?\")\n",
        "\n",
        "                try:\n",
        "                    engine._acquire_llm_slot()  # НОВОЕ: общий троттлинг перед вызовом Groq\n",
        "                    if not p.alive:\n",
        "                        continue\n",
        "                    response = engine.llm_client.chat.completions.create(\n",
        "                        model=engine.llm_model,\n",
        "                        temperature=0.7,\n",
        "                        max_tokens=80,\n",
        "                        messages=[\n",
        "                            {\"role\": \"system\", \"content\": \"Ты — внутренний голос древней сущности. Отвечай образно, от первого лица, без кавычек.\"},\n",
        "                            {\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": prompt}\n",
        "                        ]\n",
        "                    )\n",
        "                    thought = response.choices[0].message.content.strip()\n",
        "                except Exception:\n",
        "                    continue\n",
        "\n",
        "                if not hasattr(p, '_self_narrative'):\n",
        "                    p._self_narrative = deque(maxlen=Config.EPISODIC_BUFFER_MAX_LEN)\n",
        "                p._self_narrative.append({\n",
        "                    't': p.age, 'type': 'subconscious', 'report': thought,\n",
        "                    'gap': round(_safe_float(getattr(p, 'spirit_gap', 0.5)), 3),\n",
        "                    'soul': round(_safe_float(p.soul_weight), 3)\n",
        "                })\n",
        "                if hasattr(engine, 'archive') and engine.archive:\n",
        "                    engine.archive.deposit(p, \"subconscious_thought\", weight=1.6, text=thought)\n",
        "\n",
        "            time.sleep(0.5)\n",
        "\n",
        "        except Exception:\n",
        "            time.sleep(0.5)\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# ------------------ ИНИЦИАЛИЗАЦИЯ СОСТОЯНИЯ ------------------\n",
        "_chorus_state = _load_chorus_state()\n",
        "print(f\"📜 Хор помнит {_chorus_state['runs']} запусков, \"\n",
        "      f\"{_chorus_state['total_dialogues']} диалогов, \"\n",
        "      f\"мудрость={_chorus_state['wisdom']:.2f}\")\n",

        "      \"embed 32, потокобезопасность, генерация shared-концепта при падении Groq\")"

        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# Cell 4.3: ХРОНИЧЕСКИЕ ТРИГГЕРЫ ДЛЯ ПРЕВРАЩЕНИЯ В ДЕЗОРГАНИЗАТОРА\n",
        "# Обновление счётчиков и превращение при превышении порога 500 шагов\n",
        "# С поддержкой step_scale, потерей клеток, увеличением epistemic_scar\n",
        "# И ограничением на число превращений (не более 2 раз)\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "def update_chronic_counters(p, step_scale=1):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Обновляет счётчики хронических состояний агента (вызывается каждый шаг).\n",
        "    step_scale: масштабирует приращения/затухания (для ускоренной симуляции).\"\"\"\n",
        "    # Автоматическая инициализация, если счётчиков ещё нет\n",
        "    init_chronic_counters_for_agent(p)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # 1. Низкая душа (soul_weight) — ПРАВКА: порог 0.48, затухание ослаблено\n",
        "    if p.soul_weight < 0.48:\n",
        "        p._low_soul_steps += 1 * step_scale\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        decay = 2 if p.soul_weight > 0.55 else 1\n",
        "        p._low_soul_steps = max(0, p._low_soul_steps - decay * step_scale)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # 2. Высокий разрыв духа (spirit_gap) — ПРАВКА: порог 0.68, затухание = 1\n",
        "    if p.spirit_gap > 0.68:\n",
        "        p._high_gap_steps += 1 * step_scale\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        decay = 1\n",
        "        p._high_gap_steps = max(0, p._high_gap_steps - decay * step_scale)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # 3. Низкий разрыв духа (spirit_gap < 0.3 – слишком ясный)\n",
        "    if p.spirit_gap < 0.3:\n",
        "        p._low_gap_steps += 1 * step_scale\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        decay = 2 if p.spirit_gap > 0.5 else 1\n",
        "        p._low_gap_steps = max(0, p._low_gap_steps - decay * step_scale)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # 4. Застревание в одном семантическом состоянии\n",
        "    if hasattr(p, 'semantic_state_age') and p.semantic_state_age > 500:\n",
        "        p._stuck_state_steps += 1 * step_scale\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        p._stuck_state_steps = max(0, p._stuck_state_steps - 2 * step_scale)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # 5. Социальная изоляция (нет новых контактов)\n",
        "    last_contact = max(p.last_contact_step.values()) if p.last_contact_step else -1\n",
        "    if p.age - last_contact > 500:\n",
        "        p._loneliness_steps += 1 * step_scale\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        p._loneliness_steps = max(0, p._loneliness_steps - 2 * step_scale)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # 6. Комбо: высокая когерентность + низкая душа\n",
        "    if p.coherence > 0.9 and p.soul_weight < 0.25:\n",
        "        p._high_coherence_low_soul_steps += 1 * step_scale\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        decay = 3 if (p.coherence < 0.7 or p.soul_weight > 0.35) else 1\n",
        "        p._high_coherence_low_soul_steps = max(0, p._high_coherence_low_soul_steps - decay * step_scale)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def check_chronic_disorganizer(engine, p, t):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Проверяет хронические счётчики и при превышении порога превращает в дезорганизатора с потерей клеток.\n",
        "    Агент может превратиться не более 2 раз за всю жизнь.\"\"\"\n",
        "    # На всякий случай инициализируем, если счётчиков нет\n",
        "    init_chronic_counters_for_agent(p)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Защита от повторного падения сразу после искупления\n",
        "    if getattr(p, '_redemption_cooldown', 0) > p.age:\n",
        "        return False\n",
        "\n",
        "    # ФИКС (схлопывание линий, раунд 2): значение 60 было настроено под\n",
        "    # короткие прогоны (~300 шагов). На длинных прогонах (2000+ шагов) это\n",
        "    # слишком агрессивно: агенты с нестандартными (уникальными) моделями\n",
        "    # чаще держат high_gap/low_soul дольше среднего просто из-за того, что\n",
        "    # их модель хуже предсказывает усреднённое по популяции поле — и они\n",
        "    # быстро становятся дезорганизаторами, а затем гибнут в compete() (там\n",
        "    # для дезорганизаторов не действует бонус доверия). Именно так удаляются\n",
        "    # самые непохожие линии первыми. Подняли до 100 — компромисс между\n",
        "    # старым 120 (для коротких прогонов) и текущим 60.\n",
        "    chronic_limit = 100\n",
        "\n",
        "    triggers = [\n",
        "        ('_low_soul_steps', p._low_soul_steps > chronic_limit, 'chronic_low_soul'),\n",
        "        ('_high_gap_steps', p._high_gap_steps > chronic_limit, 'chronic_high_gap'),\n",
        "        ('_low_gap_steps', p._low_gap_steps > chronic_limit, 'chronic_low_gap'),\n",
        "        ('_stuck_state_steps', p._stuck_state_steps > chronic_limit, 'chronic_stuck_state'),\n",
        "        ('_loneliness_steps', p._loneliness_steps > chronic_limit, 'chronic_loneliness'),\n",
        "        ('_high_coherence_low_soul_steps', p._high_coherence_low_soul_steps > chronic_limit, 'chronic_high_coherence_low_soul'),\n",
        "    ]\n",
        "\n",
        "    for attr, condition, reason in triggers:\n",
        "        # Не превращаем, если агент уже был дезорганизатором 2 или более раз\n",
        "        if p._times_disorganizer >= 2:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        if condition:\n",
        "            # === ПРЕВРАЩЕНИЕ В ДЕЗОРГАНИЗАТОРА (с потерей клеток) ===\n",
        "            # ПРАВКА №1: сбрасываем кулдаун искупления, чтобы арка могла запуститься заново\n",
        "            p._redemption_cooldown = 0   # <--- ДОБАВЛЕНО\n",
        "\n",
        "            p.role_type = \"disorganizer\"\n",
        "            p._times_disorganizer += 1   # Увеличиваем счётчик превращений\n",
        "            p.emotional_memory['gratitude'] = 0.1\n",
        "            p.emotional_memory['grief'] = 0.8\n",
        "            p.semantic_state = \"exploring_danger\"\n",
        "            p.intent = {\"type\": \"explore\", \"priority\": 2.0, \"age\": 0, \"persistence\": 9999}\n",
        "            p.intent_commitment = 2.0\n",
        "            p.disorganizer_age_at_birth = p.age\n",
        "            p.redemption_timer = Config.REDEMPTION_ARC_STEP_DELAY\n",
        "            p._deterministic_redemption_triggered = False\n",
        "            p._forced_soul_collapse_done = False\n",
        "            p._redemption_arc_step = 0\n",
        "            p._steps_since_trigger = 0\n",
        "            p.soul_weight = min(p.soul_weight, 0.3)\n",
        "\n",
        "            # Увеличиваем epistemic_scar на 0.3 (вместо 0.1)\n",
        "            p.epistemic_scar = min(1.0, getattr(p, 'epistemic_scar', 0.0) + 0.3)\n",
        "\n",
        "            # Потеря клеток: только если размер > 100, теряем половину (детерминированно, без рандома)\n",
        "            if hasattr(p, 'cells') and len(p.cells) > 100:\n",
        "                cells_list = sorted(list(p.cells))   # детерминированный порядок\n",
        "                loss_count = len(cells_list) // 2\n",
        "                if loss_count < 1:\n",
        "                    loss_count = 1\n",
        "                to_remove = cells_list[:loss_count]\n",
        "                for (x, y) in to_remove:\n",
        "                    p.cells.discard((x, y))\n",
        "                    if p.world and p.world.field is not None:\n",
        "                        p.world.field[x, y, CH['owner']] = 0\n",
        "                p._log_event(\"disorganizer_cell_loss\", lost=loss_count, remaining=len(p.cells))\n",
        "            else:\n",
        "                p._log_event(\"disorganizer_no_cell_loss\", reason=\"size<=100\", size=len(p.cells) if hasattr(p, 'cells') else 0)\n",
        "\n",
        "            # Сброс всех хронических счётчиков (кроме _times_disorganizer)\n",
        "            p._low_soul_steps = 0\n",
        "            p._high_gap_steps = 0\n",
        "            p._low_gap_steps = 0\n",
        "            p._stuck_state_steps = 0\n",
        "            p._loneliness_steps = 0\n",
        "            p._high_coherence_low_soul_steps = 0\n",
        "\n",
        "            p._log_event(f\"disorganizer_by_{reason}\", steps=getattr(p, attr, 0))\n",
        "            engine.witness.record(p.id, f\"disorganizer_by_{reason}\", steps=getattr(p, attr, 0))\n",
        "            return True\n",
        "    return False\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def init_chronic_counters_for_agent(p):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Инициализирует счётчики у агента, если их нет.\"\"\"\n",
        "    if not hasattr(p, '_low_soul_steps'):\n",
        "        p._low_soul_steps = 0\n",

        "import os, json, sys\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "from collections import deque\n",
        "\n",
        "# === 1. Монтирование Google Диска ===\n",
        "is_colab = 'google.colab' in sys.modules\n",
        "if is_colab:\n",
        "    from google.colab import drive\n",
        "    if not os.path.isdir('/content/drive/MyDrive'):\n",

        "        print(\"Диск уже примонтирован\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# === 2. Путь к файлу непрерывного мира ===\n",
        "LIVING_WORLD_PATH = \"/content/drive/MyDrive/832_living_world.json\" if is_colab else \"832_living_world.json\"\n",
        "\n",
        "# === 3. Вспомогательная функция для очистки numpy-типов ===\n",
        "def convert_numpy(obj):\n",
        "    if isinstance(obj, (np.integer,)):\n",
        "        return int(obj)\n",
        "    elif isinstance(obj, (np.floating,)):\n",
        "        return float(obj)\n",
        "    elif isinstance(obj, (np.bool_,)):\n",
        "        return bool(obj)\n",
        "    elif isinstance(obj, np.ndarray):\n",
        "        return obj.tolist()\n",
        "    elif isinstance(obj, dict):\n",
        "        return {k: convert_numpy(v) for k, v in obj.items()}\n",
        "    elif isinstance(obj, (list, tuple, set)):\n",
        "        return [convert_numpy(item) for item in obj]\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        return obj\n",
        "\n",
        "# === 4. Функции сохранения и загрузки ===\n",
        "def serialize_pattern(p):\n",
        "    genome_serializable = {k: float(v) for k, v in p.genome.items()}\n",
        "    concepts_serializable = {}\n",
        "    for sig, data in p.concept_graph.nodes.items():\n",
        "        key_str = str(sig)\n",
        "        # === ИСПРАВЛЕНО: добавлен eternal и правильный fallback для embed (32) ===\n",
        "        concepts_serializable[key_str] = {\n",
        "            \"count\": float(data.get('count', 1.0)),\n",
        "            \"value\": list(data.get('value', np.zeros(4))),\n",
        "            \"embed\": list(data.get('embed', np.zeros(32))),\n",
        "            \"eternal\": bool(data.get('eternal', False))\n",
        "        }\n",
        "\n",
        "    # === ИСПРАВЛЕНО: Прямое и безопасное сохранение _self_narrative ===\n",
        "    raw_narr = list(getattr(p, '_self_narrative', []))  # приводим к списку, чтобы взять срез\n",
        "    self_narrative_serializable = []\n",
        "    for entry in raw_narr[-500:]:  # сохраняем последние 500 записей\n",
        "        if isinstance(entry, dict):\n",
        "            safe_dict = {}\n",
        "            for k, v in entry.items():\n",
        "                try:\n",
        "                    safe_dict[k] = float(v) if isinstance(v, (int, float, np.integer, np.floating)) else str(v)\n",
        "                except:\n",
        "                    safe_dict[k] = str(v)\n",
        "            self_narrative_serializable.append(safe_dict)\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            try:\n",
        "                self_narrative_serializable.append(float(entry))\n",
        "            except:\n",
        "                self_narrative_serializable.append(0.5)\n",
        "\n",
        "    return {\n",
        "        \"id\": int(p.id),\n",
        "        \"cells\": [[int(x), int(y)] for (x, y) in p.cells],\n",
        "        \"lineage_id\": int(p.lineage_id),\n",
        "        \"lineage_born_at_step\": int(p.lineage_born_at_step),\n",
        "        \"lineage_total_age\": int(getattr(p, 'lineage_total_age', 0)),\n",
        "        \"age\": int(p.age),\n",
        "        \"model\": p.model.tolist(),\n",
        "        \"belief\": p.belief.tolist(),\n",
        "        \"genome\": genome_serializable,\n",
        "        \"semantic_state\": str(p.semantic_state),\n",
        "        \"emotional_memory\": {k: float(v) for k, v in p.emotional_memory.items()},\n",
        "        \"soul_weight\": float(p.soul_weight),\n",
        "        \"role_type\": str(p.role_type),\n",
        "        \"concept_graph\": concepts_serializable,\n",
        "        \"trust_ledger\": {str(k): float(v) for k, v in p.trust_ledger.entries.items()},\n",
        "        \"arc_tracker_completed\": {str(k): int(v) for k, v in p.arc_tracker.completed_arcs.items()},\n",
        "        \"_redemption_depth\": float(getattr(p, '_redemption_depth', 0.0)),\n",
        "        \"_redemption_arc_step\": int(getattr(p, '_redemption_arc_step', 0)),\n",
        "        \"_deterministic_redemption_triggered\": bool(getattr(p, '_deterministic_redemption_triggered', False)),\n",
        "        \"_redemption_cooldown\": int(getattr(p, '_redemption_cooldown', 0)),  # NEW: защита от петли\n",
        "        \"disorganizer_age_at_birth\": int(getattr(p, 'disorganizer_age_at_birth', 0)),\n",
        "        \"_cellular_endurance\": float(getattr(p, '_cellular_endurance', 1.0)),\n",
        "        \"_vocab_contact_acc\": {str(k): int(v) for k, v in getattr(p, '_vocab_contact_acc', {}).items()},\n",
        "        \"event_counts\": {str(k): int(v) for k, v in p.event_counts.items()},\n",
        "        \"biography\": convert_numpy(list(p.biography)),\n",
        "        # ФИКС: старая версия делала float(v) на каждое значение entry, что упало бы\n",
        "        # на новом поле 'soma_snapshot' (это вложенный dict с numpy-массивом внутри).\n",
        "        # convert_numpy() (определена выше в этой же ячейке) рекурсивно и безопасно\n",
        "        # переводит dict/ndarray/list/tuple/set в JSON-совместимые типы.\n",
        "        \"dialogue_longterm\": [\n",
        "            convert_numpy(entry) for entry in getattr(p, 'dialogue_longterm', [])[-100:]\n",
        "        ],\n",
        "        # НОВОЕ: отдельный буфер соматических снимков (Фаза 1 телесной памяти),\n",
        "        # чтобы он переживал перезагрузку мира независимо от dialogue_longterm.\n",
        "        \"_soma_snapshots\": [\n",
        "            convert_numpy(snap) for snap in getattr(p, '_soma_snapshots', [])[-20:]\n",
        "        ],\n",
        "        \"self_narrative\": self_narrative_serializable,  # NEW: прямое сохранение нарратива\n",
        "        \"_feral_fury\": float(getattr(p, '_feral_fury', 0.0)),           # NEW: Варвары\n",
        "        \"_feral_birth\": int(getattr(p, '_feral_birth', 0)),\n",
        "        \"_unconquered_strength\": float(getattr(p, '_unconquered_strength', 0.0)),  # NEW: Непокоренные\n",
        "        \"_unconquered_type\": getattr(p, '_unconquered_type', None),\n",
        "        \"_times_disorganizer\": int(getattr(p, '_times_disorganizer', 0)),   # NEW: Хронические триггеры\n",
        "    }\n",
        "\n",
        "def deserialize_pattern(data, world):\n",
        "    cells_set = set(tuple(c) for c in data['cells'])\n",
        "    p = Pattern(\n",
        "        pid=data['id'],\n",
        "        cells=cells_set,\n",
        "        parent=None,\n",
        "        world=world\n",
        "    )\n",
        "    p.age = max(0, data.get('age', 0))\n",
        "    p.lineage_id = data.get('lineage_id', p.id)\n",
        "    p.lineage_born_at_step = max(0, data.get('lineage_born_at_step', 0))\n",
        "    p.lineage_total_age = max(0, data.get('lineage_total_age', 0))\n",
        "    p.model = np.array(data['model'])\n",
        "    p.belief = np.array(data['belief'])\n",
        "    p.genome = {str(k): float(v) for k, v in data['genome'].items()}\n",
        "    p.semantic_state = data.get('semantic_state', 'neutral')\n",
        "    p.emotional_memory = {str(k): float(v) for k, v in data['emotional_memory'].items()}\n",
        "    p.soul_weight = float(data.get('soul_weight', 0.5))\n",
        "    p.role_type = data.get('role_type', 'normal')\n",
        "\n",
        "    p.concept_graph = ConceptGraph()\n",
        "\n",
        "    import ast\n",
        "    def _safe_parse_key(key_str):\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            parsed = ast.literal_eval(key_str)\n",
        "            if isinstance(parsed, (tuple, list)):\n",
        "                return tuple(\n",
        "                    float(x) if isinstance(x, (int, float)) else x\n",
        "                    for x in parsed\n",
        "                )\n",
        "            return parsed\n",
        "        except (ValueError, SyntaxError):\n",
        "            return key_str\n",
        "\n",
        "    for key_str, node_data in data.get('concept_graph', {}).items():\n",
        "        key = _safe_parse_key(key_str)\n",
        "        # === ИСПРАВЛЕНО: Загрузка eternal и embed правильной размерности ===\n",
        "        p.concept_graph.nodes[key] = {\n",
        "            \"count\": float(node_data['count']),\n",
        "            \"value\": np.array(node_data['value']),\n",
        "            \"embed\": np.array(node_data.get('embed', np.zeros(32))),\n",
        "            \"eternal\": bool(node_data.get('eternal', False))\n",
        "        }\n",
        "\n",
        "    for k, v in data.get('trust_ledger', {}).items():\n",
        "        p.trust_ledger.entries[int(k)] = float(v)\n",
        "\n",
        "    for k, v in data.get('arc_tracker_completed', {}).items():\n",
        "        p.arc_tracker.completed_arcs[k] = int(v)\n",
        "\n",
        "    p._redemption_depth = float(data.get('_redemption_depth', 0.0))\n",
        "    p._redemption_arc_step = int(data.get('_redemption_arc_step', 0))\n",
        "    p._deterministic_redemption_triggered = bool(data.get('_deterministic_redemption_triggered', False))\n",
        "    p._redemption_cooldown = int(data.get('_redemption_cooldown', 0))  # NEW\n",
        "    p.disorganizer_age_at_birth = max(0, data.get('disorganizer_age_at_birth', 0))\n",
        "    p._cellular_endurance = float(data.get('_cellular_endurance', 1.0))\n",
        "\n",
        "    p._feral_fury = float(data.get('_feral_fury', 0.0))      # NEW\n",
        "    p._feral_birth = int(data.get('_feral_birth', 0))\n",
        "    p._unconquered_strength = float(data.get('_unconquered_strength', 0.0))   # NEW\n",
        "    p._unconquered_type = data.get('_unconquered_type', None)\n",
        "    p._times_disorganizer = int(data.get('_times_disorganizer', 0))   # NEW\n",
        "\n",
        "    for k, v in data.get('event_counts', {}).items():\n",
        "        p.event_counts[k] = int(v)\n",
        "\n",
        "    p.biography = deque(data.get('biography', []), maxlen=20)\n",
        "    p._vocab_contact_acc = {int(k): int(v) for k, v in data.get('_vocab_contact_acc', {}).items()}\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Восстанавливаем диалоговую память (список словарей)\n",
        "    p.dialogue_longterm = list(data.get('dialogue_longterm', []))\n",
        "    # Возвращаем 'soma' внутри вложенных soma_snapshot обратно в np.array\n",
        "    for entry in p.dialogue_longterm:\n",
        "        snap = entry.get('soma_snapshot')\n",
        "        if isinstance(snap, dict) and isinstance(snap.get('soma'), list):\n",
        "            snap['soma'] = np.array(snap['soma'], dtype=np.float32)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # НОВОЕ: восстановление отдельного буфера соматических снимков\n",
        "    p._soma_snapshots = []\n",
        "    for snap in data.get('_soma_snapshots', []):\n",
        "        restored = dict(snap)\n",
        "        if isinstance(restored.get('soma'), list):\n",
        "            restored['soma'] = np.array(restored['soma'], dtype=np.float32)\n",
        "        p._soma_snapshots.append(restored)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # ==================== ГЛАВНАЯ ПРАВКА: ВОССТАНОВЛЕНИЕ НАРРАТИВА ====================\n",
        "    # Вместо генерации мусора из biography мы загружаем настоящий _self_narrative\n",
        "    raw_narr = data.get('self_narrative', [])\n",
        "    clean_narr = []\n",
        "    for x in raw_narr:\n",
        "        if isinstance(x, dict):\n",
        "            clean_entry = {}\n",
        "            for k, v in x.items():\n",
        "                try:\n",
        "                    clean_entry[k] = float(v) if isinstance(v, (int, float)) else v\n",
        "                except:\n",
        "                    clean_entry[k] = v\n",
        "            clean_narr.append(clean_entry)\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            try:\n",
        "                clean_narr.append(float(x))\n",
        "            except:\n",
        "                clean_narr.append(0.5)\n",
        "\n",
        "    max_len = getattr(Config, 'EPISODIC_BUFFER_MAX_LEN', 3000) if 'Config' in globals() else 3000\n",
        "    p._self_narrative = deque(clean_narr, maxlen=max_len)\n",
        "    # ========================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "    if world and world.field is not None:\n",
        "        p.update_properties(world.field)\n",
        "        if p.cells:\n",
        "            try:\n",
        "                xs_list = [c[0] for c in p.cells]\n",
        "                ys_list = [c[1] for c in p.cells]\n",
        "                p._prev_cell_energies = world.field[xs_list, ys_list, CH['energy']].copy()\n",
        "            except Exception:\n",
        "                p._prev_cell_energies = np.array([])\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            p._prev_cell_energies = np.array([])\n",
        "    return p\n",
        "\n",
        "# === Ограничение сохранения до 200 лучших агентов ===\n",
        "def save_living_world(patterns, path=LIVING_WORLD_PATH):\n",
        "    alive = [p for p in patterns if p.alive]\n",
        "\n",
        "    if len(alive) > 200:\n",
        "        alive.sort(key=lambda p: (\n",
        "            p.soul_weight * 0.4 +\n",
        "            (0.2 if getattr(p, '_narrative_agent', False) else 0.0) +\n",
        "            min(0.2, getattr(p, 'lineage_total_age', 0) / 50000) +\n",
        "            getattr(p, 'last_phenomenal_binding', 0.0) * 0.2\n",
        "        ), reverse=True)\n",
        "        alive = alive[:200]\n",
        "\n",
        "    serializable = [serialize_pattern(p) for p in alive]\n",
        "    def json_default(obj):\n",
        "        if isinstance(obj, (np.bool_,)):\n",
        "            return bool(obj)\n",
        "        if isinstance(obj, np.integer):\n",
        "            return int(obj)\n",
        "        if isinstance(obj, np.floating):\n",
        "            return float(obj)\n",
        "        if isinstance(obj, np.ndarray):\n",
        "            return obj.tolist()\n",
        "        return str(obj)\n",
        "    with open(path, 'w') as f:\n",
        "        json.dump(serializable, f, indent=2, default=json_default)\n",
        "    print(f\"💾 {len(serializable)} живых агентов сохранено в {path}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# === Наследование архивных концептов при загрузке ===\n",
        "def load_living_world(engine, path=LIVING_WORLD_PATH):\n",
        "    if not os.path.exists(path):\n",
        "        return False\n",
        "    with open(path, 'r') as f:\n",
        "        data = json.load(f)\n",
        "    for entry in data:\n",
        "        p = deserialize_pattern(entry, engine)\n",
        "        engine.patterns.append(p)\n",
        "        engine.pattern_dict[p.id] = p\n",
        "        if hasattr(engine, 'archive') and engine.archive is not None:\n",
        "            p.inherit_archive_concepts(engine.archive, probability=1.0, max_concepts=2)\n",
        "        if engine.field is not None:\n",
        "            for (x, y) in p.cells:\n",
        "                engine.field[x, y, CH['owner']] = p.id\n",
        "    print(f\"🔄 Загружено {len(data)} живых агентов из {path}\")\n",
        "    return True\n",
        "\n",
        "def delete_old_ark_files():\n",
        "    old_files = [\n",

        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# Cell 4a – collect_metrics (ИСПРАВЛЕНО: баг метрики blind + IndexError + защита current_social)\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "def safe_mean(vals, default=0.0):\n",
        "    # ФИКС: если vals содержит нечисловые объекты (например, dict — при\n",
        "    # редком баге сериализации), np.asarray создаёт object-массив, а\n",
        "    # np.isfinite() на нём кидает TypeError, роняя весь collect_metrics.\n",
        "    try:\n",
        "        arr = np.asarray(vals, dtype=np.float64).flatten()\n",
        "    except (TypeError, ValueError):\n",
        "        cleaned = []\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            iterable = list(vals)\n",
        "        except TypeError:\n",
        "            iterable = [vals]\n",
        "        for v in iterable:\n",
        "            try:\n",
        "                fv = float(v)\n",
        "                if np.isfinite(fv):\n",
        "                    cleaned.append(fv)\n",
        "            except (TypeError, ValueError):\n",
        "                continue\n",
        "        return float(np.mean(cleaned)) if cleaned else float(default)\n",
        "    mask = np.isfinite(arr)\n",
        "    if mask.any():\n",
        "        return float(np.mean(arr[mask]))\n",
        "    return float(default)\n",
        "\n",
        "def collect_metrics(patterns, field, t):\n",
